  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUNCT, JOIN[JUG]}
  \wordfamily{jointly（联合地，共同地）；adjunct（附属物）；enjoin（命令）}
  \wordsense{n. 接点，接线，接合处，接缝；关节；（下等的）小酒馆；大块肉；含有大麻的香烟}
  \wordphrase{finger joints（手指关节）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "finger joints".（常见搭配：手指关节。）}
  \wordsense{a. 共同的，共有的；合作的}
  \wordphrase{finger joints（手指关节）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "finger joints".（常见搭配：手指关节。）}
  \wordsense{v. （用接缝方式）连接；从关节处切开}
  \wordphrase{out of joint（脱臼）}
  \wordphrase{joint efforts（共同努力）}
  \wordphrase{joint communique（联合公报）}
  \wordexample{out of joint（脱臼）}
  \wordexample{joint efforts（共同努力）}
  \wordexample{joint communique（联合公报）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{jointure}{'dʒɔintʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUNCT, JOIN[JUG]}
  \wordsense{n.（结婚时指定的）寡妇授予产}
  \wordfamily{joint}
  \wordfamily{subjoin}
  \wordfamily{disjointed}
  \wordfamily{conjugal}
  \wordfamily{a jointure（寡妇授予产）}
  \wordphrase{a jointure（寡妇授予产）}
  \wordexample{a jointure（寡妇授予产）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{subjoin}{səb'dʒɔin}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUNCT, JOIN[JUG]}
  \wordfamily{jointure；conjugal；joint；conjugate；adjunct（附属物）}
  \wordsense{v. 附加 *sub (= under)}
  \wordphrase{subjoin the issue}
  \wordexample{subjoin a postscript to a letter（在信件上加附言）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{conjugal}{'kɒndʒəgl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUNCT, JOIN[JUG]}
  \wordfamily{conjugally（结婚地）；adjunct（附属物）；enjoin（命令）}
  \wordsense{a. 结婚的 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{conjugal happiness（婚姻生活的幸福）}
  \wordphrase{conjugal affection（夫妻之间的恩爱）}
  \wordexample{conjugal happiness（婚姻生活的幸福）}
  \wordexample{conjugal affection（夫妻之间的恩爱）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{conjugate}{'kɒndʒəgeit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUNCT, JOIN[JUG]}
  \wordfamily{adjunct（附属物）；enjoin（命令）；subjugate（使服从）}
  \wordsense{v. 【语】列举动词的词形变化；使结合 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{shade, to shadow。}
  \wordexample{conjugation（词形变化；结合）}
\end{word}



\chapter{UMBR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 umbr 意为 shade, to shadow。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{adumbrate}{'ædʌmbreit}
  \wordbreakdown{使看起来非常模糊 ad (= to, intensive) + umbr (= shadow)}
  \wordfamily{adumbration（轮廓）；umbrage（不快）；umbrella（雨伞）}
  \wordsense{vt. 勾画轮廓；预示}
  \wordphrase{adumbrate layoffs down the}
  \wordexample{The reduced quarterly earnings adumbrate layoffs down the road.（季度收益削减预示着将要裁员。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{umbrage}{'ʌmbridʒ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 UMBR}
  \wordfamily{umbrella；adumbrate（勾画轮廓）；conjugate（语】列举动词的词形变化）}
  \wordsense{n. 不快，恼火；树荫}
  \wordphrase{give / take umbrage at（因……使感到不愉快）}
  \wordexample{give / take umbrage at（因……使感到不愉快）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{umbrella}{ʌm'brelə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 UMBR}
  \wordfamily{adumbrate（勾画轮廓）；umbrage（不快）；conjugate（语】列举动词的词形变化）}
  \wordsense{n. 雨伞；《喻》（政治、经济界等的）保护伞}
  \wordphrase{under the Conservative umbrella（在保守党的保护下）}
  \wordphrase{umbrella stand（伞架）}
  \wordexample{under the Conservative umbrella（在保守党的保护下）}
  \wordexample{umbrella stand（伞架）}
\end{word}



\chapter{FIN}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 fin 意为 end, limit。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 termin, ultim 和来自希腊语的 bys。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{affinity}{ə'finəti}
  \wordbreakdown{末端在近处 af<ad (= to, near) + fin (= end)}
  \wordsense{n. 亲密关系；相似；（异性间的）亲密感，吸引力；喜好，迷恋；【化】亲合性}
  \wordfamily{definitive}
  \wordfamily{infinite}
  \wordfamily{confine}
  \wordfamily{confinement}
  \wordphrase{affinity for dogs than}
  \wordexample{I feel a greater affinity for dogs than for cats.（相比猫，我更喜欢狗。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{definitive}{di'finitiv}
  \wordbreakdown{完全见尾 de (= intensive) + fin (= end)}
  \wordfamily{affinity；infinite；confine；confinement}
  \wordsense{a. 最终的；决定性的；限定性的}
  \wordphrase{be definitive}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of definitive.（此处展示 definitive 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 【语】限定词}
  \wordphrase{definitive ruling}
  \wordexample{The appeals court offered the definitive ruling in the case.（上诉法庭对那一事件作出了最终判决。）}
  \wordexample{definitive ruling}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{infinite}{'infinət}
  \wordbreakdown{没有结尾 in (= not) + fin (= end)}
  \wordfamily{infinitely（无限地，无穷地）；affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）}
  \wordsense{a. 无穷的，无限的，无数的；极大的}
  \wordphrase{be infinite}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of infinite.（此处展示 infinite 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. （the \textasciitilde{}）上帝}
  \wordphrase{infinite love and peace}
  \wordexample{Some mystics who experience God say they feel infinite love and peace.（一些感受到过上帝的神秘主义者说他们体会到无穷的爱和安宁。）}
  \wordexample{infinite love and peace}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{confine}{kən'fain}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）；infinite（无穷的）}
  \wordsense{v. 限制，限定；禁闭，监禁}
  \wordphrase{confine the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of confine.（此处展示 confine 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. （pl.）范围，界限，边界 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{the confine}
  \wordexample{beyond the confines of human knowledge（超出人类的知识范围）}
  \wordexample{within the confines of this valley（在这个山谷的范围之内）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{confinement}{kən'fainmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{confine；define；definite；definition；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 限制，局限；幽禁，监禁；分娩 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{be placed in confinement（被监禁）}
  \wordphrase{six months solitary confinement（六个月的单独监禁）}
  \wordexample{be placed in confinement（被监禁）}
  \wordexample{six months solitary confinement（六个月的单独监禁）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{define}{di'fain}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{definable（可定义的）；affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）}
  \wordsense{v. 给……下定义；阐明 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{to define（给……下定义）}
  \wordexample{to define（给……下定义）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{definite}{'definit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）；infinite（无穷的）}
  \wordsense{a. 清楚的；明确的 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{definite time and place（明确的时间和地点）}
  \wordphrase{definite article（定冠词）}
  \wordexample{definite time and place（明确的时间和地点）}
  \wordexample{definite article（定冠词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{definition}{ˌdefi'niʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{definite；infinitive；define；infinitude；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 定义；限定；（轮廓的）清晰；（镜头的）分辨率 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{a definition（定义）}
  \wordexample{a definition（定义）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{infinitive}{in'finitiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{definition；infinitude；definite；infinity；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 【语】不定式}
  \wordphrase{an infinitive（不定式）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "an infinitive".（常见搭配：不定式。）}
  \wordsense{a. 【语】不定式的 *in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{an infinitive（不定式）}
  \wordexample{an infinitive（不定式）}
  \wordexample{be infinitive（不定式的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{infinitude}{in'finitju:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{infinitive；infinity；definition；refine；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 无限，无穷 *in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{infinitude of small particles（无数小微粒）}
  \wordexample{infinitude of small particles（无数小微粒）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{infinity}{in'finiti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{infinitude；refine；infinitive；refined；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 无限，无穷 *in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{an infinity（无限，无穷）}
  \wordexample{an infinity（无限，无穷）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{refine}{ri'fain}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{infinity；refined；infinitude；refinement；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{v. 精制；精炼；使文雅；推敲 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{to refine（精制）}
  \wordexample{to refine（精制）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{refined}{ri'faind}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{refine；refinement；infinity；refiner；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{a. 精炼的；文雅的；精制的 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{refined manners / language（文雅的态度 / 言语）}
  \wordexample{refined manners / language（文雅的态度 / 言语）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{refinement}{ri'fainmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{refined；refiner；refine；refinery；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 精炼，精制；文雅；精巧，精细 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{a lady of refinement（文雅的女子）}
  \wordexample{a lady of refinement（文雅的女子）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{refiner}{ri'fainə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）；infinite（无穷的）}
  \wordsense{n. 精制者，精炼者；精制机，精炼机 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{a refiner（精制者，精炼者）}
  \wordexample{a refiner（精制者，精炼者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{refinery}{ri'fainəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）；infinite（无穷的）}
  \wordsense{n. 精炼厂 *re (= again), ery (= place where)}
  \wordphrase{a refinery（精炼厂）}
  \wordexample{a refinery（精炼厂）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{indefinite}{in'definit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{refinery；indefinable；refiner；final；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{a. 含糊的，模糊的；不明确的 *in (= not), de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{indefinite answer（含糊的回答）}
  \wordexample{indefinite answer（含糊的回答）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{indefinable}{ˌindi'fainəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{indefinite；final；refinery；finale；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{a. 不确定的，难以说明的 *in (= not), de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{be indefinable（不确定的，难以说明的）}
  \wordexample{be indefinable（不确定的，难以说明的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{final}{'fainl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{finalist（决赛参赛选手）；finally（最后，最终）；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{a. 最后的，最终的}
  \wordphrase{tennis finals（网球决赛）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "tennis finals".（常见搭配：网球决赛。）}
  \wordsense{n. （pl.）决赛；期末考试；（当天报纸的）末版}
  \wordphrase{take his finals（参加期末考试）}
  \wordexample{take his finals（参加期末考试）}
  \wordexample{be final（最后的，最终的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{finale}{fi'nɑ:li}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordsense{n. 结尾；（戏剧的）终场；（交响乐等的）末乐章，终曲}
  \wordfamily{final}
  \wordfamily{finality}
  \wordfamily{indefinable}
  \wordfamily{finalize}
  \wordfamily{a finale（结尾）}
  \wordphrase{a finale（结尾）}
  \wordexample{a finale（结尾）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{finality}{fai'næləti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordsense{n. 结局；决定性}
  \wordfamily{finale}
  \wordfamily{finalize}
  \wordfamily{final}
  \wordfamily{finance}
  \wordphrase{speak with an air of finality（断言）}
  \wordexample{speak with an air of finality（断言）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{finalize}{'fainəlaiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordsense{v. 完成；结束}
  \wordfamily{finality}
  \wordfamily{finance}
  \wordfamily{finale}
  \wordfamily{financial}
  \wordfamily{to finalize（完成）}
  \wordphrase{to finalize（完成）}
  \wordexample{to finalize（完成）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{finance}{fai'næns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{finalize；financial；finality；financier；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 财政（学）；（pl.）（政府或公司的）财源}
  \wordphrase{to finance（筹措、供给资金）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to finance".（常见搭配：筹措、供给资金。）}
  \wordsense{v. （为计划等）筹措、供给资金}
  \wordphrase{a finance（财政（学））}
  \wordexample{a finance（财政（学））}
  \wordexample{to finance（筹措、供给资金）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{financial}{fai'nænʃl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{financially（财政地）；affinity（亲密关系）；definitive（最终的）}
  \wordsense{a. 财政的；财务的；金融上的}
  \wordphrase{financial year（财政年度）}
  \wordphrase{financial center（金融中心）}
  \wordphrase{financial condition（财政状况）}

  \wordexample{financial center（金融中心）}
  \wordexample{financial condition（财政状况）}

\begin{word}[***]{financier}{fai'nænsiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIN}
  \wordfamily{financial；finance；finalize；finality；affinity（亲密关系）}
  \wordsense{n. 财政家；金融家}
  \wordphrase{a financier（财政家）}
  \wordexample{a financier（财政家）}
\end{word}



\chapter{POS, POST, PON, POUND}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 pos, post, pon, pound 意为 to put, to place。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 loc, sert, stal 和来自希腊语的 thes / thet / them, top 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{apposite}{'æpəzit}
  \wordbreakdown{放在近处的 ap<ad (= to, near) + pos (= put)}
  \wordsense{a. 适当的，合适的}
  \wordfamily{appositeness 适当，合适}
  \wordfamily{appositely 适当地，合适地}
  \wordphrase{apposite behavior}
  \wordexample{Her jokes and smiles were not apposite behavior for her father's funeral.（她在她爸爸的葬礼上开玩笑和微笑不合适。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{depose}{di'pauz}
  \wordbreakdown{将某人分开放 de (= from, away) + pos (= put)}
  \wordfamily{deposition（废黜）；apposite（适当的）；exposition（博览会）}
  \wordsense{vt. 罢免，废黜；【律】宣誓作证}
  \wordphrase{A popular liberation force}
  \wordexample{A popular liberation force deposed the monarch and took power.（一支民众解放势力罢黜国王夺取了政权。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{exposition}{ˌekspə'ziʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{展开放在外边 ex (= out) + pos (= put)}
  \wordsense{n. 博览会，展览会；阐述；（剧本等的）提示部分}
  \wordfamily{depose}
  \wordfamily{repose}
  \wordfamily{apposite}
  \wordfamily{proponent}
  \wordphrase{exposition clumsily}
  \wordexample{Novice screenwriters often deploy a film's exposition clumsily.（新编剧往往对电影提示部分的设置很生疏。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{repose}{ri'pauz}
  \wordbreakdown{放在背后 re (= back) + pos (= put)}
  \wordfamily{reposeful（平稳的，安详的）；apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）}
  \wordsense{n. 休息，睡眠；平静}
  \wordphrase{a repose（休息，睡眠）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a repose".（常见搭配：休息，睡眠。）}
  \wordsense{vi. 休息，歇息；长眠；放置；基于}
  \wordphrase{repose}
  \wordexample{Is there anything so beautiful as a young child in repose?（还有什么比安然熟睡的婴儿更美丽的吗？）}
  \wordexample{repose}
  \wordexample{a repose（休息，睡眠）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{proponent}{prəu'pəunənt}
  \wordbreakdown{向前放、提出 pro (= forward, forth) + pon (= put)}
  \wordsense{n. 提议者，发起者}
  \wordfamily{repose}
  \wordfamily{imposter}
  \wordfamily{exposition}
  \wordfamily{expound}
  \wordphrase{proponent of gun control}
  \wordexample{I've always been a proponent of gun control.（我一直都提倡管制枪支。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{imposter}{im'pɒstə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{放在某物上面 im<in (= on) + post (= put)}
  \wordsense{n. 冒名顶替者；骗子}
  \wordfamily{proponent}
  \wordfamily{expound}
  \wordfamily{repose}
  \wordfamily{indisposed}
  \wordphrase{I've read of several}
  \wordexample{I've read of several cases where respected physicians turned out to be impostors.（我阅读过几宗关于受尊敬的内科医生最终被查明是骗子的案例。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{expound}{ik'spaund}
  \wordbreakdown{放在外边，彻底说明 ex (= out, intensive) + pound (= put)}
  \wordfamily{imposter；indisposed；proponent；supposition；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{vt. 详细说明}
  \wordphrase{expound the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of expound.（此处展示 expound 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vi. on + sth 详细说明}
  \wordphrase{expound on any topic}
  \wordexample{He loves to expound on any topic; he's such a blowhard.（他对每个话题都爱长篇大论，他真是个吹牛专家。）}
  \wordexample{expound on any topic}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{indisposed}{ˌindi'spauzd}
  \wordbreakdown{不想分开放的 in (= not) + dis (= apart) + pos (= put)}
  \wordfamily{indisposition（不愿意，不舒服）；apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）}
  \wordsense{a. 身体不舒服的；厌恶的，不情愿的}
  \wordphrase{indisposed}
  \wordexample{Mrs. Barnes can't attend the luncheon because she is indisposed.（巴恩斯夫人因身体不适而不能参加午宴。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{supposition}{ˌsʌpə'ziʃn}

  \wordfamily{supposing 如果}
  \wordphrase{supposition is that next}
  \wordexample{My supposition is that next year's Cadillac model will look basically like this year's.（我推测明年卡迪拉克的样式基本上会和今年一样。）}
\end{word}

  \wordsense{n. 提案，建议；陈述，主张；命题；《口》要处理的事；《口》（向某人）提出（非法的、不道德的）提议 *pro (= forth)}
  \wordphrase{a proposition（提案，建议）}
  \wordexample{a proposition（提案，建议）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{purpose}{'pɜ:pəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{purpose-built（为特定目的建造的）；apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）}
  \wordsense{n. 目的，意志；用途；（讨论中的）议题}
  \wordphrase{on purpose（故意地，有意地）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "on purpose".（常见搭配：故意地，有意地。）}
  \wordsense{v. 打算 *pur<pro (= forth)}
  \wordphrase{of set purpose（故意地，有目的地）}
  \wordphrase{to the purpose（适当（地）；与本题有关（地））}
  \wordexample{of set purpose（故意地，有目的地）}
  \wordexample{to the purpose（适当（地）；与本题有关（地））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{purposeful}{'pɜ:pəsfl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）；exposition（博览会）}
  \wordsense{a. 意味深长的；有目的的 *pur<pro (= forth)}
  \wordphrase{be purposeful（意味深长的）}
  \wordexample{be purposeful（意味深长的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{purposive}{'pɜ:pəsiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{purposeful；repository；purpose；transpose；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{a. 有目的的 *pur<pro (= forth)}
  \wordphrase{purposive movements（有目的的动作）}
  \wordexample{purposive movements（有目的的动作）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{repository}{ri'pɒzitri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）；exposition（博览会）}
  \wordsense{n. 容器；贮藏室，仓库；（知识等的）宝库 *re (= back)}
  \wordphrase{a repository（容器）}
  \wordexample{a repository（容器）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{transpose}{træns'pauz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{transposition（转换）；apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）}
  \wordsense{v. 转换 *trans (= change)}
  \wordphrase{to transpose（转换）}
  \wordexample{to transpose（转换）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{component}{kəm'pəunənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{transpose；deponent；repository；exponent；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{a. 组成的，构成（成品）的}
  \wordphrase{be component}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of component.（此处展示 component 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 成分，构成要素 *com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{component parts（组成部分，零件）}
  \wordexample{the components of a camera lens（照相机镜头的各个组成部分）}
  \wordexample{component parts（组成部分，零件）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{deponent}{di'pəunənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{component；exponent；transpose；opponent；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{n. 【律】证人 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{a deponent（证人）}
  \wordexample{a deponent（证人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{exponent}{ik'spəunənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{deponent；opponent；component；postpone；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{n. 说明者，解释者；（思想等的）拥护者；代表者；【数】指数 *ex (= out)}
  \wordphrase{the exponent}
  \wordexample{exponent of Darwin's theory of evolution（达尔文进化论的解说者（指赫胥黎））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{opponent}{ə'pəunənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{exponent；postpone；deponent；compost；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{n. （比赛、争论等的）对手，对方；对抗者，反对者 *op<ob (= against)}
  \wordphrase{an opponent（对手，对方）}

\begin{word}[***]{postpone}{pəust'pəun}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}

  \wordsense{v. 延期，推迟 *post (= after)}

  \wordexample{to postpone（延期，推迟）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{compost}{'kɒmpɒst}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{postpone；expostulate；opponent；outpost；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{n. 混合肥料，堆肥}
  \wordphrase{a compost（混合肥料，堆肥）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a compost".（常见搭配：混合肥料，堆肥。）}
  \wordsense{v. 将……做成堆肥 *com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{a compost（混合肥料，堆肥）}
  \wordexample{a compost（混合肥料，堆肥）}
  \wordexample{to compost（将……做成堆肥）}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}

  \wordsense{v. 告诫，劝告 *ex (= out)}
  \wordphrase{to expostulate（告诫，劝告）}
  \wordexample{to expostulate（告诫，劝告）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{outpost}{'autpaust}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordsense{n. 前哨基地；边远居民点；边境}
  \wordfamily{expostulate}

  \wordfamily{compost}
  \wordfamily{posture}
  \wordphrase{outpost of the Roman Empire（罗马帝国的边境）}
  \wordexample{outpost of the Roman Empire（罗马帝国的边境）}

\begin{word}[**]{postulate}{'pɒstjuleit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{outpost；posture；expostulate；compound；apposite（适当的）}
  \wordsense{n. 假设；基本原理；【数】【逻】公设}
  \wordphrase{a postulate（假设）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a postulate".（常见搭配：假设。）}
  \wordsense{v. 假定……存在；视……为当然}
  \wordphrase{the postulates of Euclidean geometry（欧几里得几何公设）}
  \wordexample{the postulates of Euclidean geometry（欧几里得几何公设）}
  \wordexample{a postulate（假设）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{posture}{'pɒstʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POS, POST, PON, POUND}
  \wordfamily{apposite（适当的）；depose（罢免）；exposition（博览会）}
  \wordsense{n. （身体的）姿势，状态；心境，态度}
  \wordphrase{reclining posture（斜靠着的姿势）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "reclining posture".（常见搭配：斜靠着的姿势。）}
  \wordsense{v. 使摆姿势；装模作样，故作姿态}
  \wordphrase{posture a model（让模特摆姿势）}
  \wordexample{in the present posture of public affairs（在公共事务目前的这种情况下）}
  \wordexample{posture a model（让模特摆姿势）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{compound}{kəm'paund}

  \wordphrase{be compound}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of compound.（此处展示 compound 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 混合物，合成物 *com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{compound sentence（复合句）}

  \wordexample{compound interest（复利）}
  \wordexample{compound fracture（有创骨折）}

  \wordexample{to impound（扣押（证物等），没收）}

\chapter{TRI, TRIT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 tri, trit 意为 to rub。同义词根为 fric。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{attrition}{ə'triʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{用力擦 at<ad (= to, intensive) + trit (= rub)}
  \wordsense{n. 消耗，磨损；（由于死亡、退休等造成的）人员自然缩减}
  \wordfamily{attrit 消耗；削弱}
  \wordfamily{attrited 磨损的}
  \wordphrase{attrition rather than layoffs}
  \wordexample{The company is downsizing its staff by attrition rather than layoffs.（公司减员是通过人员自然缩减实现的，而非通过裁员。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{contrite}{'kɒntrait}
  \wordbreakdown{用力擦的 con<com (= intensive, together) + trit (= rub)}
  \wordfamily{contrition（懊悔，忏悔）；attrition（消耗）；detriment（损害）}
  \wordsense{a. 悔罪的，深感懊悔的}
  \wordphrase{contrite about having taken}
  \wordexample{My nephew seemed genuinely contrite about having taken money from my purse.（我侄子看起来是在真心懊悔从我钱包里拿钱的事。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{detriment}{'detrimənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TRI, TRIT}
  \wordfamily{detrimental；detritus；trite；attrition（消耗）}
  \wordsense{n. 损害，损伤 *de (= away, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{the detriment}
  \wordexample{to the detriment of his health（对他的健康有害）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{detrimental}{ˌdetri'mentl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TRI, TRIT}
  \wordfamily{detriment；detritus；trite；attrition（消耗）}
  \wordsense{a. 有害的 *de (= away, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{detrimental to our interests（有损我们利益的）}
  \wordexample{detrimental to our interests（有损我们利益的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{detritus}{di'traitəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TRI, TRIT}
  \wordfamily{detrimental；trite；detriment；attrition（消耗）}
  \wordsense{n. 【地】岩屑（岩石因风化作用掉下来的石粒或碎屑），碎石 *de (= away, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{a detritus（岩屑（岩石因风化作用掉下来的石粒或碎屑），碎石）}
  \wordexample{a detritus（岩屑（岩石因风化作用掉下来的石粒或碎屑），碎石）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{trite}{trait}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TRI, TRIT}
  \wordfamily{detritus；detrimental；detriment；attrition（消耗）}
  \wordsense{a. （话、想法、意见等）陈腐的；无新意的}
  \wordphrase{be trite（陈腐的）}
  \wordexample{be trite（陈腐的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 dot, don 意为 to give。dow, dos 是其变形。此外，与此相似的还有 dat 及其变形 dit。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{anecdote}{'ænikdəut}
  \wordbreakdown{不向外给予 an (= not) + ec<ex (= out) + dot (= give)}
  \wordsense{n. 轶事，奇闻；（pl.）秘史}
  \wordfamily{condone}
  \wordfamily{endow}
  \wordfamily{render}
  \wordfamily{antidote}
  \wordphrase{anecdote}
  \wordexample{Many public speakers begin their address with an amusing anecdote.（许多演说家都是以趣闻轶事开始演说的。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{condone}{kən'dəun}
  \wordbreakdown{完全给予 con<com (= intensive, completely) + don (= give)}
  \wordfamily{condonation（宽恕）；不咎（过错）；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{vt. 原谅，宽恕；不咎（过错）}
  \wordphrase{In some countries spousal}
  \wordexample{In some countries, spousal physical abuse is condoned.（有些国家容许对配偶身体的虐待行为。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{endow}{in'dau}
  \wordbreakdown{向里边给予 en (= in) + dow<don (= give)}
  \wordfamily{anecdote（轶事）；condone（原谅）；render（使……成为）}
  \wordsense{vt. sb + with + sth（向医院、学校等）捐赠；（天生）赋有（某种资质）}
  \wordphrase{endowed a professorship}
  \wordexample{The business tycoon endowed a professorship in the university's business school.（那位商业大亨向该大学商学院捐赠了教授基金。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{render}{'rendə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{还给 ren<re (= back) + der<dit (= give)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使……成为；以……回报；提出，提供，交付；演出，演奏；翻译；表达，描写}
  \wordfamily{rendition 翻译；演出，演奏}
  \wordfamily{rendering 翻译；演出，演奏}
  \wordphrase{rendered the lion harmless}
  \wordexample{A tranquilizer dart rendered the lion harmless.（狮子中了麻醉针剂后就不会伤人了。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{antidote}{'æntidəut}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{donate；donation；donor；pardon；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{n. 解毒剂；矫正方法 *anti (= against)}
  \wordphrase{an antidote（解毒剂）}
  \wordexample{an antidote（解毒剂）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{donate}{dəu'neit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordsense{v. 捐赠}
  \wordfamily{antidote}
  \wordfamily{donation}
  \wordfamily{donor}
  \wordfamily{pardon}
  \wordfamily{to donate（捐赠）}
  \wordphrase{to donate（捐赠）}
  \wordexample{to donate（捐赠）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{donation}{dəu'neiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordsense{n. 捐献，赠与；捐款；捐赠品}
  \wordfamily{donate}
  \wordfamily{donor}
  \wordfamily{antidote}
  \wordfamily{pardon}
  \wordphrase{donations to the Red Cross（给红十字会的捐款）}
  \wordexample{donations to the Red Cross（给红十字会的捐款）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{donor}{'dəunə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{anecdote（轶事）；condone（原谅）；endow（sb + with + sth（向医院、学校等））}
  \wordsense{n. 捐赠者}
  \wordphrase{a donor（捐赠者）}
  \wordexample{a donor（捐赠者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{pardon}{'pɑ:dn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{donor；dowager；donation；dower；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{v. /}
  \wordphrase{pardon the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of pardon.（此处展示 pardon 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 原谅，宽恕；赦免 *par<per (= completely)}
  \wordphrase{the pardon}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of pardon.（此处展示 pardon 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 原谅，宽恕）}
  \wordphrase{to pardon（/n. 原谅，宽恕）}
  \wordexample{to pardon（/n. 原谅，宽恕）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{dowager}{'dauədʒə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{anecdote（轶事）；condone（原谅）；endow（sb + with + sth（向医院、学校等））}
  \wordsense{n. 受有亡夫爵位（或遗产）的寡妇；老年贵妇人}
  \wordphrase{dowager duchess（公爵遗孀）}
  \wordphrase{Empress Dowager Hsi（（中国清朝的）西太后）}
  \wordexample{dowager duchess（公爵遗孀）}
  \wordexample{Empress Dowager Hsi（（中国清朝的）西太后）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{dower}{'dauə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{dowager；dowry；pardon；dose；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{n. （寡妇应分得的）亡夫遗产；嫁妆；天赋，天资}
  \wordphrase{a dower（亡夫遗产）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a dower".（常见搭配：亡夫遗产。）}
  \wordsense{v. 给……亡夫遗产；赋予（才能等）}
  \wordphrase{a dower（亡夫遗产）}
  \wordexample{a dower（亡夫遗产）}
  \wordexample{to dower（给……亡夫遗产）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{dowry}{'dauri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordsense{n. 嫁妆}
  \wordfamily{dower}
  \wordfamily{dose}
  \wordfamily{dowager}
  \wordfamily{dosage}
  \wordfamily{a dowry（嫁妆）}
  \wordphrase{a dowry（嫁妆）}
  \wordexample{a dowry（嫁妆）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{dose}{dəus}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{anecdote（轶事）；condone（原谅）；endow（sb + with + sth（向医院、学校等））}
  \wordsense{n. （药物等的）（一次）剂量，一服；《口》（尤指苦事的）一次，一番；《俚》花柳病}
  \wordphrase{six doses（服用六次的药量）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "six doses".（常见搭配：服用六次的药量。）}
  \wordsense{v. （按剂量）给……服药}
  \wordphrase{give him a dose（给他服一剂药）}
  \wordexample{give him a dose（给他服一剂药）}
  \wordexample{a dose（（一次）剂量，一服）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{dosage}{'dəusidʒ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordsense{n.（药的）剂量；（按剂量的）给药}
  \wordfamily{dose}
  \wordfamily{antedate}
  \wordfamily{dowry}
  \wordfamily{postdate}
  \wordfamily{a dosage（剂量）}
  \wordphrase{a dosage（剂量）}
  \wordexample{a dosage（剂量）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{antedate}{ˌænti'deit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{dosage；postdate；dose；predate；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{v. 倒填（在信件、文件等的）日期；（时间上）先发生 *ante (= before)}
  \wordphrase{to antedate（倒填（在信件、文件等的）日期）}
  \wordexample{to antedate（倒填（在信件、文件等的）日期）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{postdate}{ˌpəust'deit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{antedate；predate；dosage；data；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{v. （在信件、文件等上）写上比实际日期晚的日期；（时间上）后于 *post (= after)}
  \wordphrase{to postdate（写上比实际日期晚的日期）}
  \wordexample{to postdate（写上比实际日期晚的日期）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{predate}{pri:'deit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{postdate；data；antedate；date；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{v. (= antedate) *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{to predate（(= antedate)）}
  \wordexample{to predate（(= antedate)）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{data}{'deitə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordsense{n. 资料，材料；数据}
  \wordfamily{predate}
  \wordfamily{date}
  \wordfamily{postdate}
  \wordfamily{dative}
  \wordphrase{data bank（数据库）}
  \wordphrase{data processing（数据处理）}
  \wordexample{data bank（数据库）}
  \wordexample{data processing（数据处理）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{date}{deit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{dated（过时的）；datable（可确定年代的）；dateline（国际日期变更线）；dates（back）；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{n. 日期；（尤指与异性的）约会；时代，年代；约会对象；海枣；枣椰树}
  \wordphrase{blind date（不相识的男女初次会面）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "blind date".（常见搭配：不相识的男女初次会面。）}
  \wordsense{v. 在……上注明日期；源自；（\textasciitilde{} from / back to）追溯至……；与……约会}
  \wordphrase{dates back}
  \wordexample{The castle dates back to the 14th century.（那座城堡早在 14 世纪就建成了。）}
  \wordexample{dates back}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{dative}{'deitiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{date；edit；data；edition；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{a. 【语】与格的}
  \wordphrase{be dative（与格的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be dative".（常见搭配：与格的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 与格}
  \wordphrase{be dative（与格的）}
  \wordexample{be dative（与格的）}
  \wordexample{a dative（与格）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{edit}{'edit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{dative；edition；date；editor；anecdote（轶事）}
  \wordsense{v. 编辑 *e<ex (= out)}
  \wordphrase{to edit（编辑）}
  \wordexample{to edit（编辑）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{edition}{i'diʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{anecdote（轶事）；condone（原谅）；endow（sb + with + sth（向医院、学校等））}
  \wordsense{n. 版本 *e<ex (= out)}
  \wordphrase{an edition（版本）}
  \wordexample{an edition（版本）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{editor}{'editə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOT, DON[DOW, DOS], DAT[DIT]}
  \wordfamily{anecdote（轶事）；condone（原谅）；endow（sb + with + sth（向医院、学校等））}
  \wordsense{n. （书、报纸、期刊、广播节目等的）编辑；（报刊的）主编；（报纸专栏）主笔 *e<ex (= out)}
  \wordphrase{chief editor / editor-in-chief（总编辑，主编）}
  \wordexample{chief editor / editor-in-chief（总编辑，主编）}
\end{word}



\chapter{ONYM[ONOM]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 onym 意为 name, word。onom 是其变形。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{anonymous}{ə'nɒniməs}
  \wordbreakdown{没有姓名的 an (= not, without) + onym (= name, word)}
  \wordfamily{anonymity（匿名）；pseudonym（假名）；antonym（反义词 *ant<anti (= against）}
  \wordsense{a. 作者未详的；匿名的，不具名的}
  \wordphrase{anonymous donor}
  \wordexample{The funds for the new library were given by an anonymous donor.（新图书馆的建设资金是一位匿名捐助者赞助的。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{pseudonym}{'sju:dənim}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{antonym；synonym；synonymous；homonym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 假名；（著者的）雅号，笔名 *pseud<pseudo (= false), onym (= name)}
  \wordphrase{a pseudonym（假名）}
  \wordexample{a pseudonym（假名）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{antonym}{'æntənim}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{pseudonym；synonym；synonymous；homonym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 反义词 *ant<anti (= against, opposite), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{an antonym（反义词）}
  \wordexample{an antonym（反义词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{synonym}{'sinənim}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{antonym；synonymous；pseudonym；homonym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 同义词 *syn (= alike, together), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{a synonym（同义词）}
  \wordexample{a synonym（同义词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{synonymous}{si'nɒniməs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{synonym；homonym；antonym；heteronym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{a. 同义词的，同义的 *syn (= alike, together), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{be synonymous（同义词的，同义的）}
  \wordexample{be synonymous（同义词的，同义的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{homonym}{'hɒmənim}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{synonymous；heteronym；synonym；metonymy；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 同音异义词 *hom<homo (= same), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{a homonym（同音异义词）}
  \wordexample{a homonym（同音异义词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{heteronym}{'hetərənim}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{homonym；metonymy；synonymous；acronym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 同形异音异义词 *heter<hetero (= other), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{a heteronym（同形异音异义词）}
  \wordexample{a heteronym（同形异音异义词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{metonymy}{me'tɒnimi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{heteronym；acronym；homonym；onomatopoeia；crown（代替）；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 【语】转喻（如用 crown 代替 king） *met<meta (= change), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{a metonymy（转喻（如用 crown 代替 king））}
  \wordexample{a metonymy（转喻（如用 crown 代替 king））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{acronym}{'ækrənim}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{metonymy；onomatopoeia；heteronym；homonym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 首字母缩略词 *acr<acro (= high), onym (= word)}
  \wordphrase{an acronym（首字母缩略词）}
  \wordexample{an acronym（首字母缩略词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{onomatopoeia}{ˌɒnəˌmætə'pi:ə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ONYM[ONOM]}
  \wordfamily{acronym；metonymy；heteronym；homonym；anonymous（作者未详的）}
  \wordsense{n. 【语】拟声词 *onom<onym (= word), poeia (= make)}
  \wordphrase{an onomatopoeia（拟声词）}
  \wordexample{an onomatopoeia（拟声词）}
\end{word}



\chapter{BYS}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 bys 意为 end, bottom。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 fin, termin, ultim 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{abyss}{ə'bis}
  \wordbreakdown{没有尽头 a<an (= not, without) + bys (= bottom, end)}
  \wordfamily{abysmal；onomatopoeia（语】拟声词 *onom<onym (= word）；acronym（首字母缩略词）}
  \wordsense{n. 深渊；地狱}
  \wordphrase{abyss of space is}
  \wordexample{The abyss of space is infinite so far as we know.（就我们所知，宇宙是无限深邃的深渊。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{abysmal}{ə'bizməl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 BYS}
  \wordfamily{abyss；onomatopoeia（语】拟声词 *onom<onym (= word）；acronym（首字母缩略词）}
  \wordsense{a. 深渊的，深不可测的 *a<an (= not, without)}
  \wordphrase{abysmal ignorance（极度的无知）}
  \wordphrase{abysmal night（深夜）}
  \wordexample{abysmal ignorance（极度的无知）}
  \wordexample{abysmal night（深夜）}
\end{word}



\chapter{ARCH}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 arch 意为 government, to rule。arch 还有 chief, first, old 的含义。同义词根有来自希腊语的 cracy / crat 和来自拉丁语的 reg。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{anarchy}{'ænəki}
  \wordbreakdown{无政府状态 an (= not, without) + arch (= government)}
  \wordfamily{anarchism（无政府主义）；anarchist（无政府主义者）；ARCH（来自希腊语的）}
  \wordsense{n. 无政府状态；混乱，无秩序}
  \wordphrase{government, to rule。arch 还有}
  \wordexample{Without a federal government a nation devolves into anarchy.（若没有联邦政府，国家就会陷入无政府状态。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{autarchy}{'ɔ:tɑ:ki}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{autarky；diarchy；matriarch；monarchy；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 独裁，专制 *aut<auto (= self), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{an autarchy（独裁，专制）}
  \wordexample{an autarchy（独裁，专制）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{autarky}{'ɔ:tɑ:ki}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{autarchy；diarchy；matriarch；monarchy；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 国家经济的自给自足 *aut<auto (= self), ark<arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{an autarky（国家经济的自给自足）}
  \wordexample{an autarky（国家经济的自给自足）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{diarchy}{'daiɑ:ki}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{autarky；matriarch；autarchy；monarchy；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 两头政治 *di (= two), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{a diarchy（两头政治）}
  \wordexample{a diarchy（两头政治）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{matriarch}{'meitriɑ:k}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{matriarchy（母系氏族制）；matriarchal（母系氏族制的）；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 女家长，女族长；女统治者；女负责人 *matri (= mother), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{a matriarch（女家长，女族长）}
  \wordexample{a matriarch（女家长，女族长）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{monarchy}{'mɒnəki}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{monarchism（君主制，君主主义）；monarchist（君主主义者）；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 君主政治，君主制；君主国 *mon<mono (= one), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{absolute / despotic monarchy（专制君主制）}
  \wordphrase{constitutional / limited monarchy（君主立宪制（政体））}
  \wordexample{absolute / despotic monarchy（专制君主制）}
  \wordexample{constitutional / limited monarchy（君主立宪制（政体））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{monarch}{'mɒnək}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{monarchic（君主的，君主政体的）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 君主 *mon<mono (= one), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{a monarch（君主）}
  \wordexample{a monarch（君主）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{oligarchy}{'ɒligɑ:ki}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{oligarch（寡头统治集团成员）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 寡头政治（→ polyarchy 多头政治）；寡头统治的国家 *olig (= few), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{an oligarchy（寡头政治（→ polyarchy 多头政治））}
  \wordexample{an oligarchy（寡头政治（→ polyarchy 多头政治））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{patriarch}{'peitriɑ:k}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{patriarchy（父权制）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 家长，族长；元老，长老；最年长者 *patri (= father), arch (= rule)}
  \wordphrase{a patriarch（家长，族长）}
  \wordexample{a patriarch（家长，族长）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{archangel}{'ɑ:keindʒəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{patriarch；archbishop；oligarchy；archdeacon；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 大天使 *arch (= chief)}
  \wordphrase{an archangel（大天使）}
  \wordexample{an archangel（大天使）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{archbishop}{ɑ:tʃ'biʃəp}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archbishopric（大主教的职务、辖区、管辖权）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 大主教，主教长 *arch (= chief)}
  \wordphrase{an archbishop（大主教，主教长）}
  \wordexample{an archbishop（大主教，主教长）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{archdeacon}{ɑ:tʃ'di:kən}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archdeaconry（会吏总监的职位、住宅）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 英国国教的会吏总监 *arch (= chief)}
  \wordphrase{an archdeacon（英国国教的会吏总监）}
  \wordexample{an archdeacon（英国国教的会吏总监）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{archdiocese}{ˌɑ:tʃ'daiəsis}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archdeacon；archenemy；archbishop；archetype；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 大主教（管辖）区 *arch (= chief), di<dia (= through), oce<eco (= house)}
  \wordphrase{an archdiocese（大主教（管辖）区）}
  \wordexample{an archdiocese（大主教（管辖）区）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{archenemy}{ˌɑ:tʃ'enəmi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archdiocese；archetype；archdeacon；archipelago；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 不共戴天的敌人，主要敌人 *arch (= chief)}
  \wordphrase{an archenemy（不共戴天的敌人，主要敌人）}
  \wordexample{an archenemy（不共戴天的敌人，主要敌人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{archetype}{'ɑ:kitaip}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archetypal（原型）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 原型 *arch (= chief)}
  \wordphrase{an archetype（原型）}
  \wordexample{an archetype（原型）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{archipelago}{ˌɑ:ki'peləgəu}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordsense{n. 群岛；有很多岛屿的海；（the A\textasciitilde{}）爱琴海 *arch (= chief), pelago (= sea)}
  \wordfamily{archetype}
  \wordfamily{architect}
  \wordfamily{archenemy}
  \wordfamily{architecture}
  \wordfamily{an archipelago（群岛）}
  \wordphrase{an archipelago（群岛）}
  \wordexample{an archipelago（群岛）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{architect}{'ɑ:kitekt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）；autarky（国家经济的自给自足 *aut<auto (= s）}
  \wordsense{n. 设计师；建筑师；《喻》缔造者 *arch (= chief), tect (= build, carpenter)}
  \wordphrase{naval architect（造船工程师）}
  \wordexample{the architect of one's own fortunes（自我命运的创造者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{architecture}{'ɑ:kitektʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）；autarky（国家经济的自给自足 *aut<auto (= s）}
  \wordsense{n. 建筑术；建筑学；建筑风格；结构，构造 *arch (= chief), tect (= build, carpenter)}
  \wordphrase{architecture of a novel（小说的结构）}
  \wordexample{architecture of a novel（小说的结构）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{architectural}{ˌɑ:ki'tektʃərəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{architecture；archaeology；architect；archaeologist；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{a. 建筑学的；建筑术的；建筑的 *arch (= chief), tect (= build, carpenter)}
  \wordphrase{architectural engineer（建筑工程师）}
  \wordexample{the architectural beauties of a city（城市的建筑美）}
  \wordexample{architectural engineer（建筑工程师）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{archaeology}{ˌɑ:ki'ɒlədʒi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archaeological（考古学的）；anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）}
  \wordsense{n. 考古学 *arch (= old), ology (= science)}
  \wordphrase{architectural engineer（建筑工程师）}
  \wordexample{the architectural beauties of a city（城市的建筑美）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{archaeologist}{ˌɑ:ki'ɒlədʒist}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archaeology；archaic；architectural；archives；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. 考古学者 *arch (= old)}
  \wordphrase{an archaeologist（考古学者）}
  \wordexample{an archaeologist（考古学者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{archaic}{ɑ:'keiik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{anarchy（无政府状态）；autarchy（独裁）；autarky（国家经济的自给自足 *aut<auto (= s）}
  \wordsense{a. 古老的；古式的；古体的 *arch (= old)}
  \wordphrase{be archaic（古老的）}
  \wordexample{be archaic（古老的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{archives}{'ɑ:kaivz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ARCH}
  \wordfamily{archivist（档案保管员）；sent（/ sens 和来自希腊语的 (a)）；esthes（/ (a)）；anarchy（无政府状态）}
  \wordsense{n. （pl.）档案室，案卷保管处；档案 *arch (= old)}
  \wordphrase{PATH, PAT, PASS 来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{archives** n.（pl.）档案室，案卷保管处；档案 *arch (= old)}
\end{word}



\chapter{PATH, PAT, PASS}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 path 意为 to feel, to suffer。来自拉丁语的 pat, pass 与其形态相似，含义相同。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 sent / sens 和来自希腊语的 (a)esthes / (a)esthet。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{apathy}{'æpəθi}
  \wordbreakdown{没有感觉 a<an (= not, without) + path (= feel, suffer)}
  \wordfamily{apathetic（冷淡的，漠不关心的）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）；empathy（共鸣）}
  \wordsense{n. 冷淡；漠不关心}
  \wordphrase{apathy their students exhibit}
  \wordexample{Many teachers complain of the apathy their students exhibit.（许多教师都对学生们表现出的冷漠表示不满。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{antipathy}{æn'tipəθi}
  \wordbreakdown{反对的感情 anti (= against, opposite) + path (= feel)}
  \wordfamily{antipathetic（生来厌恶的）；apathy（冷淡）；empathy（共鸣）}
  \wordsense{n. （强烈的）反感；引起反感的事物}
  \wordphrase{antipathy}
  \wordexample{The Vietnamese immigrants were victims of racial antipathy.（越南移民是种族反感的牺牲品。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{empathy}{'empəθi}
  \wordbreakdown{向里边吹入情感 em<en (= in) + path (= feel, suffer)}
  \wordsense{n. 共鸣；移情；同情}
  \wordfamily{antipathy}
  \wordfamily{compassion}
  \wordfamily{apathy}
  \wordfamily{compatible}
  \wordphrase{empathy for her plight}
  \wordexample{I feel a lot of empathy for her plight as a poor single mother.（我非常同情她这样一个贫穷的单身母亲遭遇的困境。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{compassion}{kəm'pæʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{一起感受痛苦 com (= together) + pass (= feel, suffer)}
  \wordfamily{compassionate（慈悲的）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{n. 怜悯，同情}
  \wordphrase{compassion}
  \wordexample{It's impossible to see images of starving children on television without compassion.（看到电视上那些饥饿的孩子，你不可能不产生同情心。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{compatible}{kəm'pætəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{一起想的 com (= together) + pat (= feel, suffer)}
  \wordfamily{compatibility（一致）；compatibly（协调地）；apathy（冷淡）}
  \wordsense{a. 一致的；可并立的；适合的}
  \wordphrase{compatible tastes}
  \wordexample{My wife and I don't have compatible tastes in food.（我妻子和我的饮食口味不一致。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{dispassionate}{dis'pæʃənət}
  \wordbreakdown{不偏重感情的 dis (= not) + pass (= feel, suffer)}
  \wordsense{a. 冷静的；不偏袒的，公平的}
  \wordfamily{dispassion 冷静；公平}
  \wordfamily{dispassionately 冷静地；公平地}
  \wordphrase{dispassionate in his rulings}
  \wordexample{Ideally, a judge will be dispassionate in his rulings.（理想地来说，法官在作出判决时应冷静客观。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{impassive}{im'pæsiv}
  \wordbreakdown{无感情的 im<in (= not) + pass (= feel, suffer)}
  \wordsense{a. 无感情的；无感觉的}
  \wordfamily{impassivity 冷淡；无知觉}
  \wordfamily{impassively 无感情地}
  \wordphrase{impassive as I tried}
  \wordexample{The policeman remained impassive as I tried to talk myself out of the ticket.（我试图说服警察不给我开罚单，但他一点儿也不为我所动。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{sympathy}{'simpəθi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{sympathetic；sympathize；telepathy；homeopathy；apathy（冷淡）}
  \wordsense{n. 同情，怜悯；赞同；支持 *sym<syn (= together)}
  \wordphrase{a man of wide sympathies（富有同情心的人）}
  \wordexample{a man of wide sympathies（富有同情心的人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{sympathetic}{ˌsimpə'θetik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{sympathy；sympathize；telepathy；homeopathy；apathy（冷淡）}
  \wordsense{a. 同情的，有同情心的；赞同的；支持的 *sym<syn (= together)}
  \wordphrase{sympathetic words（同情的话语）}
  \wordphrase{sympathetic mind（同情心）}
  \wordphrase{sympathetic strike（（声援其他罢工的）同情罢工）}
  \wordexample{sympathetic words（同情的话语）}
  \wordexample{sympathetic mind（同情心）}
  \wordexample{sympathetic strike（（声援其他罢工的）同情罢工）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{sympathize}{'simpəθaiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{sympathizer（同情者，（某种主义、政党等的）支持者）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{v. 同情；支持 *sym<syn (= together)}
  \wordphrase{to sympathize（同情）}
  \wordexample{to sympathize（同情）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{telepathy}{ti'lepəθi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{telepathist（传心术学者）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{n. 心灵感应；传心术 *tele (= far)}
  \wordphrase{a telepathy（心灵感应）}
  \wordexample{a telepathy（心灵感应）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{homeopathy}{ˌhəumi'ɒpəθi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{homeopath（顺势疗法医师）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{n. 顺势疗法（一种疾病治疗体系，以小剂量运用一种药物为基础，这种药物的大量服用可在健康人体内产生一种类似于疾病的症状） *homeo<homo (= same)}
  \wordphrase{a homeopathy（顺势疗法（一种疾病治疗体系，以小剂量运用一种药物为基础，这种药物的大量服用可在健康人体内产生一种类似于疾病的症状））}
  \wordexample{a homeopathy（顺势疗法（一种疾病治疗体系，以小剂量运用一种药物为基础，这种药物的大量服用可在健康人体内产生一种类似于疾病的症状））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{psychopath}{'saikəpæθ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{psychopathic（精神病的，患有精神病的）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{n. 精神病患者 *psycho (= mind)}
  \wordphrase{a psychopath（精神病患者）}
  \wordexample{a psychopath（精神病患者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pathetic}{pə'θetik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordsense{a. 可怜的；情感的}
  \wordfamily{psychopath}
  \wordfamily{pathos}
  \wordfamily{homeopathy}
  \wordfamily{pathology}
  \wordphrase{pathetic fallacy（感情误置（通过想像赋予无生命物以生命或人的情感））}
  \wordphrase{pathetic story（悲伤的故事）}
  \wordphrase{pathetic scene（哀伤的场面）}
  \wordphrase{pathetic ignorance（可怜的无知）}
  \wordexample{pathetic fallacy（感情误置（通过想像赋予无生命物以生命或人的情感））}
  \wordexample{pathetic story（悲伤的故事）}
  \wordexample{pathetic scene（哀伤的场面）}
  \wordexample{pathetic ignorance（可怜的无知）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pathos}{'peiθɒs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordsense{n.（言语、作品中）引起怜悯的因素；怜悯}
  \wordfamily{pathetic}
  \wordfamily{pathology}
  \wordfamily{psychopath}
  \wordfamily{incompatible}
  \wordfamily{a pathos（引起怜悯的因素）}
  \wordphrase{a pathos（引起怜悯的因素）}
  \wordexample{a pathos（引起怜悯的因素）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pathology}{pə'θɒlədʒi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{pathologist（病理学者）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{n. 病理学 *ology (= science)}
  \wordphrase{a pathology（病理学）}
  \wordexample{a pathology（病理学）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{incompatible}{ˌinkəm'pætəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{incompatibility（不相容）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{a. 不能同时成立的，不相容的，矛盾的 *in (= not), com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{be incompatible（不能同时成立的，不相容的，矛盾的）}
  \wordexample{be incompatible（不能同时成立的，不相容的，矛盾的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{impassioned}{im'pæʃnd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{incompatible；impatient；pathology；impatience；apathy（冷淡）}
  \wordsense{a. 充满激情的；激烈的 *im<in (= into)}
  \wordphrase{impassioned speech（慷慨激昂的演讲）}
  \wordexample{impassioned speech（慷慨激昂的演讲）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{impatient}{im'peiʃnt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{impatiently（性急地，焦急地，焦躁地）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{a. 没有耐心的，焦急的，性急的 *im<in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{be impatient（没有耐心的，焦急的，性急的）}
  \wordexample{be impatient（没有耐心的，焦急的，性急的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{impatience}{im'peiʃns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{impatient；passion；impassioned；passionate；apathy（冷淡）}
  \wordsense{n. 急躁，无耐心；焦急，焦躁 *im<in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{an impatience（急躁，无耐心）}
  \wordexample{an impatience（急躁，无耐心）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{passion}{'pæʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）；empathy（共鸣）}
  \wordsense{n. 热情；（爱情、憎恶、愤怒等）强烈情感；激情；情欲；（the P\textasciitilde{}）耶稣的受难记}
  \wordphrase{a passion（热情）}
  \wordexample{a passion（热情）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{passionate}{'pæʃənət}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{passionately（热情地）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{a. 热情的；热烈的}
  \wordphrase{passionate nature（热情的天性）}
  \wordphrase{passionate advocate of democracy（民主主义的强烈拥护者）}
  \wordexample{passionate nature（热情的天性）}
  \wordexample{passionate advocate of democracy（民主主义的强烈拥护者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{passive}{'pæsiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordsense{a. 被动的，消极的；顺从的}
  \wordfamily{passivity（被动，消极（性）；不抵抗）}
  \wordphrase{passive obedience（无条件服从）}
  \wordphrase{passive resistance（消极的抵抗）}
  \wordphrase{passive resister（消极的抵抗者）}
  \wordexample{passive obedience（无条件服从）}
  \wordexample{passive resistance（消极的抵抗）}
  \wordexample{passive resister（消极的抵抗者）}

\begin{word}[***]{patience}{'peiʃns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordsense{n. 耐心；忍耐（力）}
  \wordfamily{passive}
  \wordfamily{patient}
  \wordfamily{passionate}

  \wordfamily{a patience（耐心）}
  \wordphrase{a patience（耐心）}

\begin{word}[***]{patient}{'peiʃnt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PATH, PAT, PASS}
  \wordfamily{patiently（有耐心地，有毅力地）；apathy（冷淡）；antipathy（（强烈的）反感）}
  \wordsense{a. 有耐心的；有忍耐力的}
  \wordphrase{MNE, MNES, MEM(OR) 来自希腊语的}
