\chapter{MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 mne, mnes 意为 to remember。此外，来自拉丁语的 mem(or) 也有相似的含义。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{amnesty}{'æmnəsti}
  \wordbreakdown{不记得犯过什么罪 a<an (= not, without) + mne (= remember)}
  \wordsense{n. 特赦，大赦}
  \wordfamily{amnesia}
  \wordfamily{mnemonic}
  \wordfamily{mnemonics}
  \wordfamily{commemorate}
  \wordphrase{amnesty by President Carter}
  \wordexample{Vietnam War draft dodgers were granted an amnesty by President Carter.（卡特总统赦免了越南战争期间逃避兵役的人。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{amnesia}{æm'ni:zjə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{mnemonic；mnemonics；commemorate；commemoration；amnesty（特赦）}
  \wordsense{n. 遗忘（症），记忆缺失 *a<an (= without, not)}
  \wordphrase{an amnesia（遗忘（症），记忆缺失）}
  \wordexample{an amnesia（遗忘（症），记忆缺失）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{mnemonic}{ni:'mɒnik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{a. 有助于记忆的}
  \wordfamily{amnesia}
  \wordfamily{mnemonics}
  \wordfamily{commemorate}
  \wordfamily{commemoration}
  \wordfamily{be mnemonic（有助于记忆的）}
  \wordphrase{be mnemonic（有助于记忆的）}
  \wordexample{be mnemonic（有助于记忆的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{mnemonics}{ni:'mɒniks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{n. 记忆术}
  \wordfamily{mnemonic}
  \wordfamily{commemorate}
  \wordfamily{amnesia}
  \wordfamily{commemoration}
  \wordfamily{a mnemonics（记忆术）}
  \wordphrase{a mnemonics（记忆术）}
  \wordexample{a mnemonics（记忆术）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{commemorate}{kə'meməreit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{mnemonics；commemoration；mnemonic；commemorative；amnesty（特赦）}
  \wordsense{v. 纪念（人、事件）；（物品等）成为……的纪念 *com (= with, together)}
  \wordphrase{monument to commemorate the victory（纪念胜利的纪念碑）}
  \wordexample{monument to commemorate the victory（纪念胜利的纪念碑）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{commemoration}{kəˌmemə'reiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{commemorate；commemorative；mnemonics；memento；amnesty（特赦）}
  \wordsense{n. 纪念；纪念仪式 *com (= with, together)}
  \wordphrase{in commemoration of（纪念……）}
  \wordexample{in commemoration of（纪念……）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{commemorative}{kə'memərətiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{commemoration；memento；commemorate；memo；amnesty（特赦）}
  \wordsense{a. 纪念的 *com (= with, together)}
  \wordphrase{commemorative stamps / medals（纪念邮票 / 纪念奖章）}
  \wordexample{commemorative stamps / medals（纪念邮票 / 纪念奖章）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{memento}{mə'mentəu}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{n. 纪念物，引起回忆的东西}
  \wordfamily{commemorative}
  \wordfamily{memo}
  \wordfamily{commemoration}
  \wordfamily{memoir}
  \wordfamily{a memento（纪念物，引起回忆的东西）}
  \wordphrase{a memento（纪念物，引起回忆的东西）}
  \wordexample{a memento（纪念物，引起回忆的东西）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{memo}{'meməu}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{memento；memoir；commemorative；memorable；amnesty（特赦）}
  \wordsense{n. （memorandum 的简略形式）备忘录，便笺}
  \wordphrase{a memo（备忘录，便笺）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a memo".（常见搭配：备忘录，便笺。）}
  \wordsense{v. 记录，向……提交备忘录}
  \wordphrase{a memo（备忘录，便笺）}
  \wordexample{a memo（备忘录，便笺）}
  \wordexample{to memo（记录，向……提交备忘录）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{memoir}{'memwɑ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{n. 传记，传略；（pl.）自传，回忆录}
  \wordfamily{war memoirs（战争回忆录）}
  \wordfamily{a memoir（传记，传略）}
  \wordphrase{a memoir（传记，传略）}
  \wordexample{a memoir（传记，传略）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{memorable}{'memərəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{a. 值得怀念的}
  \wordfamily{memoir}
  \wordfamily{memorandum}
  \wordfamily{memo}
  \wordfamily{memorial}
  \wordfamily{be memorable（值得怀念的）}
  \wordphrase{be memorable（值得怀念的）}
  \wordexample{be memorable（值得怀念的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{memorandum}{ˌmemə'rændəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{n. 备忘录，便笺；外交备忘录；【商】代销委托书；【律】交易备忘录}
  \wordfamily{memorable}
  \wordfamily{memorial}
  \wordfamily{memoir}
  \wordfamily{memorize}
  \wordfamily{a memorandum（备忘录，便笺）}
  \wordphrase{a memorandum（备忘录，便笺）}
  \wordexample{a memorandum（备忘录，便笺）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{memorial}{mə'mɔ:riəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{amnesty（特赦）；amnesia（遗忘（症））；mnemonic（有助于记忆的）}
  \wordsense{n. 纪念碑；纪念馆；纪念物；（pl.）（历史的）记录；编年史}
  \wordphrase{Lincoln Memorial（林肯纪念馆）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "Lincoln Memorial".（常见搭配：林肯纪念馆。）}
  \wordsense{a. 纪念的；追悼的}
  \wordphrase{memorial to the dead（纪念死者的纪念碑）}
  \wordphrase{Memorial Day（《韩》显忠日；《美》阵亡将士纪念日）}
  \wordphrase{memorial park（陵园）}
  \wordexample{memorial to the dead（纪念死者的纪念碑）}
  \wordexample{Memorial Day（《韩》显忠日；《美》阵亡将士纪念日）}
  \wordexample{memorial park（陵园）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{memorize}{'meməraiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordsense{v. 背诵，记忆}
  \wordfamily{memorial}
  \wordfamily{memory}
  \wordfamily{memorandum}
  \wordfamily{memorable}
  \wordfamily{to memorize（背诵，记忆）}
  \wordphrase{to memorize（背诵，记忆）}
  \wordexample{to memorize（背诵，记忆）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{memory}{'meməri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MNE, MNES, MEM(OR)}
  \wordfamily{MORPH（来自希腊语的）；amnesty（特赦）；amnesia（遗忘（症））}
  \wordsense{n. 记忆，记忆力；回忆，回想}
  \wordphrase{have a good / bad (poor)}
  \wordphrase{memories of childhood（童年的回忆）}
  \wordphrase{memory bank（存储体，数据总库）}
  \wordexample{have a good / bad (poor)}
  \wordexample{memories of childhood（童年的回忆）}
  \wordexample{memory bank（存储体，数据总库）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MORPH}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 morph 意为 form。同义词根为 form。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{amorphous}{ə'mɔ:fəs}
  \wordbreakdown{没有形状的 a<an (= not, without) + morph (= form)}
  \wordfamily{nebula（(exploding star)）；anthropomorphism（拟人论）；metamorphose（（使）变形）}
  \wordsense{a. 无定形的；无一定方向（或目的）的；无组织的}
  \wordphrase{amorphous cloud}
  \wordexample{often leaves an amorphous cloud of dust and gas.（星云（爆炸的恒星）往往留下由灰尘和气体组成的不定形云体。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{anthropomorphism}{ˌænθrəpə'mɔ:fizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MORPH}
  \wordfamily{metamorphose；metamorphosis；morpheme；morphology；amorphous（无定形的）}
  \wordsense{n. 拟人论，拟人观 *anthrop (= man)}
  \wordphrase{an anthropomorphism（拟人论，拟人观）}
  \wordexample{an anthropomorphism（拟人论，拟人观）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{metamorphose}{ˌmetə'mɔ:fəuz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MORPH}
  \wordfamily{anthropomorphism；metamorphosis；morpheme；morphology；amorphous（无定形的）}
  \wordsense{v. （使）变形；【地】（使）变质 *meta (= change)}
  \wordphrase{metamorphose the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of metamorphose.（此处展示 metamorphose 的常见用法。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{metamorphosis}{ˌmetə'mɔ:fəsis}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MORPH}
  \wordfamily{metamorphose；morpheme；anthropomorphism；morphology；amorphous（无定形的）}
  \wordsense{n. 变形；质变；【生】变态；（外貌、性格或环境等的）彻底（或显著）的变化 *meta (= change)}
  \wordphrase{the metamorphosis}
  \wordexample{the metamorphosis in the life of an insect（昆虫的变态）}
  \wordexample{the social metamorphosis that has occurred in South Korea（在韩国发生的显著的社会变化）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{morpheme}{'mɔ:fi:m}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MORPH}
  \wordsense{n.【语】语素，词素}
  \wordfamily{metamorphosis}
  \wordfamily{morphology}
  \wordfamily{metamorphose}
  \wordfamily{anthropomorphism}
  \wordfamily{a morpheme（语素，词素）}
  \wordphrase{a morpheme（语素，词素）}
  \wordexample{a morpheme（语素，词素）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{morphology}{mɔ:'fɒlədʒi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MORPH}
  \wordfamily{morpheme；metamorphosis；metamorphose；anthropomorphism；amorphous（无定形的）}
  \wordsense{n. 【生】形态学；【语】形态学；形态}
  \wordphrase{a morphology（形态学）}
  \wordexample{a morphology（形态学）}
\end{word}



\chapter{TROPH}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 troph 意为 to nourish。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 nutri, al。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{atrophy}{'ætrəfi}
  \wordbreakdown{没有营养 a<an (= not, without) + troph (= nourishment)}
  \wordfamily{dystrophy；hypertrophy；morphology（生】形态学）}
  \wordsense{n. 萎缩；衰退}
  \wordphrase{the atrophy}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of atrophy.（此处展示 atrophy 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. （使）萎缩}
  \wordphrase{atrophy after their paralysis}
  \wordexample{Quadriplegics often experience muscular atrophy after their paralysis.（四肢瘫痪者在瘫痪以后肌肉往往也会萎缩。）}
  \wordexample{atrophy after their paralysis}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{dystrophy}{'distrəfi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TROPH}
  \wordfamily{hypertrophy；atrophy（萎缩）；morphology（生】形态学）}
  \wordsense{n. 营养失调 *dys (= bad, badly)}
  \wordphrase{a dystrophy（营养失调）}
  \wordexample{a dystrophy（营养失调）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{hypertrophy}{hai'pə:trəfi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TROPH}
  \wordfamily{dystrophy；atrophy（萎缩）；morphology（生】形态学）}
  \wordsense{n. （因营养过剩等而引起的）【生】肥大 *hyper (= excessive)}
  \wordphrase{a hypertrophy（【生】肥大）}
  \wordexample{a hypertrophy（【生】肥大）}
\end{word}



\chapter{GNO[GN, N]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 gno 意为 to know。其变形为 gn, n。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 not, sci。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{agnostic}{æg'nɒstik}
  \wordbreakdown{认为无法了解神是否存在的人 a<an (= not) + gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{agnosticism（不可知论）；agnostics；ignoble（卑劣的）}
  \wordsense{n. 不可知论者}
  \wordphrase{an agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "an agnostic".（常见搭配：不可知论者。）}
  \wordsense{a. 不可知论的}
  \wordphrase{agnostics}
  \wordexample{Many currently religious people were once agnostics.（现在有宗教信仰的人中有很多曾经是不可知论者。）}
  \wordexample{agnostics}
  \wordexample{an agnostic（不可知论者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{ignoble}{ig'nəubl}
  \wordbreakdown{无法了解的 i<in (= not) + gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{ignobly（卑贱地）；agnostic（不可知论者）；ignominious（可耻的）}
  \wordsense{a. 卑劣的，不光彩的；（出身或身份）卑微的}
  \wordphrase{ignoble end}
  \wordexample{The Taliban in Afghanistan met an ignoble end at the hands of the USA.（阿富汗塔利班组织在美国手里落了个不光彩的下场。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{ignominious}{ˌignə'miniəs}
  \wordbreakdown{无法了解的 i<in (= not) + gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{ignominy（耻辱）；agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）}
  \wordsense{a. 可耻的；不光彩的}
  \wordphrase{ignominious hovel}
  \wordexample{I grew up in an ignominious hovel in Haiti.（我在海地的一间简陋的小屋里长大。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{cognizant}{'kɒgnizənt}
  \wordbreakdown{完全知道的 co<com (= thoroughly) + gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{cognizance（察觉）；agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）}
  \wordsense{a. 认识到的}
  \wordphrase{cognizant of police corruption}
  \wordexample{The mayor was cognizant of police corruption, but did nothing.（市长明知警察腐败，却没有采取任何措施。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{incognito}{ˌinkɒg'ni:təu}
  \wordbreakdown{使完全不知道 in (= not) + co<com (= thoroughly) + gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{cognizant；connoisseur；ignominious；reconnaissance；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{a. 隐姓埋名的，化名的；秘密的}
  \wordphrase{be incognito}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of incognito.（此处展示 incognito 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{ad. 隐姓埋名地；化名地}
  \wordphrase{incognito on their vacations}
  \wordexample{Famous movie stars often travel incognito on their vacations.（电影明星们在休假时常常化名旅行。）}
  \wordexample{incognito on their vacations}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{connoisseur}{ˌkɒnə'sɜ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{完全知道的人 con<com (= thoroughly) + n<gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{connoisseurship（鉴赏力）；鉴赏家（身份）；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{n. 鉴定人，鉴赏家；专家}
  \wordphrase{connoisseur of chocolate}
  \wordexample{As a certified chocoholic, I consider myself a connoisseur of chocolate.（大家都知道我酷爱巧克力，我认为自己是个巧克力专家。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{reconnaissance}{ri'kɒnisəns}
  \wordbreakdown{再一次完整地知道 re (= again) + con<com (= thoroughly) + n<gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordfamily{reconnoiter（侦查）；agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）}
  \wordsense{n. 侦查；勘察，事先考察}
  \wordphrase{reconnaissance squadron}
  \wordexample{I served with a reconnaissance squadron in the Vietnam War.（越战期间我在侦查队服役。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{prognosticate}{prɒg'nɒstikeit}
  \wordbreakdown{事先、提前知道 pro (= before) + gno (= know)}
  \wordsense{vt. 预言，预知，预测}
  \wordfamily{prognosis 预知；【医】预后（对疾病发展状况的预见）}
  \wordfamily{prognostication 预测，预言，预知；前兆，征候}
  \wordfamily{prognosticator 预言家，预报者，占卜师}
  \wordfamily{prognostic 预后的；表现出征兆的；（n.）前兆；预测；预后}
  \wordphrase{prognosticating the hurricane's arrival}
  \wordexample{The meteorologists are prognosticating the hurricane's arrival for tomorrow morning.（气象学家预测明天早晨台风会到达。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{diagnose}{'daiəgnəuz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{diagnosis；diagnostic；physiognomy；ignorance；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{v. 诊断疾病 *dia (= through)}
  \wordphrase{to diagnose（诊断疾病）}
  \wordexample{to diagnose（诊断疾病）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{diagnosis}{ˌdaiəg'nəusis}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{diagnose；diagnostic；physiognomy；ignorance；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{n. 诊断；诊断的结果，诊断书 *dia (= through)}
  \wordphrase{a diagnosis（诊断）}
  \wordexample{a diagnosis（诊断）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{diagnostic}{ˌdaiəg'nɒstik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）；ignominious（可耻的）}
  \wordsense{a. 诊断的 *dia (= through)}
  \wordphrase{diagnostic test（诊断测试）}
  \wordexample{symptoms that were of little diagnostic value（对诊断没什么帮助的症状）}
  \wordexample{diagnostic test（诊断测试）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{physiognomy}{ˌfizi'ɒnəmi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{diagnostic；ignorance；diagnosis；ignorant；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{n. 观相术；面相；外貌，地貌 *physi (= nature)}
  \wordphrase{a physiognomy（观相术）}
  \wordexample{a physiognomy（观相术）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{ignorance}{'ignərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{physiognomy；ignorant；diagnostic；ignore；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{n. 无知，不学无术 *i<in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{the ignorance}
  \wordexample{Ignorance is bliss.（无知便是福。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{ignorant}{'ignərənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）；ignominious（可耻的）}
  \wordsense{a. 无知的，不学无术的；不知道的 *i<in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{be ignorant（无知的，不学无术的）}
  \wordexample{be ignorant（无知的，不学无术的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{ignore}{ig'nɔ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{ignorant；cognition；ignorance；cognomen；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{v. （有意地）忽视，不理会；【律】（因证据不足而）驳回诉讼 *i<in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{to ignore（忽视，不理会）}
  \wordexample{to ignore（忽视，不理会）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{cognition}{kɒg'niʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{cognitive（认识的，认知的）；agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）}
  \wordsense{n. 认识，认知；知识 *co<com (= together), gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordphrase{a cognition（认识，认知）}
  \wordexample{a cognition（认识，认知）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{cognomen}{kɒg'nəumen}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{cognition；precognition；ignore；recognize；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{n. 姓；绰号 *co<com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{a cognomen（姓）}
  \wordexample{a cognomen（姓）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{precognition}{ˌpri:kɒg'niʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{cognomen；recognize；cognition；recognition；agnostic（不可知论者）}
  \wordsense{n. 预知，先知 *pre (= before), co<com (= together), gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordphrase{a precognition（预知，先知）}
  \wordexample{a precognition（预知，先知）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{recognize}{'rekəgnaiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）；ignominious（可耻的）}
  \wordsense{v. 认出，看出；认可，承认 *re (= again), co<com (= together), gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordphrase{to recognize（认出，看出）}
  \wordexample{to recognize（认出，看出）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{recognition}{ˌrekəg'niʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）；ignominious（可耻的）}
  \wordsense{n. 认可，承认；认识；报偿 *re (= again), co<com (= together), gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordphrase{in recognition of his services（给他的服务以报酬）}
  \wordphrase{recognition of the new state（承认这个新国家）}
  \wordexample{in recognition of his services（给他的服务以报酬）}
  \wordexample{recognition of the new state（承认这个新国家）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{recognizance}{ri'kɒgnizəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GNO[GN, N]}
  \wordfamily{ESTHES（来自希腊语的 (a)）；agnostic（不可知论者）；ignoble（卑劣的）}
  \wordsense{n. 【律】具结；保证金 *re (= again), co<com (= together), gn<gno (= know)}
  \wordphrase{enter into recognizances（具结）}
  \wordphrase{sent / sens, pat / pass 和来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{enter into recognizances（具结）}
\end{word}



\chapter{(A)ESTHET, (A)ESTHES}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自希腊语的 (a)esthet, (a)esthes 意为 to feel。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 sent / sens, pat / pass 和来自希腊语的 path。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{anesthesiologist}{ˌænəsθizi'ɒlədʒist}
  \wordbreakdown{使变得没有感觉的人 an (= not, without) + esthes (= feel)}
  \wordfamily{anesthetize（使麻醉）；anesthesia（麻醉）；anesthetist（麻醉师）；anesthesiology（麻醉学）；anesthetic（麻醉的）；aesthetic（standards（审美标准） (a)）；estheticism（唯美主义）}
  \wordsense{n. 麻醉师}
  \wordphrase{aesthetic person（有审美眼光的人）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "aesthetic person".（常见搭配：有审美眼光的人。）}
  \wordsense{a. 审美的；（人）有审美感的}
  \wordphrase{Anesthesiologists prevent surgical patients}
  \wordexample{Anesthesiologists prevent surgical patients from feeling discomfort.（麻醉科医生使手术患者避免感到疼痛。） (a)}
  \wordexample{Anesthesiologists prevent surgical patients}
  \wordexample{an anesthesiologist（麻醉师）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MENT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 ment 意为 mind。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{commentary}{ˈkɒməntri}
  \wordbreakdown{带有意见 com (= with) + ment (= mind)}
  \wordsense{n. 评论，批评；意见，见解；注释}
  \wordfamily{comment 注释，给……做注解；评论，提出意见}
  \wordfamily{commentator 注释者；时事评论者；实况播音员}
  \wordphrase{commentary to the class}
  \wordexample{After reading the book, please give your commentary to the class.（读完这本书之后，跟同学们谈谈你的见解。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{demented}{diˈmentid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MENT}
  \wordfamily{mental；mentally；mentality；mentor；commentary（评论）}
  \wordsense{a. 疯狂的，狂乱的 *de (= away)}
  \wordphrase{be demented}
  \wordexample{poor, demented creature（可怜又疯狂的人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{mental}{ˈmentl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MENT}
  \wordsense{a. 内心的，精神的；精神病的}
  \wordfamily{demented}
  \wordfamily{mentally}
  \wordfamily{mentality}
  \wordfamily{mentor}
  \wordphrase{mental age（智力年龄）}
  \wordphrase{mental arithmetic（心算）}
  \wordphrase{mental deficiency（智力缺陷）}
  \wordexample{mental age（智力年龄）}
  \wordexample{mental arithmetic（心算）}
  \wordexample{mental deficiency（智力缺陷）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{mentally}{ˈmentəli}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MENT}
  \wordsense{ad. 精神地，内心地}
  \wordfamily{mental}
  \wordfamily{mentality}
  \wordfamily{demented}
  \wordfamily{mentor}
  \wordphrase{mentally deficient / defective（智力缺陷的）}
  \wordphrase{mentally deranged（疯狂的）}
  \wordexample{mentally deficient / defective（智力缺陷的）}
  \wordexample{mentally deranged（疯狂的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{mentality}{menˈtæləti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MENT}
  \wordfamily{commentary（评论）；demented（疯狂的）；mental（内心的）}
  \wordsense{n. 智力；精神；心理}
  \wordphrase{persons of average mentality（智力一般的人）}
  \wordphrase{good-guy-bad-guy mentality（认为世上只存在善恶之分而不存在半善半恶的思考方式）}
  \wordexample{persons of average mentality（智力一般的人）}
  \wordexample{good-guy-bad-guy mentality（认为世上只存在善恶之分而不存在半善半恶的思考方式）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{mentor}{ˈmentɔ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MENT}
  \wordfamily{mentality；mentally；mental；demented；commentary（评论）}
  \wordsense{n. 私人教师；良师益友；（M\textasciitilde{}）奥德修斯（Odysseus）儿子的良师}
  \wordphrase{a mentor（私人教师）}
  \wordexample{a mentor（私人教师）}
\end{word}



\chapter{PACT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 pact 意为 to fasten, to agree。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 fix。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{compact}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PACT；用力抽绷、勒紧 com (= intensive) + pact (= fasten, agree)；ˈkɒmpækt；a}
  \wordfamily{impact（影响）；pact（契约）；mentor（私人教师）}
  \wordsense{n. 契约；小粉盒}
  \wordphrase{kəmˈpækt] a}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of compact.（此处展示 compact 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. （汽车）小型的；（房子）小的；紧凑的；简洁的}
  \wordphrase{be compact}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of compact.（此处展示 compact 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 压紧；塞满}
  \wordphrase{compact the issue}
  \wordexample{It's a compact but comfortable studio apartment.（这是一处小而舒适的一室公寓。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{impact}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PACT；使劲儿系紧、抽紧 im<in (= intensive) + pact (= fasten, agree)；ˈimpækt}
  \wordfamily{compact（契约）；pact（契约）；mentor（私人教师）}
  \wordsense{n. 影响；冲突，冲击}
  \wordphrase{the impact}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of impact.（此处展示 impact 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 填满；冲击}
  \wordphrase{impact on me that}
  \wordexample{The appeal had such an impact on me that I contributed 100 dollars.（该呼吁给我以强烈的冲击，我捐献了100美元。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pact}{pækt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PACT}
  \wordfamily{fold（的）；compact（契约）；impact（影响）}
  \wordsense{n. 契约，协定，条约}
  \wordphrase{the Pact of Locarno（洛迦诺公约）}
  \wordexample{the Pact of Locarno（洛迦诺公约）}
\end{word}



\chapter{PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 ple, plet, pli, ply, plen 意为 to fill, full。此外，意为 to fold 的 plic, ply, pli, plex, plo 等与这些词根形态相似，注意不要混淆。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{compliant}{kəmˈplaiənt}
  \wordbreakdown{完全满足对方的心情的 com (= thoroughly) + pli (= fill)}
  \wordsense{a. 服从的，顺从的}
  \wordfamily{compliance / compliancy 顺从}
  \wordfamily{comply 依从，顺从}
  \wordphrase{compliant personality}
  \wordexample{She has quite a compliant personality.（她的个性很温顺。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{complement}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN；完全添满 com (= intensive) + ple (= fill)；ˈkɒmplimənt；ˈkɒmpliment}
  \wordfamily{complementary（补充的）；compliant（服从的）；implement（工具）}
  \wordsense{n. 补充（物）；【语】补语}
  \wordphrase{the complement}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of complement.（此处展示 complement 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 补充，补足}
  \wordphrase{complements seafood is outdated}
  \wordexample{The belief that white wine invariably complements seafood is outdated.（认为吃海鲜总是要配上白葡萄酒的想法已经过时了。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{implement}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN；把……里面填满 im<in (= in) + ple (= fill)；ˈimplimənt；ˈimpliment}
  \wordfamily{implementation（履行）；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{n. 工具；手段}
  \wordphrase{the implement}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of implement.（此处展示 implement 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 履行（协定、约定等）；实行}
  \wordphrase{implemented in stages starting}
  \wordexample{The plan will be implemented in stages, starting next week.（此计划下周开始分阶段实行。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{supplement}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN；在下面填满 sup<sub (= under) + ple (= fill)；ˈsʌplimənt；ˈsʌpliment；vt sth +}
  \wordfamily{supplementary（补充的，追加的）；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{n. 补充，增补；补充物；附录；增刊}
  \wordphrase{ˈsʌpliment] vt sth +}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of supplement.（此处展示 supplement 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. sth + with + sth 补充}
  \wordphrase{supplement the issue}
  \wordexample{Most breakfast cereals contain a host of vitamin and mineral supplements.（大部分的早餐谷物食品中都含有大量的维生素和矿物质添加剂。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{deplete}{diˈpli:t}
  \wordbreakdown{对“装满”的轻微否定 de (= reverse) + plet (= fill)}
  \wordfamily{depletion（消耗）；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{vt. 用尽；使枯竭}
  \wordphrase{deplete calcium}
  \wordexample{Some cancer medications severely deplete calcium in bones.（一些治疗癌症的药物会使骨骼中钙的含量迅速减少。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{replete}{riˈpli:t}
  \wordbreakdown{完全填满的 re (= intensive) + plet (= fill)}
  \wordfamily{repletion（充满）；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{a. 充满的；充实的；饱食的}
  \wordphrase{replete with all the}
  \wordexample{The shelter gave the men a Christmas dinner replete with all the trimmings.（那个避难所用各种食物拼配而成的丰盛的圣诞晚餐招待了那些人。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{replenish}{riˈpleniʃ}
  \wordbreakdown{重新填满 re (= again) + plen (= fill)}
  \wordsense{vt. 再装满；重新补充}
  \wordfamily{replete}
  \wordfamily{plenary}
  \wordfamily{deplete}
  \wordfamily{compliment}
  \wordphrase{replenish supplies}
  \wordexample{It's your responsibility to inventory and replenish supplies.（你的责任是盘点和补充库存。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{plenary}{ˈpli:nəri}
  \wordbreakdown{与填充的事物相关的 plen (= fill)}
  \wordfamily{plenarily（完全地）；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{a. 完全的，充分的；绝对的；（会议）全体出席的}
  \wordphrase{plenary session}
  \wordexample{A vote was held at the plenary session of the city council.（在市议会的全体会议上进行了投票。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{compliment}{ˈkɒmplimənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{Vocabulary（Workshop 一书））；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{n. 称赞，赞扬；敬意；表示敬意；（pl.）祝词}
  \wordphrase{the compliment}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of compliment.（此处展示 compliment 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 恭维，称赞；向……赠送（某物）以表示敬意 *com (= with, together)}
  \wordphrase{pay a compliment（称赞）}
  \wordphrase{With the author's compliments（著者谨赠，惠存）}
  \wordphrase{compliment her with Vocabulary Workshop（向她赠送}
  \wordexample{give / present / send my compliments to your father（向你父亲致意）}
  \wordexample{With the compliments of the season（祝贺佳节〈圣诞节、新年等节日时的问候语〉）}
  \wordexample{compliment her on her new snowboard（称赞她的新滑雪板）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{complimentary}{ˌkɒmpliˈmentri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{compliment；supply；complete；completion；compliant（服从的）}
  \wordsense{a. 称赞的，赞美的；表示敬意的；免费赠送的 *com (= with, together)}
  \wordphrase{complimentary address（祝词）}
  \wordexample{complimentary copy / ticket / dinner（赠送本 / 优待券、招待券 / （飞机上为顾客提供的）免费餐）}
  \wordexample{complimentary address（祝词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{supply}{səˈplai}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））；implement（工具）}
  \wordsense{v. 供给（所需或所要求的物品），提供；满足（需求）}
  \wordphrase{medical supplies（医药用品）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "medical supplies".（常见搭配：医药用品。）}
  \wordsense{n. 供给，供应；供应品；军粮补给品；储备物资；（个人的）生活费；代课教师 *sup<sub (= under)}
  \wordphrase{supply and demand（供求）}
  \wordphrase{supplies in our reservoir（我们水库里的储备水）}
  \wordphrase{supply teacher（代课教师）}
  \wordexample{supply and demand（供求）}
  \wordexample{supplies in our reservoir（我们水库里的储备水）}
  \wordexample{supply teacher（代课教师）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{complete}{kəmˈpli:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{completely（完全地，彻底地）；compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））}
  \wordsense{a. 完全的，全部的，完整的；彻底的}
  \wordphrase{be complete}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of complete.（此处展示 complete 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 结束，完成；使完整 *com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{complete failure（彻底失败）}
  \wordphrase{complete stranger（完全不认识的人）}
  \wordphrase{complete works of Shakespeare（莎士比亚全集）}
  \wordexample{complete failure（彻底失败）}
  \wordexample{complete stranger（完全不认识的人）}
  \wordexample{complete works of Shakespeare（莎士比亚全集）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{completion}{kəmˈpli:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））；implement（工具）}
  \wordsense{n. 完成，结束；（目的的）达成；【经】（销售契约手续的）正式完成 *com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{on completion of contract（完成合同手续后）}
  \wordexample{on completion of contract（完成合同手续后）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{expletive}{ikˈspli:tiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{completion；plethora；complete；plenipotentiary；compliant（服从的）}
  \wordsense{a. 附加的，填补的 *ex (= out)}
  \wordphrase{be expletive（附加的，填补的）}
  \wordexample{be expletive（附加的，填补的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{plethora}{ˈpleθərə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordsense{n. 过多，过剩；【医】多血症}
  \wordfamily{expletive}
  \wordfamily{plenipotentiary}
  \wordfamily{completion}
  \wordfamily{plenitude}
  \wordfamily{a plethora（过多，过剩）}
  \wordphrase{a plethora（过多，过剩）}
  \wordexample{a plethora（过多，过剩）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{plenipotentiary}{ˌplenipəˈtenʃəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））；implement（工具）}
  \wordsense{n. 全权大使}
  \wordphrase{minister plenipotentiary（全权公使）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "minister plenipotentiary".（常见搭配：全权公使。）}
  \wordsense{a. 有全权的 *pot (= capable of, powerful)}
  \wordphrase{ambassador extraordinary and plenipotentiary（特命全权大使）}
  \wordexample{ambassador extraordinary and plenipotentiary（特命全权大使）}
  \wordexample{a plenipotentiary（全权大使）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{plenitude}{ˈplenitju:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLE, PLET, PLI, PLY, PLEN}
  \wordfamily{compliant（服从的）；complement（补充（物））；implement（工具）}
  \wordsense{n. 充分；丰富}
  \wordphrase{the plenitude}
  \wordexample{in the plenitude of his powers（在他权力鼎盛之时）}
\end{word}



\chapter{PRESS}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 press 意为 to press。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{compress}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS；一起按 com (= together) + press (= press)；ˈkɒmpres}
  \wordfamily{compression（压缩）；compressor（压缩机）；compressed（压缩的）；compressible（可压缩的）}
  \wordsense{n. 湿敷布，压布}
  \wordphrase{the compress}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of compress.（此处展示 compress 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 压缩；压紧；概括}
  \wordphrase{compress a flower between}
  \wordexample{You can compress a flower between the pages of a book.（可以把花夹压在书页中间。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{expressly}{ikˈspresli}
  \wordbreakdown{挤压出外边 ex (= out) + press (= press)}
  \wordfamily{expression（表达，措辞）；expressionism（表现主义）；expressive（表现的）；expressionless（无表情的）；express（表达，表示）；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{ad. 明白地，清楚地；特别地，特意地}
  \wordphrase{expressly created}
  \wordexample{The web site was expressly created to support recently widowed women.（那个网站是为支持那些刚刚失去丈夫的女性们特别制作的。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{oppress}{əˈpres}
  \wordbreakdown{逆着某物压 op<ob (= against, intensive) + press (= press)}
  \wordsense{vt. 压迫，压制；使（心情）沉重}
  \wordfamily{oppression 压制，压抑}
  \wordfamily{oppressor 压制者}
  \wordfamily{oppressive 压制的，压迫的；烦闷的}
  \wordphrase{oppress people}
  \wordexample{Organized religion is often used to oppress people, in my view.（依我看，组织性的宗教往往被用来压制人民。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{repress}{riˈpres}
  \wordbreakdown{向后按压 re (= back) + press (= press)}
  \wordsense{vt. 压抑，抑制；镇压}
  \wordfamily{repression 压抑；镇压}
  \wordfamily{repressive 压抑的}
  \wordfamily{repressed 被压抑的}
  \wordphrase{repress my memories}
  \wordexample{I've tried to repress my memories of being raped, but without success.（我努力压抑着那段被强奸的记忆，不过却没什么用。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{suppress}{səˈpres}
  \wordbreakdown{向下压 sup<sub (= under) + press (= press)}
  \wordsense{vt. 镇压，压制；隐蔽，隐藏；抑制}
  \wordfamily{suppression 镇压，压制；隐藏；抑制}
  \wordfamily{suppressor 压制者，镇压者}
  \wordfamily{suppressive 压制的，镇压的}
  \wordphrase{suppress her sobs}
  \wordexample{She was struggling to suppress her sobs.（她拼命不让自己哭出声。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{depress}{diˈpres}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{compress（湿敷布）；expressly（明白地）；oppress（压迫）}
  \wordsense{v. 压下；使沮丧，使忧郁；使萧条 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{to depress（压下）}
  \wordexample{to depress（压下）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{depression}{diˈpreʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{compress（湿敷布）；expressly（明白地）；oppress（压迫）}
  \wordsense{n. 意志消沉，忧郁；坑，洼地；萧条，不景气；低气压 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{in a slight depression（在较浅的低洼处）}
  \wordphrase{depression over Iceland（冰岛上空的低气压）}
  \wordexample{in a slight depression（在较浅的低洼处）}
  \wordexample{depression over Iceland（冰岛上空的低气压）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{depressive}{diˈpresiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{depression；impress；depress；impression；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{a. 压下的；抑郁的，忧郁的}
  \wordphrase{be depressive}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of depressive.（此处展示 depressive 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 经常忧郁、沮丧、消沉的人 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{depressive financial measures（为抑制贸易活动而采取的财政措施）}
  \wordphrase{depressive fit（忧郁症）}
  \wordexample{depressive financial measures（为抑制贸易活动而采取的财政措施）}
  \wordexample{depressive fit（忧郁症）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{impress}{imˈpres}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{depressive；impression；depression；impressionable；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{v. 盖印；使感动，留下印象}
  \wordphrase{to impress（盖印）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to impress".（常见搭配：盖印。）}
  \wordsense{n. 印记 *im<in (= on)}
  \wordphrase{to impress（盖印）}
  \wordexample{to impress（盖印）}
  \wordexample{an impress（印记）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{impression}{imˈpreʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{impressionism（印象主义）；impressionist（印象主义者）；impressionistic（印象主义的）；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{n. 压痕；印刷；印次；印数；印象；（模糊的）观念 *im<in (= on)}
  \wordphrase{the impression}
  \wordexample{first impression of 5,000 copies（第一次印刷5000册）}
  \wordexample{impression of a seal on wax（蜡上面的〔?〕印）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{impressionable}{imˈpreʃənəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{impression；impressive；impress；pressing；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{a. 敏感的，易受影响的 *im<in (= on)}
  \wordphrase{impressionable young lady（很容易受感动的年轻女子）}
  \wordexample{children who are at the impressionable age（处于敏感年龄的孩子们）}
  \wordexample{impressionable young lady（很容易受感动的年轻女子）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{impressive}{imˈpresiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{impressionable；pressing；impression；pressure；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{a. 给人深刻印象的 *im<in (= on)}
  \wordphrase{impressive ceremony（给人深刻印象的仪式）}
  \wordexample{impressive ceremony（给人深刻印象的仪式）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pressing}{ˈpresiŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{compress（湿敷布）；expressly（明白地）；oppress（压迫）}
  \wordsense{a. 紧急的，迫切的，需要立即处理的；恳切的，再三要求的}
  \wordphrase{be pressing}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of pressing.（此处展示 pressing 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. （同一批压制的）唱片}
  \wordphrase{pressing invitation（恳切的邀请） 100 pressings of a symphony（100张交响乐唱片）}
  \wordphrase{pressing business（紧急事务）}
  \wordexample{pressing invitation（恳切的邀请） 100 pressings of a symphony（100张交响乐唱片）}
  \wordexample{pressing business（紧急事务）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{pressure}{ˈpreʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordsense{n. 压；压力；压迫；困扰；艰难；紧迫}
  \wordfamily{pressing}
  \wordfamily{pressurized}
  \wordfamily{impressive}
  \wordfamily{impressionable}
  \wordphrase{atmospheric / blood pressure（气压 / 血压）}
  \wordphrase{pressure cooker（高压锅）}
  \wordphrase{pressure gauge（压力计）}
  \wordphrase{pressure of work（工作压力）}
  \wordphrase{under strong pressure（承受巨大压力的）}
  \wordphrase{pressure group（为影响政策或舆论而组织的压力集团）}
  \wordexample{atmospheric / blood pressure（气压 / 血压）}
  \wordexample{pressure cooker（高压锅）}
  \wordexample{pressure gauge（压力计）}
  \wordexample{pressure of work（工作压力）}
  \wordexample{under strong pressure（承受巨大压力的）}
  \wordexample{pressure group（为影响政策或舆论而组织的压力集团）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{pressurized}{ˈpreʃəraizd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRESS}
  \wordfamily{pressure；pressing；impressive；impressionable；cap（[cip] 还有）；head（的含义））；compress（湿敷布）}
  \wordsense{a. （飞机、潜水艇等）增压的}
  \wordphrase{be pressurized（增压的）}
  \wordexample{prehend / prehens, pris, empt / em, rap / rav, sum / sumpt, lab / lep 等。其中}
\end{word}



\chapter{CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 cept, cap, capt, ceiv 意为 to take, to seize。变形为 ceit, cip, cup。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 prehend / prehens, pris, empt / em, rap / rav, sum / sumpt, lab / lep 等。其中 cap [cip] 还有 head 的含义。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{concept}{ˈkɒnsept}
  \wordbreakdown{con<com (= together) + cept (= take) 一起抓、取}
  \wordsense{n. 概念}
  \wordfamily{inception}
  \wordfamily{intercept}
  \wordfamily{perceive}
  \wordfamily{precept}
  \wordphrase{concept}
  \wordexample{Dr. Jameson's theory about personality is not a new concept.（詹姆森博士有关人格的理论不是一种新概念。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{inception}{inˈsepʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{带到里面去 in (= in, on) + cept (= take)}
  \wordsense{n. 开始，起初，发端}
  \wordfamily{concept}
  \wordfamily{intercept}
  \wordfamily{perceive}
  \wordfamily{precept}
  \wordphrase{inception our company had}
  \wordexample{At its inception, our company had just 2 employees.（在创立初期，我们公司只有两名员工。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{intercept}{ˌintəˈsept}
  \wordbreakdown{在中间抓住、夺取 inter (= between) + cept (= take)}
  \wordsense{vt. 拦截}
  \wordfamily{interception 拦截}
  \wordfamily{interceptor 拦截者；拦截机}
  \wordphrase{intercept Ms Barnes}
  \wordexample{Could you please intercept Ms. Barnes on her way out and give her this message?（你能去拦住巴恩斯女士告诉她这个消息吗？）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{perceive}{pəˈsi:v}
  \wordbreakdown{通过某种事情抓住或理解 per (= through) + ceiv (= take)}
  \wordsense{vt. 察觉，感知；认识到；理解}
  \wordfamily{perception 察觉，感知}
  \wordfamily{perceptible 可感觉到的}
  \wordfamily{perceptive 感知的；敏锐的}
  \wordfamily{perceptibly 可察觉地，可感觉地}
  \wordfamily{cf. imperceptibly 察觉不到地，细微地}
  \wordphrase{perceive the same event}
  \wordexample{Studies show that two witnesses can perceive the same event quite differently.（研究表明，两名证人对同一事件的理解可能有很大的不同。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{precept}{ˈpri:sept}
  \wordbreakdown{事先抓住 pre (= before) + cept (= take)}
  \wordfamily{preceptor（教师，训诫者）；concept（概念）；inception（开始）}
  \wordsense{n. 训诫；戒律}
  \wordphrase{precepts of the Boy}
  \wordexample{One of the main precepts of the Boy Scouts is to be “morally straight and clean”.（童子军的主要训诫之一是“品德端正纯洁”。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{susceptible}{səˈseptəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{容易被捕捉的 sus<sub (= under, intensive) + cept (= take)}
  \wordfamily{susceptibility（多情，善感）；concept（概念）；inception（开始）}
  \wordsense{a. 易受影响的，易动感情的；敏感的；允许的；可以……的}
  \wordphrase{susceptible to your dubious}
  \wordexample{Don't bother flirting with me. I'm not susceptible to your dubious charms.（不要向我卖弄风情，我对你的风情不感冒。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{capacious}{kəˈpeiʃəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}
  \wordsense{a. 容积大的，宽敞的，广阔的}
  \wordfamily{capacity 接受能力；容积；能力；资格}
  \wordphrase{capacious seats}
  \wordexample{I love flying first class for the capacious seats.（我喜欢坐头等舱是因为头等舱坐椅宽敞。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{caption}{ˈkæpʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}
  \wordfamily{capacious；captious；recipient；receptive；concept（概念）}
  \wordsense{n. （杂志等报道的）标题，题目；附在照片、插图上的说明文字；（电影的）字幕}
  \wordphrase{the caption}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of caption.（此处展示 caption 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 为……添加标题}
  \wordphrase{caption under the picture}
  \wordexample{The caption under the picture was wrong. The editor made a mistake.（那张图下面的说明文字不对，编辑弄错了。）}
  \wordexample{caption under the picture}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{captious}{ˈkæpʃəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}
  \wordsense{a. 吹毛求疵的；强词夺理的}
  \wordfamily{caption}
  \wordfamily{recipient}
  \wordfamily{capacious}
  \wordfamily{receptive}
  \wordphrase{captious sort〔?〕impossible}
  \wordexample{He's a captious sort〔?〕impossible to please.（他是那种爱挑剔的人，很难让他满意。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{recipient}{riˈsipiənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}
  \wordfamily{captious；receptive；caption；accept；concept（概念）}
  \wordsense{n. 接受者，受领者}
  \wordphrase{the recipient}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of recipient.（此处展示 recipient 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 接受的，受领的}
  \wordphrase{recipient was so nervous}
  \wordexample{The award recipient was so nervous he tripped and fell off the stage!（那个获奖者太紧张了，以至于绊倒摔下了舞台！）}
  \wordexample{recipient was so nervous}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{receptive}{riˈseptiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}
  \wordsense{a. 易于接受的；接受的}
  \wordfamily{receive 接受；接待}
  \wordfamily{reception 接受；接待；欢迎会}
  \wordfamily{receptionist 招待员}
  \wordfamily{receipt 收条，收据}
  \wordfamily{receiver 收取人；接收器}
  \wordfamily{receivable 可以接受的}
  \wordfamily{received 被认可的，被认为标准的}
  \wordphrase{receptive to the new}
  \wordexample{The mechanics union officials seem to be receptive to the new offer.（技工工会的干部似乎接受了新提议。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{accept}{əkˈsept}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}

  \wordfamily{acceptable}

  \wordexample{accept an invitation（接受邀请）}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}

  \wordsense{a. 全神贯注的；热衷的；抢先占有的}
  \wordphrase{preoccupied by family troubles（一心只挂念家中麻烦的）}
  \wordexample{preoccupied with thoughts of the coming holidays（一心只想着即将到来的假期的）}
  \wordexample{preoccupied by family troubles（一心只挂念家中麻烦的）}

  \wordfamily{preoccupy}
  \wordfamily{occupier}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEPT, CAP, CAPT, CEIV}

  \wordsense{v. 恢复（健康）；挽回（损失等）}
  \wordphrase{ger / gest, port, veh / vect 等和来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{recuperative（恢复的；有恢复力的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{FER}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 fer 意为 to carry, to bear。词根 lat 与 fer 都来自拉丁语的 ferre，lat 来自该词的不规则过去分词，两个词根可以一起学习。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 ger / gest, port, veh / vect 等和来自希腊语的 phor / pher 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{confer}{kənˈfɜ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{带着某物搬运或一起搬运 con<com (= with, together) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordfamily{conference（协商，商谈）；conferment（授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{vt. sth + on + sb 授予，赠与}
  \wordphrase{confer the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of confer.（此处展示 confer 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vi. with + sb; about + sth 协商；比较，参看（缩写：cf.）}
  \wordphrase{confer with your academic}
  \wordexample{Please confer with your academic advisor before enrolling in the course.（在选修这门课之前，请先向你们的导师咨询一下。）}
  \wordexample{confer with your academic}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{deference}{ˈdefərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{向下搬运 de (= down) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{n. 顺从，服从；尊敬，敬意}
  \wordfamily{defer 顺从，服从；表示敬意；延期}
  \wordfamily{deferential 恭敬的}
  \wordfamily{deferentially 恭敬地}
  \wordfamily{deferment 延期}
  \wordphrase{deference}
  \wordexample{The judge gets cranky if the attorneys don't show her proper deference.（如果律师没有表现出诚挚的敬意，法官就会变得很苛刻。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{infer}{inˈfɜ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{在里面搬运 in (= in) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{vt.（根据事实）推理，推断，推定；暗示；意味着}
  \wordfamily{inference 推论；推断}
  \wordfamily{inferential 推论的，推理的}
  \wordphrase{infer from your dour}
  \wordexample{I infer from your dour expression that you're angry with me.（你脸色阴沉，可以推断你生我的气了。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{opprobrium}{əˈprəubriəm}
  \wordbreakdown{和某人敌对，向前搬运 op<ob (= against) + pro (= forth) + br<fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{n. 耻辱，不名誉；蔑视；责难}
  \wordfamily{opprobrious 侮辱的，辱骂的；丢脸的，羞耻的}
  \wordphrase{opprobrium to his office}
  \wordexample{Many Republicans said that Clinton brought unprecedented opprobrium to his office.（很多共和党人说，克林顿给他的职位带来了前所未有的耻辱。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{preferment}{priˈfɜ:mənt}
  \wordbreakdown{向前搬运 pre (= before) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{n. 晋升，升级；（尤指教会中的）美差，高位}
  \wordfamily{opprobrium}
  \wordfamily{proffer}
  \wordfamily{infer}
  \wordfamily{vociferous}
  \wordphrase{preferment at the cost}
  \wordexample{He is a gentleman who never sought preferment at the cost of personal integrity.（他是一位绝不会牺牲自己的正直而谋求晋升的绅士。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{proffer}{ˈprɔfə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{朝着某个东西向前输送 pr<pro (= forward) + of<ob (= toward) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordfamily{preferment；vociferous；opprobrium；fertile；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{vt. 提供；提出}
  \wordphrase{to proffer（提供）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to proffer".（常见搭配：提供。）}
  \wordsense{n. 提供；提议}
  \wordphrase{proffered our services}
  \wordexample{We proffered our services as house painters to all our neighbors that summer.（那年夏天我们帮所有的邻居粉刷了房子。）}
  \wordexample{proffered our services}
  \wordexample{to proffer（提供）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{vociferous}{vəuˈsifərəs}
  \wordbreakdown{出声的 voc (= call, voice) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{a. 嘈杂的，大声叫喊的}
  \wordfamily{vociferate 叫喊}
  \wordfamily{vociferation 〔?〕喊，高喊}
  \wordphrase{vociferous but unsuccessful demonstration}
  \wordexample{The protestors made a vociferous but unsuccessful demonstration in the street.（抗议者们在街上大喊着抗议示威，但却没有取得成功。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{fertile}{ˈfɜ:tail}
  \wordbreakdown{可以搬运的，可带来的 fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{a.（土地等）肥沃的，（植物、动物）多产的；想像力丰富的，创造力丰富的}
  \wordfamily{fertilize 使肥沃；使受精}
  \wordfamily{fertility 肥沃，多产性；生殖力；丰富}
  \wordfamily{fertilizer（化学）肥料}
  \wordfamily{fertilization 施肥；肥沃}
  \wordphrase{fertile imagination}
  \wordexample{Some people seem to have been born with a fertile imagination.（有些人似乎天生就具有丰富的想像力。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{indifference}{inˈdifrəns}
  \wordbreakdown{搬运时注意使不脱离 in (= not) + dif<dis (= away) + fer (= carry)}
  \wordsense{n. 不关心，冷淡；不重要}
  \wordfamily{indifferent 不关心的；无关紧要的；平凡的}
  \wordphrase{indifference}
  \wordexample{It's hard to be in love with you when you show me only indifference.（你对我如此冷淡，我很难爱上你。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{afferent}{ˈæfərənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{efferent（传出的）；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{a. 【解】传入的 *af<ad (= to, toward)}
  \wordphrase{be afferent（传入的）}
  \wordexample{be afferent（传入的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{circumference}{səˈkʌmfərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{afferent；differ；difference；different；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. 周围，周边；圆周；周长 *circum (= around)}
  \wordphrase{the circumference of the earth（地球的周长）}
  \wordexample{the circumference of the earth（地球的周长）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{differ}{ˈdifə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{circumference；difference；afferent；different；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{v. 不同，区别；意见不同 *dif<dis (= away, apart)}
  \wordphrase{to differ（不同，区别）}
  \wordexample{to differ（不同，区别）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{difference}{ˈdifrəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{differ；different；circumference；differentiate；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. 差异，相异，不同，（量、程度、方式等的）差别；（意见的）分歧，不和 *dif<dis (= away, apart)}
  \wordphrase{make a difference（区别对待；起重要作用）}
  \wordphrase{make no difference（没有差异；无关紧要）}
  \wordexample{make a difference（区别对待；起重要作用）}
  \wordexample{make no difference（没有差异；无关紧要）}
  \wordexample{That makes all the difference.（那使情况截然不同。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{different}{ˈdifrənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{differently（不同地）；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{a. 不同的，相异的；各种的；个别的；与众不同的，独特的 *dif<dis (= away, apart)}
  \wordphrase{at different times（在不同的时期）}
  \wordphrase{tobacco that is different（特别的烟草）}
  \wordexample{It's a different matter.（那是另一码事。）}
  \wordexample{at different times（在不同的时期）}
  \wordexample{Different nations have different customs.（不同的民族有不同的风俗。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{differentiate}{ˌdifəˈrenʃieit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{differentiation（区别）；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{v. 区别，区分 *dif<dis (= away, apart)}
  \wordphrase{differentiate varieties of plants（区分各种植物）}
  \wordphrase{differentiate between pupils（对学生区别对待）}
  \wordexample{differentiate varieties of plants（区分各种植物）}
  \wordexample{differentiate between pupils（对学生区别对待）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{differential}{ˌdifəˈrenʃl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{a. 区别的，差别的}
  \wordphrase{wage differential（工资差异）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "wage differential".（常见搭配：工资差异。）}
  \wordsense{n. （在相同行业里依据熟练程度而产生的）工资级差 *dif<dis (= away, apart)}
  \wordphrase{differential tariffs（差别关税）}
  \wordphrase{differential diagnosis（【医】鉴别诊断）}
  \wordphrase{differential gear（差动齿轮）}
  \wordexample{differential tariffs（差别关税）}
  \wordexample{differential diagnosis（【医】鉴别诊断）}
  \wordexample{differential gear（差动齿轮）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{interfere}{ˌintəˈfiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{v. 干涉，干预；（工作、事情等）相冲突；打扰，妨碍 *inter (= between)}
  \wordphrase{interfering old lady（爱管闲事的老太婆）}
  \wordexample{interfering old lady（爱管闲事的老太婆）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{interference}{ˌintəˈfiərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{interfere；offer；differential；offering；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. 干涉；妨碍 *inter (= between)}
  \wordphrase{interference in internal affairs（干涉内政）}
  \wordexample{interference in internal affairs（干涉内政）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{offer}{ˈɔfə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{v. 提供，提出；提议；备有……出售；出价，报价；施加；贡献，奉献}
  \wordphrase{You offer（你出个价吧。）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "You offer".（常见搭配：你出个价吧。。）}
  \wordsense{n. 提议；提供；开价；报价；奉献 *of<ob (= to, toward)}
  \wordphrase{offer an opinion（提出意见）}
  \wordphrase{accept / decline an offer（接受 / 拒绝一项提议）}
  \wordexample{offer \$500,000 for a house（房子要价50万美元）}
  \wordexample{offer an opinion（提出意见）}
  \wordexample{accept / decline an offer（接受 / 拒绝一项提议）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{offering}{ˈɔfəriŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{offer；offertory；interference；prefer；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. 提议；提供；（向神）贡奉；祭品，供品；捐款 *of<ob (= to, toward)}
  \wordphrase{offering of bribes（行贿）}
  \wordphrase{offering plate（（教会的）捐款盘）}
  \wordexample{offering of bribes（行贿）}
  \wordexample{offering plate（（教会的）捐款盘）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{offertory}{ˈɔfətəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{offering；prefer；offer；preferable；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. （礼拜时的）献金 *of<ob (= to, toward)}
  \wordphrase{an offertory（献金）}
  \wordexample{an offertory（献金）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{prefer}{priˈfɜ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{offertory；preferable；offering；preference；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{v. 宁愿（选择），更喜欢；提出（控告等）；《古》提升，提拔 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{prefer the issue}
  \wordexample{prefer a charge against a motorist（控告汽车驾驶人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{preferable}{ˈprefrəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{preferably（宁愿，宁可）；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{a. 更好的，更可取的 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{preferable to ill health}
  \wordexample{Poverty is preferable to ill health.（贫穷总比得病强。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{preference}{ˈprefrəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{preferable；preferential；prefer；refer；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. 更喜爱，偏爱；偏爱的事物，优选物；优先（权）；（关税的）特惠 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{the preference}
  \wordexample{have a preference for French novels（更喜欢法国小说）}
  \wordexample{What are your preferences?（你更喜欢什么？）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{preferential}{ˌprefəˈrenʃl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{preference；refer；preferable；reference；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{a. 优先的，优先提供（或接受）的；（关税等）特惠的 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{get preferential treatment（获得优待）}
  \wordphrase{preferential voting（选择选举制）}
  \wordexample{get preferential treatment（获得优待）}
  \wordexample{preferential voting（选择选举制）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{refer}{riˈfɜ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{referable（可归因于……的）；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{v. 谈及；查询；参考；把……归因于 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{to refer（谈及）}
  \wordexample{to refer（谈及）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{reference}{ˈrefrəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{n. 查阅；参照，参考；谈及；委托；推荐信；参考文献，参考资料 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{reference book（参考书（如词典、百科全书等））}
  \wordphrase{excellent references from former employers（前雇主的特别推荐）}
  \wordexample{reference book（参考书（如词典、百科全书等））}
  \wordexample{excellent references from former employers（前雇主的特别推荐）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{referendum}{ˌrefəˈrendəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{reference；referee；refer；suffer；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. 公民投票 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{a referendum（公民投票）}
  \wordexample{a referendum（公民投票）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{referee}{ˌrefəˈri:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{referendum；suffer；reference；suffering；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. （比赛的）裁判员}
  \wordphrase{a referee（裁判员）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a referee".（常见搭配：裁判员。）}
  \wordsense{v. 裁判 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{referee a football match（担任足球赛的裁判）}
  \wordexample{referee a football match（担任足球赛的裁判）}
  \wordexample{a referee（裁判员）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{suffer}{ˈsʌfə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{sufferable（可忍受的，可容忍的）；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）}
  \wordsense{v. 承受（痛苦、损害等），经受，经历（不快的事），遭受；忍受 *suf<sub (= under)}
  \wordphrase{suffer from headaches（头疼）}
  \wordexample{suffer from headaches（头疼）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{suffering}{ˈsʌfəriŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{suffer；sufferance；referee；transfer；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{n. （身心的）痛苦；（pl.）苦难；令人痛苦的事 *suf<sub (= under)}
  \wordphrase{the sufferings of the Jews（犹太民族的苦难）}
  \wordexample{the sufferings of the Jews（犹太民族的苦难）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{sufferance}{ˈsʌfərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{n. 忍受，忍耐 *suf<sub (= under)}
  \wordphrase{a sufferance（忍受，忍耐）}
  \wordexample{a sufferance（忍受，忍耐）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{transfer}{trænsˈfɜ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{v. 搬运，使转移；改变，转换；调动；转让，让与（财产、权利、头衔等）；转乘}
  \wordphrase{transfer the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of transfer.（此处展示 transfer 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 迁移，转移；移交，转让；转账；转运；（职务等的）调动，调任；传递（或转换等）的方法；运送工具，调动手段；汇兑，汇划（尤指电汇）；转车（或船、飞机）票，转车（或船、飞机）处，（汽车或火车的）摆渡处，（汽车或火车的）渡轮；转让证书；转学证书；转队证书；调职者，调任者；转学生；调换部队者；（股票等的）过户；过户凭单 *trans (= over, through)}
  \wordphrase{transfer fee（搬运费）}
  \wordphrase{transfer ticket（渡轮票）}
  \wordexample{transfer fee（搬运费）}
  \wordexample{transfer ticket（渡轮票）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{transferable}{trænsˈfɜ:rəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{transfer；infertile；sufferance；suffering；confer（sth + on + sb 授予）}
  \wordsense{a. 可转移的；可流通的；可转让的，可转换的 *trans (= over, through)}
  \wordphrase{transferable accounts（可转拨账户）}
  \wordexample{transferable accounts（可转拨账户）}
  \wordexample{Railway tickets are not transferable.（火车票是不可转让的。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{infertile}{inˈfɜ:tail}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FER}
  \wordfamily{confer（sth + on + sb 授予）；deference（顺从）；infer（（根据事实）推理）}
  \wordsense{a. 不肥沃的，贫瘠的，不毛的；不结果实的，不生育的 *in (= not)}
  \wordphrase{infertile eggs（未受精卵）}
  \wordphrase{chest, money basket。}
  \wordexample{infertile eggs（未受精卵）}
\end{word}



\chapter{FISC}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 fisc 意为 chest, money basket。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{confiscate}{ˈkɔnfiskeit}
  \wordbreakdown{使和金库分开 con<com (= with) + fisc (= chest)}
  \wordfamily{confiscation（没收，充公）；fiscal（国库的）；infertile（不肥沃的）}
  \wordsense{vt. 没收，充公}
  \wordphrase{confiscate any illegal drugs}
  \wordexample{The dorm director will confiscate any illegal drugs.（宿舍管理员将没收所有非法药品。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{fiscal}{ˈfiskl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FISC}
  \wordfamily{confiscate（没收）；infertile（不肥沃的）；transferable（可转移的）}
  \wordsense{a. 国库的；财政的；会计的}
  \wordphrase{fiscal year（财政年度（美国的财政年度于9月30日结束））}
  \wordphrase{fiscal stamp（印花税票）}
  \wordexample{fiscal year（财政年度（美国的财政年度于9月30日结束））}
  \wordexample{fiscal stamp（印花税票）}
\end{word}



\chapter{SEQU, SECUT[SU]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 sequ, secut 意为 to follow，su 为其变形。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{consequence}{ˈkɔnsikwəns}
  \wordbreakdown{一起跟来 con<com (= with) + sequ (= follow)}
  \wordsense{n. 结果；重要性}
  \wordfamily{consequent 作为结果发生的}
  \wordfamily{consequential 作为结果发生的；重大的}
  \wordfamily{consequently 所以，结果}
  \wordphrase{consequence of the tornado}
  \wordexample{Fifty-three people lost their homes as a consequence of the tornado.（那次龙卷风使53人失去了家园。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{inconsequential}{ˌinkɔnsiˈkwenʃl}
  \wordbreakdown{不一起跟随的 in (= not) + con<com (= with) + sequ (= follow)}
  \wordsense{a. 不合逻辑的，不合伦理的；不重要的，细小的}
  \wordfamily{consequence}
  \wordfamily{obsequious}
  \wordfamily{subsequent}
  \wordfamily{persecute}
  \wordphrase{inconsequential number}
  \wordexample{An inconsequential number of people actually read my book.（只有极少数人认真地阅读了我的书。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{obsequious}{əbˈsi:kwiəs}
  \wordbreakdown{追随得让人感到碍手碍脚的 ob (= in the way) + sequ (= follow)}
  \wordsense{a. 奉承的；拍马屁的}
  \wordfamily{inconsequential}
  \wordfamily{subsequent}
  \wordfamily{consequence}
  \wordfamily{persecute}
  \wordphrase{obsequious people}
  \wordexample{It's difficult for me to trust obsequious people.（我很难信任阿谀奉承的人。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{subsequent}{ˈsʌbsikwənt}
  \wordbreakdown{在下面或尾部接着发生的 sub (= under) + sequ (= follow)}
  \wordsense{a. 后续的；以后的}
  \wordfamily{subsequently 此后，其后，随后}
  \wordfamily{subsequence 后继}
  \wordphrase{Subsequent tests revealed that}
  \wordexample{Subsequent tests revealed that she was suffering from pleurisy.（随后的检查结果表明她患上了肋膜炎。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{persecute}{ˈpɜ:sikju:t}
  \wordbreakdown{坏事一直跟着 per (= through, throughout) + secut (= follow)}
  \wordfamily{persecution（迫害）；persecutor（迫害者）；consequence（结果）}
  \wordsense{vt. 迫害；纠缠；为难}
  \wordphrase{I was persecuted for}
  \wordexample{I was persecuted for months by an IRS representative who said I owed more taxes.（几个月以来，我一直被一位美国国内收入署职员所纠缠，他说我欠缴更多税金。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{prosecute}{ˈprɔsikju:t}
  \wordbreakdown{事先追踪行迹 pro (= before) + secut (= follow)}
  \wordsense{vt. 起诉，告发；从事，经营}
  \wordfamily{prosecution 起诉，告发；从事，经营；控方，原告；检察当局}
  \wordfamily{prosecutor 检察官；起诉人}
  \wordphrase{prosecute the young man}
  \wordexample{The DA decided not to prosecute the young man, as it was his first offense.（鉴于那个年轻人是初犯，地方检察官决定不起诉他了。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{ensue}{inˈsju:}
  \wordbreakdown{紧接在某事物的后边发生 en (= intensive) + su<sequ (= follow)}
  \wordfamily{ensuing（接下来的，接着发生的）；consequence（结果）；inconsequential（不合逻辑的）}
  \wordsense{vi. 随后发生；接着发生；因而发生}
  \wordphrase{Widespread looting ensued after}
  \wordexample{Widespread looting ensued after the race riot.（种族暴乱之后紧接着发生了大规模的掠夺。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{inconsequent}{inˈkɔnsikwənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{sequel；sequence；consecutive；execute；consequence（结果）}
  \wordsense{a. 不一致的；不切题的 *in (= not), con<com (= with)}
  \wordphrase{inconsequent remark（不切题的话）}
  \wordexample{inconsequent remark（不切题的话）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{sequel}{ˈsi:kwəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordsense{n.（前面发生的事的）继续，后续；结果，结局；（故事、电影等的）续集，续篇}
  \wordfamily{inconsequent}
  \wordfamily{sequence}
  \wordfamily{consecutive}
  \wordfamily{execute}
  \wordphrase{sequel to the novel（小说的续篇）}
  \wordphrase{in the sequel（后来）}
  \wordexample{sequel to the novel（小说的续篇）}
  \wordexample{in the sequel（后来）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{sequence}{ˈsi:kwəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordsense{n. 接连，连续；（事件等的）顺序，序列；结果}
  \wordfamily{sequent（连续的；继起的；作为结果而产生的）}
  \wordfamily{sequential（连续的，相继的，随之而来的；作为结果发生的）}
  \wordphrase{in regular sequence（按次序地，有条不紊地）}
  \wordphrase{in historical sequence（按照历史顺序）}
  \wordphrase{a sequence of bad harvests（连续歉收）}
  \wordphrase{in alphabetical sequence（按照字母顺序）}
  \wordexample{in regular sequence（按次序地，有条不紊地）}
  \wordexample{in historical sequence（按照历史顺序）}
  \wordexample{a sequence of bad harvests（连续歉收）}
  \wordexample{in alphabetical sequence（按照字母顺序）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{consecutive}{kənˈsekjutiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{sequence；execute；sequel；execution；consequence（结果）}
  \wordsense{a. 连续的 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordphrase{consecutive holidays（连休）}
  \wordphrase{on five consecutive days（连续五天）}
  \wordexample{consecutive holidays（连休）}
  \wordexample{on five consecutive days（连续五天）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{execute}{ˈeksikju:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{consequence（结果）；inconsequential（不合逻辑的）；obsequious（奉承的）}
  \wordsense{v. 实行（要求、命令等），履行，实施，执行；处死；演奏；（按计划）制成 *ex (= intensive), ecut<secut (= follow)}
  \wordphrase{execute a plan（执行计划）}
  \wordphrase{execute a will（执行遗嘱）}
  \wordphrase{execute a murderer（处死杀人犯）}
  \wordexample{execute a plan（执行计划）}
  \wordexample{execute a will（执行遗嘱）}
  \wordexample{execute a murderer（处死杀人犯）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{execution}{ˌeksiˈkju:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{executioner（死刑执行人）；executor（遗嘱执行人）；consequence（结果）}
  \wordsense{n. （计划等的）实行，执行，履行；（作品等的）制作，完成；（音乐等的）演奏；技巧；（武器的）杀伤力，破坏效果；执行死刑，处决 *ex (= intensive), ecut<secut (= follow)}
  \wordphrase{execution by hanging（处以绞刑）}
  \wordphrase{a writ of execution（执行令）}
  \wordexample{execution by hanging（处以绞刑）}
  \wordexample{a writ of execution（执行令）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{executive}{igˈzekjutiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{Chief（Executive（最高行政长官）；consequence（结果）；inconsequential（不合逻辑的）}
  \wordsense{a. 执行的；实行的；有执行权的；行政（上）的，行政性的}
  \wordphrase{County Executive（县长）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "County Executive".（常见搭配：县长。）}
  \wordsense{n. （the \textasciitilde{}）（政府的）行政部门；执行官；（企业的）经理；主管领导 *ex (= intensive), ecut<secut (= follow)}
  \wordphrase{executive committee（执行委员会）}
  \wordphrase{executive director（执行董事）}
  \wordphrase{executive agreement（和他国政府间的行政协定）}
  \wordexample{executive committee（执行委员会）}
  \wordexample{executive director（执行董事）}
  \wordexample{executive agreement（和他国政府间的行政协定）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{pursue}{pəˈsju:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{consequence（结果）；inconsequential（不合逻辑的）；obsequious（奉承的）}
  \wordsense{v. 追赶，追踪，追击；纠缠；进行，执行；以……为目标，追求 *pur<pro (= forth, before)}
  \wordphrase{pursue a robber（追赶强盗）}
  \wordphrase{pursue pleasure（追求快乐）}
  \wordphrase{pursued by misfortune（被厄运纠缠）}
  \wordexample{pursue a robber（追赶强盗）}
  \wordexample{pursue pleasure（追求快乐）}
  \wordexample{pursued by misfortune（被厄运纠缠）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{pursuit}{pəˈsju:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{pursue；pursuant；executive；sue；consequence（结果）}
  \wordsense{n. 追赶，追击；追求；职业；消遣 *pur<pro (= forth, before)}
  \wordphrase{the pursuit}
  \wordexample{a fox with the hounds in hot pursuit（被猎狗猛追的狐狸）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{pursuant}{pəˈsjuənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{consequence（结果）；inconsequential（不合逻辑的）；obsequious（奉承的）}
  \wordsense{a. 遵循的}
  \wordphrase{be pursuant}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of pursuant.（此处展示 pursuant 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{ad. 相符地，一致地 *pur<pro (= forth, before)}
  \wordphrase{pursuant to your instructions（依照您的指示）}
  \wordphrase{pursuant to Article 12（依据第12条）}
  \wordexample{pursuant to your instructions（依照您的指示）}
  \wordexample{pursuant to Article 12（依据第12条）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{sue}{su:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordsense{v. 控告，对……提出诉讼；恳请，请求}
  \wordfamily{pursuant}
  \wordfamily{suit}
  \wordfamily{pursuit}
  \wordfamily{suitor}
  \wordphrase{sue for a divorce / peace（提出离婚诉讼 / 请求和解）}
  \wordexample{sue for a divorce / peace（提出离婚诉讼 / 请求和解）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{suit}{su:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{suiting（西装料）；suitable（合适的，适当的）；consequence（结果）}
  \wordsense{n. 控告，诉讼；恳求；一套外衣}
  \wordphrase{the suit}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of suit.（此处展示 suit 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 适合；适当；合……的心意；相配}
  \wordphrase{bring a suit against somebody（对某人提出诉讼）}
  \wordphrase{criminal / civil suit（刑事诉讼 / 民事诉讼）}
  \wordexample{bring a suit against somebody（对某人提出诉讼）}
  \wordexample{criminal / civil suit（刑事诉讼 / 民事诉讼）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{suitor}{ˈsu:tə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordsense{n. 起诉者，原告；（男性）求婚者}
  \wordfamily{suit}
  \wordfamily{suite}
  \wordfamily{sue}
  \wordfamily{pursuant}
  \wordfamily{a suitor（起诉者，原告）}
  \wordphrase{a suitor（起诉者，原告）}
  \wordexample{a suitor（起诉者，原告）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{suite}{swi:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SEQU, SECUT[SU]}
  \wordfamily{consequence（结果）；inconsequential（不合逻辑的）；obsequious（奉承的）}
  \wordsense{n. （重要人物的）随员；（由几部分组成的）一套家具；套房（如宾馆里除卧室以外还带有客厅、会客室的房间）；（物品的）一套；系列}
  \wordphrase{dining-room suite（一套餐厅家具）}
  \wordphrase{lounge / bedroom suite（一套休息室 / 卧室家具）}
  \wordphrase{to serve, to keep。}
  \wordexample{dining-room suite（一套餐厅家具）}
  \wordexample{lounge / bedroom suite（一套休息室 / 卧室家具）}
\end{word}



\chapter{SERV}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 serv 意为 to serve, to keep。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{conserve}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV；n.}
  \wordfamily{conservation（保护，保存）；conservatism（保守主义）；conservatory（保守性的）；conservative（保守的）}
  \wordsense{v. [kənˈsɜ:v]}
  \wordphrase{to conserve（保存，维护）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to conserve".（常见搭配：保存，维护。）}
  \wordsense{n. [ˈkɔnsɜ:v] [用某物来维持 con<com (= with) + serv (= serve, keep)]}
  \wordphrase{to conserve（保存，维护）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to conserve".（常见搭配：保存，维护。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 保存，维护}
  \wordphrase{to conserve（保存，维护）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to conserve".（常见搭配：保存，维护。）}
  \wordsense{n. （pl.）水果蜜饯；果酱}
  \wordphrase{conserve landmarks}
  \wordexample{The primary goal of historical societies is to conserve landmarks.（历史学会的首要目标是保存文化古迹。）}
  \wordexample{conserve landmarks}
  \wordexample{to conserve（v. [kənˈsɜ:v]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{subservient}{səbˈsɜ:viənt}
  \wordbreakdown{在下面侍奉、有帮助的 sub (= under) + serv (= serve)}
  \wordsense{a. 有益的；屈从的；从属的}
  \wordfamily{subserve 有利于；促进，推动}
  \wordfamily{subservience 屈从；有益}
  \wordphrase{subservient relationship}
  \wordexample{Australia's subservient relationship with England gave way to an equal relationship.（澳大利亚和英国恢复了平等，取代了澳大利亚从属于英国的关系。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{servile}{ˈsɜ:vail}
  \wordbreakdown{侍奉的 serv (= serve)}
  \wordsense{a. 奴隶的，奴隶般的；不独立的；阿谀的，屈从的}
  \wordfamily{servility 奴性；卑屈，屈从}
  \wordphrase{servile manner than}
  \wordexample{I think his promotion owes more to his servile manner than to talent.（我认为他之所以能够升迁，更多是因为他善于奉迎而非有才能。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{conservatory}{kənˈsɜ:vətəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{deserve；deserved；conserve；deserving}
  \wordsense{n. 温室；音乐学校 *con<com (= with, together)}
  \wordphrase{a conservatory（温室）}
  \wordexample{a conservatory（温室）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{deserve}{diˈzɜ:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{conservatory；deserved；deserving；observe；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{v. 应受；值得 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{to deserve（应受）}
  \wordexample{to deserve（应受）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{deserved}{diˈzɜ:vd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{deservedly（理所应当地，应得地）；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）}
  \wordsense{a. 当然的，应得的 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{be deserved}
  \wordexample{deserved reward / praise / punishment（应得的补偿 / 称赞 / 惩罚）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{deserving}{diˈzɜ:viŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{deserved；observe；deserve；observation；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{a. 应得的，值得的；值得帮助的 *de (= down)}
  \wordphrase{deserving cause（值得赞助的事业）}
  \wordphrase{deserving of sympathy（应该受到同情的）}
  \wordphrase{deserving of praise（值得获得称赞的）}
  \wordexample{deserving cause（值得赞助的事业）}
  \wordexample{deserving of sympathy（应该受到同情的）}
  \wordexample{deserving of praise（值得获得称赞的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{observe}{əbˈzɜ:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{observable（看得见的，可观察到的，值得注意的）；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）}
  \wordsense{v. 奉行（规则等），遵守；庆祝（节日、纪念日、生日等）；察觉；观察；监视；发表意见 *ob (= to, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{observe Christmas（庆祝圣诞节）}
  \wordexample{observe Christmas（庆祝圣诞节）}
  \wordexample{He observed that the plan would work well.（他说那个计划会顺利进行。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{observation}{ˌɔbzəˈveiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{observe；observatory；deserving；observer；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{n. 观察，注意，监视；观察力；（pl.）观察资料；观察数据 *ob (= to, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{observation car（瞭望车）}
  \wordphrase{a man of little observation（观察力极差的人）}
  \wordexample{observation car（瞭望车）}
  \wordexample{a man of little observation（观察力极差的人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{observatory}{əbˈzɜ:vətəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{observation；observer；observe；observance；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{n. 瞭望台；天文台；气象台；观测所 *ob (= to, intensive), ory (= place where)}
  \wordphrase{an observatory（瞭望台）}
  \wordexample{an observatory（瞭望台）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{observer}{əbˈzɜ:və(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{observatory；observance；observation；observant；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{n. 观察员（列席会议但没有投票权）；观察者，观测者，监视者；遵守者 *ob (= to, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{an observer（观察员（列席会议但没有投票权））}
  \wordexample{an observer（观察员（列席会议但没有投票权））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{observance}{əbˈzɜ:vəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{observer；observant；observatory；preserve；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{n. （法律、规则、习惯等的）遵守，奉行；仪式 *ob (= to, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{the observance of the Sabbath（守安息日）}
  \wordexample{the observance of the Queen's birthday（庆祝女王诞辰）}
  \wordexample{the observance of the Sabbath（守安息日）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{observant}{əbˈzɜ:vənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{observance；preserve；observer；preservation；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{a. 观察力敏锐的，遵守（法律、习惯等）的 *ob (= to, intensive)}
  \wordphrase{observant boy（观察力敏锐的孩子）}
  \wordphrase{observant of the rules（遵守规则的）}
  \wordexample{observant boy（观察力敏锐的孩子）}
  \wordexample{observant of the rules（遵守规则的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{preserve}{priˈzɜ:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）；servile（奴隶的）}
  \wordsense{v. 保护，保存；防腐，保藏；保持，维持；禁止他人捕猎}
  \wordphrase{to preserve（保护，保存）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to preserve".（常见搭配：保护，保存。）}
  \wordsense{n. （pl.）果酱，蜜饯；禁猎地 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{to preserve（保护，保存）}
  \wordexample{God preserve us!（上帝保佑我们！）}
  \wordexample{to preserve（保护，保存）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{preservation}{ˌprezəˈveiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{preserve；preservative；observant；reserve；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{n. 保存，保藏；保护 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{in good preservation（保存得好的）}
  \wordexample{in good preservation（保存得好的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{preservative}{priˈzɜ:vətiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{preservation；reserve；preserve；reserved；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{a. 有保存能力的；有利于保藏的}
  \wordphrase{be preservative（有保存能力的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be preservative".（常见搭配：有保存能力的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 防腐剂 *pre (= before)}
  \wordphrase{fresh cream free from preservatives（没有添加防腐剂的新鲜奶油）}
  \wordexample{fresh cream free from preservatives（没有添加防腐剂的新鲜奶油）}
  \wordexample{be preservative（有保存能力的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{reserve}{riˈzɜ:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{reservist（预备役军人）；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）}
  \wordsense{v. （为未来或者某种目的而）保留，储备；（为某个特定的人）准备，预备；预约，保留（权利）；预订}
  \wordphrase{to reserve（保留，储备）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to reserve".（常见搭配：保留，储备。）}
  \wordsense{n. 储备（物），备用（物）；预备队；保留地；严肃；节制；谨慎 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{to reserve（保留，储备）}
  \wordexample{to reserve（保留，储备）}
  \wordexample{a reserve（储备（物），备用（物））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{reserved}{riˈzɜ:vd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）；servile（奴隶的）}
  \wordsense{a. 保留的，留作专用的；预约的，预备的；有节制的；内向的，沉默寡言的 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{reserved for special guests（留给贵宾的）}
  \wordphrase{reserved seat（预约席，指定席，包席）}
  \wordexample{All seats reserved.（所有席位都已预订。）}
  \wordexample{All rights reserved.（版权所有。）}
  \wordexample{reserved for special guests（留给贵宾的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{reservation}{ˌrezəˈveiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{without（reservation（无条件地）；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）}
  \wordsense{n. 预约，保留；专用地；（印第安人的）居留区 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{a reservation（预约，保留）}
  \wordexample{a reservation（预约，保留）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{reservoir}{ˈrezəvwɑ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{reservation；serve；reserved；servant；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）}
  \wordsense{n. 蓄水池；储藏所；（知识等的）储备 *re (= again)}
  \wordphrase{the reservoir}
  \wordexample{reservoir of a fountain pen / an oil lamp（钢笔里的墨水囊 / 油灯里的油盒）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{serve}{sɜ:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）；servile（奴隶的）}
  \wordsense{v. 服务；供职，任职；（商店）接待（客人）；端上，提出（食物）；有助于……，对……有用；使满足；对待；服役；送达（令状等）；发球；（在弥撒中）充当助祭}
  \wordphrase{serve the issue}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of serve.（此处展示 serve 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. （网球等的）发球}
  \wordphrase{serve ten years of sentence（服刑十年）}
  \wordphrase{serve a ball（发球）}
  \wordexample{Dinner is served.（晚饭都摆好了。）}
  \wordexample{It serves him right.（他活该。）}
  \wordexample{serve a summons / writ / warrant on somebody（向某人送达传票 / 令状 / 逮捕〈或搜查〉令）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{servant}{ˈsɜ:vənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordsense{n. 仆人，佣人；雇工；事务员}
  \wordfamily{public servant（公务员，公仆）}
  \wordfamily{civil servant（文职人员）}
  \wordfamily{a servant（仆人，佣人）}
  \wordphrase{a servant（仆人，佣人）}
  \wordexample{a servant（仆人，佣人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{server}{ˈsɜ:və(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordsense{n. 服务者，侍者；餐具}
  \wordfamily{salad-servers（色拉盘）}
  \wordfamily{a server（服务者，侍者）}
  \wordphrase{a server（服务者，侍者）}
  \wordexample{a server（服务者，侍者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{serving}{ˈsɜ:viŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）；servile（奴隶的）}
  \wordsense{n. （食物等的）一份}
  \wordphrase{a serving（一份）}
  \wordexample{a serving（一份）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{service}{ˈsɜ:vis}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{serviceman（军人）；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）}
  \wordsense{n. 贡献；（为客人提供的）服务；（交通机关的）公共设施；（政府的）部门；宗教仪式，礼拜式；（商品售出后提供的）维修服务；（需要专业知识的）服务}
  \wordphrase{the service}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of service.（此处展示 service 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. （车、机器等售出后）维修，保养}
  \wordphrase{service charge（服务费）}
  \wordphrase{have the car serviced regularly（定期维修汽车）}
  \wordexample{service charge（服务费）}
  \wordexample{have the car serviced regularly（定期维修汽车）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{serviceable}{ˈsɜ:visəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordsense{a. 适于日常穿戴的；耐用的；有用的}
  \wordfamily{service}
  \wordfamily{servitude}
  \wordfamily{serving}
  \wordfamily{server}
  \wordphrase{serviceable clothes for school children（适于学生穿的衣服）}
  \wordexample{serviceable clothes for school children（适于学生穿的衣服）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{servitude}{ˈsɜ:vitju:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERV}
  \wordfamily{servitor；conserve（kənˈsɜ:v）；subservient（有益的）}
  \wordsense{n. 奴役（状态）；苦役}
  \wordphrase{servitor}
  \wordexample{servitor（侍从，仆人；（牛津大学的）工读生）}
\end{word}



\chapter{STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 `strain`，`strict`，`string`，`stress` 意为 `to bind, to tie, to draw tight`。`strang` 是它们的变形。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 `lig[li, leag, ly]`、`cinct`、`nect/next` 等和来自盎格鲁-撒克逊语的 `bond`。此外，意为 `to join` 的 `junct/join/jug` 也与这些词根相似。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{constrain}{kənˈstrein}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordsense{vt. 迫使，强制，强迫；压制，抑制；束缚，拘束}
  \wordfamily{constraint 强制，强迫}
  \wordfamily{constrained 被迫的}
  \wordphrase{constrained by my religious}
  \wordexample{I feel constrained by my religious beliefs to object to capital punishment.（我的宗教信仰迫使我反对死刑制度。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{constrict}{kənˈstrikt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordsense{vt. 勒紧，压缩；（血管、肌肉）收缩；限制行动}
  \wordfamily{constriction 压缩；收缩}
  \wordfamily{constrictor 压缩机；大蟒}
  \wordfamily{constricted 压缩的}
  \wordphrase{constricts my movement}
  \wordexample{I hate clothing that constricts my movement.（我讨厌限制活动的衣服。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{restrict}{riˈstrikt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordfamily{constrain（迫使）；constrict（勒紧）；stringent（规则严格的）}
  \wordsense{vt. 限制，限定；约束，束缚}
  \wordphrase{restrict Donna's privileges because}
  \wordexample{We had to restrict Donna's privileges because she wouldn't study enough.（我们不得不限制唐娜的一些特权，不然她不好好学习。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{stringent}{ˈstrindʒənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordfamily{stringency（严厉）；constrain（迫使）；constrict（勒紧）}
  \wordsense{a. 规则严格的；严厉的，不能违背的；银根紧的，资金短缺的}
  \wordphrase{stringent about enforcing the}
  \wordexample{The captain is very stringent about enforcing the curfew rules.（警察局副巡官在执行夜间宵禁令方面非常严格。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{distrain}{diˈstrein}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordfamily{distraint（扣押）；distrainer（扣押人）；distrainee（财务被扣押者）；constrain（迫使）}
  \wordsense{v. （为获取租费而）扣押 *di<dis (= away)}
  \wordphrase{distrain the issue}
  \wordexample{distrain upon one's furniture for rent（扣押某人的家具作为房租）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{restrain}{riˈstrein}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordfamily{constrain（迫使）；constrict（勒紧）；restrict（限制）}
  \wordsense{v. 抑制；束缚 *re (= back)}
  \wordphrase{to restrain（抑制）}
  \wordexample{to restrain（抑制）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{restraint}{riˈstreint}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordfamily{constrain（迫使）；constrict（勒紧）；restrict（限制）}
  \wordsense{n. 抑制，束缚 *re (= back)}
  \wordphrase{the restraints of poverty（贫困的束缚）}
  \wordexample{the restraints of poverty（贫困的束缚）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{strain}{strein}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}
  \wordfamily{strainer（过滤器，筛子）；constrain（迫使）；constrict（勒紧）}

  \wordphrase{nervous strain（神经痛）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "nervous strain".（常见搭配：神经痛。）}
  \wordsense{n. （人的）血缘，世系；种，族；（动植物的）种，品种；气质，（性格上的）倾向；曲子，旋律，歌；诗节，歌节；口吻，语气；笔调；情调}
  \wordphrase{strain a rope to breaking-point（〈如同要拉断一样〉拉紧绳子）}
  \wordphrase{strain every nerve（竭尽全力）}
  \wordphrase{speak in a lofty strain（傲慢地说话）}
  \wordexample{strain a rope to breaking-point（〈如同要拉断一样〉拉紧绳子）}
  \wordexample{strain every nerve（竭尽全力）}
  \wordexample{speak in a lofty strain（傲慢地说话）}
\end{word}

  \wordfamily{strain}
  \wordfamily{unrestrained}
  \wordfamily{restraint}
  \wordfamily{district}

  \wordphrase{strained cordiality（不自然的热情）}
  \wordphrase{strained laugh（强笑）}
  \wordexample{strained relations（紧张的〈一触即发的〉关系）}
  \wordexample{strained cordiality（不自然的热情）}
  \wordexample{strained laugh（强笑）}

  \wordphrase{the strait}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of strait.（此处展示 strait 的常见用法。）}

\begin{word}[**]{astringent}{əˈstrindʒənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 STRAIN, STRICT, STRING, STRESS[STRANG]}

  \wordsense{n. 收敛剂 *a<ad (= to)}
  \wordphrase{the Straits of Gibraltar（直布罗陀海峡）}
  \wordphrase{the Strait of Dover（多佛尔海峡）}

  \wordsense{v. 扼死，使窒息 *strang<string (= bind)}
  \wordphrase{to strangle（扼死，使窒息）}
  \wordexample{to strangle（扼死，使窒息）}
