\chapter{TEGR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根TEGR 来自拉丁语的 tegr 意为 to touch。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{integrity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEGR；不被触摸、接触的状态 in（= not）+ tegr（= touch）；in'tegrəti}
  \wordfamily{integrate（使成整体）；integration（综合，完成，集）；integral（完整的）；integer（整数）}
  \wordsense{n. 诚实，正直，高洁；完全}
  \wordphrase{the integrity}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of integrity.（此处展示 integrity 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 成；消除种族差别待遇 integer 整数；完整的事物}
  \wordphrase{integrity to whom I}
  \wordexample{Dr. Stanton is a man of unquestioned integrity to whom I entrust my life.（毫无疑问，斯坦顿医生是个正直的人，值 得我托付终身。）}
  \wordexample{integrity to whom I}
  \wordexample{integrity（n.诚实，正直，高洁）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{disintegrate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEGR；dis'intigreit}
  \wordfamily{integrity（诚实）；redintegration（复原）；porch（（屋顶延伸到外边的）门廊）}
  \wordsense{v. 使分解；使瓦解，使崩溃 *dis（= not, away）,}
  \wordphrase{rocks disintegrated by frost and rain}
  \wordexample{rocks disintegrated by frost and rain （被霜冻和雨水剥蚀的岩石）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{redintegration}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEGR；ri,dinti'greiʃn}
  \wordfamily{redintegrate；integrity（诚实）；disintegrate（使分解）}
  \wordsense{n. 复原；重建 *red<re（= again）,}
  \wordphrase{redintegrate}
  \wordexample{redintegrate（复原；重建）}
\end{word}



\chapter{VET}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根VET 来自拉丁语的 vet 意为 old。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 sen，presby
  \item 和来自希腊语的 geronto。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{inveterate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VET；在里面占据时间长的 in（= in）+ vet（= old）；in'vetərət}
  \wordfamily{veteran；veterinary；redintegration（复原）}
  \wordsense{a. （尤指习惯、感情等）根深蒂固的，成癖的}
  \wordphrase{inveterate world travelers They're}
  \wordexample{My parents are inveterate world travelers. They're hardly ever at home.（周游 世界已成为我父母的习惯，他们几乎从不待在家里。）}
  \wordexample{inveterate world travelers They're}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{veteran}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VET；'vetərən}
  \wordfamily{inveterate（（尤指习惯、感情等）根深蒂固的）；veterinary（兽医的）；redintegration（复原）}
  \wordsense{n. 老手，富有经验的人；老兵；退伍军人}
  \wordphrase{veterans of two World Wars（经历两次世界大战的老兵）}
  \wordphrase{veteran teacher（经验丰富 的教师）}
  \wordphrase{veteran Rolls Royce（1916 年前制的老式劳斯莱斯汽车）}
  \wordexample{veterans of two World Wars（经历两次世界大战的老兵）}
  \wordexample{veteran teacher（经验丰富 的教师）}
  \wordexample{veteran Rolls Royce（1916 年前制的老式劳斯莱斯汽车）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{veterinary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VET；'vetrinəri}
  \wordfamily{veterinarian（兽医）；inveterate（（尤指习惯、感情等）根深蒂固的）；veteran（老手）}
  \wordsense{a. 兽医的}
  \wordphrase{veterinary surgeon / college（兽医 / 兽医学校）}
  \wordexample{veterinary surgeon / college（兽医 / 兽医学校）}
\end{word}



\chapter{VULN[VULT]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根VULN[VULT] 来自拉丁语的 vuln 意为 wound，它的变形为 vult。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{invulnerable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VULN[VULT]；不能使受伤的 in（= not）+ vuln（= wound）；in'vʌlnərəbl}
  \wordfamily{vulnerable；vulture；veterinary（兽医的）}
  \wordsense{a. 不能伤害的，固若金汤的；无懈可击的}
  \wordphrase{be invulnerable}
  \wordexample{Young men who take steroids can erroneously believe themselves to be invulnerable.（服用类固醇的年轻人会错误地认为他们是打不倒的。）}
  \wordexample{invulnerable（a.不能伤害的，固若金汤的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{vulnerable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VULN[VULT]；'vʌlnərəbl}
  \wordfamily{invulnerable（不能伤害的）；vulture（秃鹰）；veterinary（兽医的）}
  \wordsense{a. 易受伤的，易受攻击的；有弱点的}
  \wordphrase{position vulnerable to attack（易受攻击的位置）}
  \wordexample{people who are vulnerable to criticism（易受批评的人们）}
  \wordexample{position vulnerable to attack（易受攻击的位置）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{vulture}{'vʌltʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VULN[VULT]}
  \wordfamily{vulnerable；invulnerable；veterinary（兽医的）}
  \wordsense{n. 秃鹰；（从他人的不幸中牟取暴利的）贪婪的人 *}
  \wordphrase{a vulture（秃鹰）}
  \wordexample{a vulture（秃鹰）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MUT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MUT 来自拉丁语的 mut 意为 to change。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{immutable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；不能换的 im<in（= not）+ mut（= change）；i'mju:təbl}
  \wordfamily{transmute（改变（模样、性质、内容等））；mutable（易变的）；commute（交换）}
  \wordsense{a. 不变的}
  \wordphrase{immutable fact is that}
  \wordexample{An immutable fact is that everything that begins will eventually end.（一个不变的事实是任何事情都是有始有终的。）}
  \wordexample{immutable fact is that}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{transmute}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；完全改变 trans（= intensive）+ mut（= change）；trænz'mju:t}
  \wordfamily{transmutable（可变化的）；immutable（不变的）；mutable（易变的）}
  \wordsense{v. 改变（模样、性质、内容等）}
  \wordphrase{In the movie a}
  \wordexample{In the movie, a man is transmuted into a giant fly.（电影中，一个男人被变成了一只巨大的苍蝇。）}
  \wordexample{In the movie a}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{mutable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；'mju:təbl}
  \wordfamily{mutability（易变性）；immutable（不变的）；transmute（改变（模样、性质、内容等））}
  \wordsense{a. 易变的；变化无常的}
  \wordphrase{be mutable}
  \wordexample{Nature in all its mutable forms teaches us the lesson of death.（大自然以其变化无常的形态给我们死亡的教训。）}
  \wordexample{mutable（a.易变的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{commute}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT}
  \wordfamily{commutator（（电流）换向器）；immutable（不变的）；transmute（改变（模样、性质、内容等））}
  \wordsense{v. 交换；改变（尤指支付方式）；代替；减刑；（搭乘火车、汽车等，购买长期票）通 勤；改变（电流）方向 *}
  \wordphrase{commute an}
  \wordphrase{annuity for a lump sum（将年薪一次付清）}
  \wordexample{commute an annuity for a lump sum（将年薪一次付清）}
  \wordexample{annuity for a lump sum（将年薪一次付清）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{commutation}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；,kɔmju'teiʃn}
  \wordfamily{commute；commuter；mutable；permute；immutable（不变的）}
  \wordsense{n. 交换，变换；减刑；（购买长期票）通勤 *}
  \wordphrase{a commutation（交换，变换）}
  \wordexample{commutation of the death sentence to life imprisonment（将死刑改为终身监禁的减刑）}
  \wordexample{a commutation（交换，变换）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{commuter}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；kə'mju:tə(r)}
  \wordfamily{commutation；permute；commute；mutual；immutable（不变的）}
  \wordsense{n. 通勤者，长期车票使用者；（不住在大学宿舍的）走读学生 *}
  \wordphrase{commuter train（通勤火车）}
  \wordphrase{commuter marriage（两地往返婚姻，两地分居婚姻）}
  \wordexample{commuter train（通勤火车）}
  \wordexample{commuter marriage（两地往返婚姻，两地分居婚姻）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{permute}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；pə'mju:t}
  \wordfamily{immutable（不变的）；transmute（改变（模样、性质、内容等））；mutable（易变的）}
  \wordsense{v. 变更，交换；【数】排列 *}
  \wordphrase{to permute（变更，交换）}
  \wordexample{to permute（变更，交换）}
  \wordexample{permute（[pə'mju:t]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{mutual}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUT；'mju:tʃuəl}
  \wordfamily{understanding（相互怀疑 / 相爱 / 相互尊重 / 相互理解）；immutable（不变的）；transmute（改变（模样、性质、内容等））}
  \wordsense{a. 相互的，彼此的；共同的，共有的}
  \wordphrase{mutual suspicion / affection / respect /}
  \wordphrase{mutual assured destruction（确 保同归于尽，相互威慑理论（美苏双方相互遏制战略得以实施的前提，缩写：MAD））}
  \wordphrase{mutual fund（共有基金）}
  \wordexample{mutual suspicion / affection / respect / understanding（相互怀疑 / 相爱 / 相互尊重 / 相互理解）}
  \wordexample{mutual assured destruction（确 保同归于尽，相互威慑理论（美苏双方相互遏制战略得以实施的前提，缩写：MAD））}
  \wordexample{mutual fund（共有基金）}
\end{word}



\chapter{PUGN}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根PUGN 来自拉丁语的 pugn 意为 to fight。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 milit。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{impugn}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PUGN；针对某人打 im<in（= on, against）+ pugn（= fight）；im'pju:n}
  \wordfamily{repugnant；oppugn；pugnacious；pugilist}
  \wordsense{vt. 对（声明、行为、性质等）表示怀疑；驳斥，抨击}
  \wordphrase{impugn one's ethical standing}
  \wordexample{Immoral actions can impugn one's ethical standing.（不道德行为可使一个人的 道德立场受到怀疑。）}
  \wordexample{impugn one's ethical standing}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{repugnant}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PUGN；与某事敌对而打斗的 re（= back, against）+ pugn（= fight）；ri'pʌgnənt}
  \wordfamily{repugnance（厌恶，极其反感）；impugn（对（声明、行为、性质等）表示怀疑）；oppugn（提出异议）}
  \wordsense{a. 使人反感的，使人不快的，讨厌的}
  \wordphrase{repugnant}
  \wordexample{I think animal testing is morally repugnant.（从 道德上讲，我认为动物实验是令人憎恶的。）}
  \wordexample{repugnant}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{oppugn}{ə'pju:n}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PUGN}
  \wordfamily{repugnant；pugnacious；impugn；pugilist}
  \wordsense{v. 提出异议，反对 *}
  \wordphrase{to oppugn（提出异议，反对）}
  \wordexample{to oppugn（提出异议，反对）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pugnacious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PUGN；pʌg'neiʃəs}
  \wordfamily{pugnacity（好斗）；impugn（对（声明、行为、性质等）表示怀疑）；repugnant（使人反感的）}
  \wordsense{a. 好斗的，好战的}
  \wordphrase{be pugnacious（好斗的，好战的）}
  \wordexample{be pugnacious（好斗的，好战的）}
  \wordexample{pugnacious（[pʌg'neiʃəs]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pugilist}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PUGN；'pju:dʒilist}
  \wordfamily{pugilism（拳击）；bio（等）；impugn（对（声明、行为、性质等）表示怀疑）}
  \wordsense{n. 拳击选手}
  \wordphrase{viv，vit，vig / veg 和来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{pugilistic（拳击选手的；拳击的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{ANIM}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根ANIM 来自拉丁语的 anim 意为 life, mind, breath。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 viv，vit，vig / veg 和来自希腊语的 bio 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{inanimate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；没有生命、生气的 in（= not）+ anim（= life, mind, breath）；in'ænimət}
  \wordfamily{animosity；equanimity；animate；animation}
  \wordsense{a. 无生命的；无生气的，死气沉沉的，单调的}
  \wordphrase{inanimate objects possess soul}
  \wordexample{Some people believe that inanimate objects possess soul or spirit.（一些人相信 无生命物体也有灵魂和精神。）}
  \wordexample{inanimate objects possess soul}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{animosity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；ˌæni'mɔsəti}
  \wordfamily{inanimate；equanimity；animate；animation}
  \wordsense{n. 憎恶；敌意；仇恨}
  \wordphrase{animosity between us}
  \wordexample{We quarreled once but now there's little animosity between us.（我们之前虽有 过争执，不过现在我们之间几乎没有敌意。）}
  \wordexample{animosity between us}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{equanimity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；心不动，不变 equ（= equal, same）+ anim（= mind, life, breath）；ˌekwə'niməti}
  \wordfamily{animosity；animate；inanimate；animation}
  \wordsense{n. 平静，镇定，沉着}
  \wordphrase{equanimity}
  \wordexample{She's dealing with her lung cancer with inspiring equanimity.（面对肺癌，她表 现得极其镇定。）}
  \wordexample{equanimity}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{animate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；'ænimeit}
  \wordfamily{inanimate（无生命的）；animosity（憎恶）；equanimity（平静）}
  \wordsense{a. 活的；生机勃勃的}
  \wordphrase{animated cartoon（卡通影片）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "animated cartoon".（常见搭配：卡通影片。）}
  \wordsense{v. 赋予生命；使有活力；鼓舞；绘制（卡通影片）}
  \wordphrase{things animate and inanimate（生物和无生命物）}
  \wordexample{things animate and inanimate（生物和无生命物）}
  \wordexample{be animate（活的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{animation}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；ˌæni'meiʃn}
  \wordfamily{inanimate（无生命的）；animosity（憎恶）；equanimity（平静）}
  \wordsense{n. 生气，活力，活泼；动画片}
  \wordphrase{with animation（活泼地，生机勃勃地）}
  \wordexample{with animation（活泼地，生机勃勃地）}
  \wordexample{an animation（生气，活力，活泼）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{animal}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；'æniml}
  \wordfamily{animation；animism；animate；animadvert；inanimate（无生命的）}
  \wordsense{n. （包含人在内的）动物}
  \wordphrase{the animal}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of animal.（此处展示 animal 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 肉欲的；肉体的；动物的，兽类的}
  \wordphrase{animal kingdom（动物界）}
  \wordphrase{animal desires（肉欲）}
  \wordexample{animal kingdom（动物界）}
  \wordexample{animal desires（肉欲）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{animism}{'ænimizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM}
  \wordsense{n.万物有灵论（认为木石等也有灵魂的信仰）}
  \wordfamily{animal}
  \wordfamily{animadvert}
  \wordfamily{animation}
  \wordfamily{animus}
  \wordfamily{an animism（万物有灵论（认为木石等也有灵魂的信仰））}
  \wordphrase{an animism（万物有灵论（认为木石等也有灵魂的信仰））}
  \wordexample{an animism（万物有灵论（认为木石等也有灵魂的信仰））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{animadvert}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；ˌænimæd'və:t}
  \wordfamily{animadversion（批评，谴责）；inanimate（无生命的）；animosity（憎恶）}
  \wordsense{v. 批评，谴责 *}
  \wordphrase{to animadvert（批评，谴责）}
  \wordexample{to animadvert（批评，谴责）}
  \wordexample{animadvert（[ˌænimæd'və:t]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{animus}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；'æniməs}
  \wordfamily{animadvert；pusillanimous；animism；unanimous；inanimate（无生命的）}
  \wordsense{n. 恶意，敌意}
  \wordphrase{animus against me（对我的敌意）}
  \wordexample{animus against me（对我的敌意）}
  \wordexample{an animus（恶意，敌意）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{pusillanimous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；ˌpju:si'læniməs}
  \wordfamily{pusillanimity（懦弱，胆怯）；inanimate（无生命的）；animosity（憎恶）}
  \wordsense{a. 胆怯的，怯懦的 *}
  \wordphrase{be pusillanimous（胆怯的，怯懦的）}
  \wordexample{be pusillanimous（胆怯的，怯懦的）}
  \wordexample{pusillanimous（[ˌpju:si'læniməs]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{unanimous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANIM；ju'næniməs}
  \wordfamily{unanimously（全体一致地）；unanimity（全体一致）；inanimate（无生命的）}
  \wordsense{a. 全体一致的；无异议的 *}
  \wordphrase{unanimous decision（一致通过的判决，一致通过的决定）}
  \wordexample{unanimous decision（一致通过的判决，一致通过的决定）}
\end{word}



\chapter{AVI[AU]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根AVI[AU] 来自拉丁语的 avi 意为 bird，它的变形为 au。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{inauspicious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AVI[AU]；没法看见鸟的 in（= not）+ au<avi（= bird）+ spic（= look）；ˌinɔ:'spiʃəs}
  \wordfamily{inauspiciously（不吉利地）；auspicious（吉兆的）；aviation（飞行）}
  \wordsense{a. 不吉利的，不祥的}
  \wordphrase{be inauspicious}
  \wordexample{After an inauspicious first quarter, the team went on to win the game.（那个队在比赛起初的四分之一虽然有些不顺，但之后 却节节胜利，赢得了比赛。）}
  \wordexample{inauspicious（a.不吉利的，不祥的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{auspicious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AVI[AU]；看见鸟的 au<avi（= bird）+ spic（= look）；ɔ:'spiʃəs}
  \wordfamily{auspices（赞助，资助）；inauspicious（不吉利的）；aviation（飞行）}
  \wordsense{a. 吉兆的，吉利的，幸运的；有前途的}
  \wordphrase{auspicious moment presents itself}
  \wordexample{I plan to propose when an auspicious moment presents itself.（我打算在一个幸运的时刻求婚。）}
  \wordexample{auspicious moment presents itself}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{aviation}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AVI[AU]；,eivi'eiʃn}
  \wordfamily{inauspicious（不吉利的）；auspicious（吉兆的）；aviator（飞行员）}
  \wordsense{n. 飞行，航空；航空学}
  \wordphrase{civil aviation（民用航空）}
  \wordexample{aviation badge / cap / corps（飞行徽章 / 飞行帽 / 飞行队）}
  \wordexample{an aviation（飞行，航空）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{aviator}{'eivieitə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AVI[AU]}
  \wordsense{n.飞行员}
  \wordfamily{aviation}
  \wordfamily{auspicious}
  \wordfamily{inauspicious}
  \wordfamily{an aviator（飞行员）}
  \wordphrase{an aviator（飞行员）}
  \wordexample{an aviator（飞行员）}
\end{word}



\chapter{CALC[CULC]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根CALC[CULC] 来自拉丁语的 calc 意为 to tread，它的变形为 culc。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{inculcate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CALC[CULC]；为进入某人内心而踩踏 in（= in, on）+ culc<calc（= tread）；'inkʌlkeit}
  \wordfamily{recalcitrant（不服从的）；aviator（飞行员）；aviation（飞行）}
  \wordsense{vt. sth + in / into + sb 灌输；谆谆教诲}
  \wordphrase{Mr Scarrow inculcated in}
  \wordexample{Mr. Scarrow inculcated in us a deep respect for people of all races.（斯卡路先生谆谆教导我们要尊重所有种族的人。）}
  \wordexample{Mr Scarrow inculcated in}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{recalcitrant}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CALC[CULC]；ri'kælsitrənt}
  \wordfamily{recalcitrance（/ recalcitrancy（不服从，反抗）；inculcate（sth + in / into + sb 灌输）；aviator（飞行员）}
  \wordsense{a. 不服从的，反抗的；固执的 *}
  \wordphrase{bil，fort / forc，rob，val /}
  \wordexample{bil，fort / forc，rob，val / vail 等。}
  \wordexample{bil，fort / forc，rob，val /}
\end{word}



\chapter{FIRM}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根FIRM 来自拉丁语的 firm 意为 strong。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 bil，fort / forc，rob，val / vail 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{infirmity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM；不强壮的状态 in（= not）+ firm（= strong）；in'fə:məti}
  \wordfamily{infirm（虚弱的）；infirmary（医院）；affirm（坚称）}
  \wordsense{n. 虚弱，体弱；疾病，病症；（意志等的）薄弱}
  \wordphrase{infirmity her mind is}
  \wordexample{Despite Grandmother's physical infirmity, her mind is sharp as a tack.（奶奶尽管身体很虚弱，头脑却非常敏捷。）}
  \wordexample{infirmity her mind is}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{affirm}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM；ə'fə:m}
  \wordfamily{infirmity（虚弱）；affirmative（肯定的）；confirm（加强（势力、权力等））}
  \wordsense{v. 坚称，断言；肯定，确认，证实 *}
  \wordphrase{affirm the issue}
  \wordexample{affirm that the news is true（坚持消息属实）}
  \wordexample{It may be safely affirmed that\textasciitilde{}（可以很肯定地说……）}
  \wordexample{The witness affirmed to the fact.（证人证明确是事实。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{affirmative}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM；ə'fə:mətiv}
  \wordfamily{affirm；confirm；infirmity；confirmed}
  \wordsense{a. 肯定的；同意的 *}
  \wordphrase{affirmative action（= positive discrimination 积极区别对待政策（对因种族、性别等原因遭歧视的群体在就业等方面给予特别照顾））}
  \wordphrase{affirmative answer（肯定的回答）}
  \wordphrase{affirmative votes（赞成票）}
  \wordexample{affirmative action（= positive discrimination 积极区别对待政策（对因种族、性别等原因遭歧视的群体在就业等方面给予特别照顾））}
  \wordexample{affirmative answer（肯定的回答）}
  \wordexample{affirmative votes（赞成票）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{confirm}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM；kən'fə:m}
  \wordfamily{affirmative；confirmed；affirm；confirmation；infirmity（虚弱）}
  \wordsense{v. 加强（势力、权力等）；证实；认可，批准；确认；【宗】给……施坚信礼 *}
  \wordphrase{confirm the Treaty of Versailles（批准凡尔赛条约）}
  \wordphrase{confirm a reservation（确认预订）}
  \wordexample{What you tell me confirms my suspicions.（你所说的证实了我的怀疑。）}
  \wordexample{The report of an earthquake in Japan has now been confirmed.（日本发生地震的报道已经被证实。）}
  \wordexample{confirm the Treaty of Versailles（批准凡尔赛条约）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{confirmed}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM；kən'fə:md}
  \wordfamily{confirm；confirmation；affirmative；firmament；infirmity（虚弱）}
  \wordsense{a. 确定的，证实的；根深蒂固的；慢性的 *}
  \wordphrase{confirmed drunkard（饮酒成癖的人）}
  \wordphrase{confirmed disease（痼疾；慢性病）}
  \wordphrase{confirmed report（可靠的报道）}
  \wordexample{confirmed drunkard（饮酒成癖的人）}
  \wordexample{confirmed disease（痼疾；慢性病）}
  \wordexample{confirmed report（可靠的报道）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{confirmation}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM；,kɔnfə'meiʃn}
  \wordfamily{confirmed；firmament；confirm；affirmative；infirmity（虚弱）}
  \wordsense{n. 确定，确认，确证；认可，批准；坚信礼 *}
  \wordphrase{in confirmation of（以证实……）}
  \wordexample{in confirmation of（以证实……）}
  \wordexample{a confirmation（确定，确认，确证）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{firmament}{'fə:məmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIRM}
  \wordfamily{inscrutably（不可知地）；infirmity（虚弱）；affirm（坚称）}
  \wordsense{n. （the \textasciitilde{}）天空；苍天}
  \wordphrase{the firmament}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of firmament.（此处展示 firmament 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 不可知的；难以理解的}
  \wordphrase{I can read my}
  \wordexample{I can read my dog, but my cat is utterly inscrutable.（我可以理解我的狗，但却完全无法看透我的猫。）}
  \wordexample{I can read my}
\end{word}



\chapter{SCRUT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根SCRUT 来自拉丁语的 scrut 意为 to examine。
  \item inscrutable 【不能调查的 in（= not）+ scrut（= examine）】
  \item [in'skru:təbl] a.不可知的；难以理解的
  \item (4) inscrutably 不可知地；难以理解地 (3) I can read my dog, but my cat is utterly inscrutable.（我可以理解我的狗，但却完全无法看透我的猫。）
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{scrutiny}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCRUT；'skru:təni}
  \wordfamily{scrutinize；scrutineer；firmament（（the \textasciitilde{}）天）}
  \wordsense{n. 仔细的检查；细看；监督；（特指）选票复查}
  \wordphrase{demand a scrutiny（要求复查选票）}
  \wordexample{demand a scrutiny（要求复查选票）}
  \wordexample{a scrutiny（仔细的检查）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{scrutinize}{'skru:tənaiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCRUT}
  \wordsense{v.仔细检查；细看}
  \wordfamily{scrutiny}
  \wordfamily{scrutineer}
  \wordfamily{to scrutinize（仔细检查）}
  \wordphrase{to scrutinize（仔细检查）}
  \wordexample{to scrutinize（仔细检查）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{scrutineer}{,skru:tə'niə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCRUT}
  \wordsense{n.监票人}
  \wordfamily{scrutinize}
  \wordfamily{scrutiny}
  \wordfamily{a scrutineer（监票人）}
  \wordphrase{a scrutineer（监票人）}
  \wordexample{a scrutineer（监票人）}
\end{word}



\chapter{SURG, SURRECT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根SURG, SURRECT 来自拉丁语的 surg，surrect 意为 to rise。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{insurgent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SURG, SURRECT；在内部反抗暴起 in（= in, against）+ surg（= rise）；in'sə:dʒənt}
  \wordfamily{resurgent；surge；insurrection；resurrection}
  \wordsense{a. 暴动的；叛乱的，谋反的}
  \wordphrase{be insurgent}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of insurgent.（此处展示 insurgent 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 暴动者；（政党内部的）反对派}
  \wordphrase{insurgent military officers led}
  \wordexample{A group of insurgent military officers led a revolt against him.（一群反对派军官发动了颠覆他的叛乱。）}
  \wordexample{insurgent military officers led}
  \wordexample{insurgent（a.暴动的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{resurgent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SURG, SURRECT；ri'sə:dʒənt}
  \wordfamily{insurgent（暴动的）；surge（汹涌）；insurrection（暴动）}
  \wordsense{a. 复苏的；复活的 *}
  \wordphrase{resurgent hopes / nationalism（重生的希望 / 复苏的民族主义）}
  \wordexample{resurgent hopes / nationalism（重生的希望 / 复苏的民族主义）}
  \wordexample{be resurgent（复苏的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{surge}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SURG, SURRECT；sə:dʒ}
  \wordfamily{resurgent；insurrection；insurgent；resurrection}
  \wordsense{n. 汹涌；波涛}
  \wordphrase{the surge}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of surge.（此处展示 surge 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 汹涌澎湃；（人）蜂拥而至}
  \wordphrase{surge of the sea（大海的汹涌澎湃）}
  \wordexample{a surge of anger / pity（勃然大怒 / 油然而生的怜悯之情）}
  \wordexample{surge of the sea（大海的汹涌澎湃）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{insurrection}{,insə'rekʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SURG, SURRECT}
  \wordfamily{surge；resurrection；resurgent；resurrect；insurgent（暴动的）}
  \wordsense{n. 暴动，叛乱 *}
  \wordphrase{an insurrection（暴动，叛乱）}
  \wordexample{an insurrection（暴动，叛乱）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{resurrection}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SURG, SURRECT；,rezə'rekʃn}
  \wordfamily{insurgent（暴动的）；resurgent（复苏的）；surge（汹涌）}
  \wordsense{n. 复活，复兴；（the R\textasciitilde{}）耶稣复活 *}
  \wordphrase{resurrection of hopes（希望的复苏）}
  \wordexample{resurrection of hopes（希望的复苏）}
  \wordexample{a resurrection（复活，复兴）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{resurrect}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SURG, SURRECT；,rezə'rekt}
  \wordfamily{insurgent（暴动的）；resurgent（复苏的）；surge（汹涌）}
  \wordsense{v. 使再流行；使复活，使复兴；挖出 *}
  \wordphrase{moderate, to stretch。}
  \wordexample{resurrect an old word / custom（使古老的词再次流行 / 恢复旧的习俗）}
  \wordexample{My dog resurrected an old bone in the garden.（我的狗在花园里挖出一块老骨头。）}
\end{word}



\chapter{TEMPER}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根TEMPER 来自拉丁语的 temper 意为 moderate, to stretch。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{intemperate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEMPER；不节制的 in（= not）+ temper（= moderate, stretch）；in'tempərət}
  \wordfamily{intemperance（无节制，过度）；intemperately（无节制地，过度地）；temperament（气质）}
  \wordsense{a. 无节制的；放纵的}
  \wordphrase{intemperate words}
  \wordexample{She later felt enormous remorse for her intemperate words.（她后来对自己肆无忌惮的言语感到非常后悔。）}
  \wordexample{intemperate words}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{temperament}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEMPER；'temprəmənt}
  \wordfamily{intemperate；temperamental；temperance；temperate}
  \wordsense{n. 气质；性格，性情；易激动的（或急躁的、易兴奋的）脾气}
  \wordphrase{girl with a nervous temperament（神经质的女孩）}
  \wordexample{girl with a nervous temperament（神经质的女孩）}
  \wordexample{a temperament（气质）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{temperamental}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEMPER；,temprə'mentl}
  \wordfamily{temperament；temperance；intemperate；temperate}
  \wordsense{a. 气质引起的，出自本性的；性急的；不冷静的，喜怒无常的}
  \wordphrase{temperamental dislike for study（生性不喜欢学习）}
  \wordphrase{temperamental tennis player（不冷静的网球选手）}
  \wordexample{temperamental dislike for study（生性不喜欢学习）}
  \wordexample{temperamental tennis player（不冷静的网球选手）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{temperance}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEMPER；'tempərəns}
  \wordfamily{temperamental；temperate；temperament；temperature；intemperate（无节制的）}
  \wordsense{n. （言行上的）节制，自制；戒酒，禁酒}
  \wordphrase{temperance drinks（无酒精的饮料）}
  \wordphrase{temperance movement / society（戒酒运动 / 戒酒协会）}
  \wordphrase{temperance pledge（发誓戒酒）}
  \wordexample{temperance drinks（无酒精的饮料）}
  \wordexample{temperance movement / society（戒酒运动 / 戒酒协会）}
  \wordexample{temperance pledge（发誓戒酒）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{temperate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEMPER；'tempərət}
  \wordfamily{temperately（节制地）；intemperate（无节制的）；temperament（气质）}
  \wordsense{a. 节制的；克制的；不过分的；适度的；（气候等）温和的}
  \wordphrase{north temperate zone（北温带）}
  \wordexample{Be more temperate in your language, please.（请注意控制您的言辞。）}
  \wordexample{north temperate zone（北温带）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{temperature}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEMPER；'temprətʃə(r)}
  \wordfamily{phor（/ pher）；intemperate（无节制的）；temperament（气质）}
  \wordsense{n. 温度；体温；发烧}
  \wordphrase{mean temperature of May（5 月的平均气温）}
  \wordphrase{have a / no temperature（发烧 / 不发烧）}
  \wordphrase{fer，lat，ger / gest，port 和来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{take the temperatures of all the patients（测量所有患者的体温）}
  \wordexample{mean temperature of May（5 月的平均气温）}
  \wordexample{have a / no temperature（发烧 / 不发烧）}
\end{word}



\chapter{VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX] 来自拉丁语的 veh，vect 意为 to carry，它们的变形为 veigh，vex。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 fer，lat，ger / gest，port 和来自希腊语的 phor / pher。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{invective}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]；向某人心里运 in（= in, into, to, against）+ vect（= carry）；in'vektiv}
  \wordfamily{convection；vehement；vehicle；inveigh}
  \wordsense{n. 痛骂；抨击；（pl.）骂人的话}
  \wordphrase{invective}
  \wordexample{The movie review was an exercise in unmitigated invective.（那篇影评是一篇十足的谩骂之词。）}
  \wordexample{invective}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{convection}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]}
  \wordfamily{convector（对流式暖器，加热机）；invective（痛骂）；vehement（（感情）激烈的）}
  \wordsense{n. 传送；对流 *con<com（= together）,}
  \wordphrase{convection current（对流）}
  \wordexample{convection current（对流）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{vehement}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]；'viəmənt}
  \wordfamily{invective（痛骂）；convection（传送）；vehicle（（陆上的）交通工具）}
  \wordsense{a. （感情）激烈的；（人或言行等）热烈的，充满感情的；猛烈的}
  \wordphrase{a man of vehement character（热情的人）}
  \wordphrase{vehement desires / passions（强烈的欲望 / 激情）}
  \wordphrase{vehement wind（强风）}
  \wordexample{a man of vehement character（热情的人）}
  \wordexample{vehement desires / passions（强烈的欲望 / 激情）}
  \wordexample{vehement wind（强风）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{vehicle}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]；'vi:əkl}
  \wordfamily{invective（痛骂）；convection（传送）；vehement（（感情）激烈的）}
  \wordsense{n. （陆上的）交通工具，车辆；手段；媒介物 *}
  \wordphrase{Department of Motor Vehicles（（美国州政府的）机动车辆局（缩写：DMV））}
  \wordexample{Department of Motor Vehicles（（美国州政府的）机动车辆局（缩写：DMV））}
  \wordexample{Art may be used as a vehicle of propaganda.（艺术可以被用做宣传手段。）}
  \wordexample{Language is the vehicle of human thought.（语言是传达人们思想的手段。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{inveigh}{in'vei}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]}
  \wordfamily{vehicle；convex；vehement；convection；invective（痛骂）}
  \wordsense{v. 猛烈抨击，痛骂 *in（= against）,}
  \wordphrase{to inveigh（猛烈抨击，痛骂）}
  \wordexample{to inveigh（猛烈抨击，痛骂）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{convex}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEH, VECT[VEIGH, VEX]；'kɔnveks}
  \wordfamily{convexity（凸状，凸面体）；invective（痛骂）；convection（传送）}
  \wordsense{a. 凸的；凸面的 *}
  \wordphrase{convex lens（凸透镜）}
  \wordexample{convex lens（凸透镜）}
\end{word}



\chapter{PECU}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根PECU 来自拉丁语的 pecu 意为 money。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 lucr。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{impecunious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PECU；没有钱的 im<in（= not）+ pecu（= money）；,impi'kju:niəs}
  \wordfamily{peculate；pecuniary；convex（凸的）}
  \wordsense{a. 没有钱的，身无分文的}
  \wordphrase{impecunious pals and I}
  \wordexample{My impecunious pals and I have learned to have fun on a budget.（我和我那些穷朋友们学会了从精打细算中获得乐趣。）}
  \wordexample{impecunious pals and I}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{peculate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PECU；'pekjuleit}
  \wordfamily{peculation（挪用，盗用，侵吞）；peculator（挪用公款者）；impecunious（没有钱的）}
  \wordsense{v. 侵吞，盗用，挪用（公款等） *}
  \wordphrase{to peculate（侵吞，盗用，挪用（公款等））}
  \wordexample{to peculate（侵吞，盗用，挪用（公款等））}
  \wordexample{peculate（['pekjuleit]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{pecuniary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PECU；pi'kju:niəri}
  \wordfamily{impecunious（没有钱的）；peculate（侵吞）；convex（凸的）}
  \wordsense{a. 金钱的}
  \wordphrase{pecuniary aid（资金援助）}
  \wordphrase{work without pecuniary reward（没有酬金的工作）}
  \wordexample{pecuniary aid（资金援助）}
  \wordexample{work without pecuniary reward（没有酬金的工作）}
\end{word}



\chapter{TURB}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根TURB 来自拉丁语的 turb 意为 to agitate。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{imperturbable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；没有剧烈地动摇的 im<in（= not）+ per（= intensive）+ turb（= agitate）；,impə'tə:bəbl}
  \wordfamily{imperturbability（/ imperturbation 沉着，冷静，泰然）；perturb（扰乱）；turbulent（狂暴的）}
  \wordsense{a. 不易激动的；冷静的，泰然的}
  \wordphrase{imperturbable but I have}
  \wordexample{My wife is imperturbable, but I have a hell of a temper.（我妻子是一个非常冷静的人，而我却是一个脾气暴躁的人。）}
  \wordexample{imperturbable but I have}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{perturb}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；剧烈晃动、使动摇 per（= intensive）+ turb（= agitate）；pə'tə:b}
  \wordfamily{perturbation（混乱）；imperturbable（不易激动的）；turbulent（狂暴的）}
  \wordsense{vt. 扰乱，使混乱；使心烦意乱，使不安，使忧虑}
  \wordphrase{perturbs me that you}
  \wordexample{It perturbs me that you keep spreading false rumors about me.（你一直在散播有关我的虚假传闻，这让我很烦。）}
  \wordexample{perturbs me that you}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{turbulent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；'tə:bjulənt}
  \wordfamily{turbulence（动乱，骚乱）；turbulently（狂暴地）；imperturbable（不易激动的）}
  \wordsense{a. 狂暴的，凶猛的；混乱的，骚乱的；动荡的}
  \wordphrase{turbulent ones}
  \wordexample{The years before my parents' divorce were turbulent ones.（我父母离婚前的那几年是一段动荡的岁月。）}
  \wordexample{turbulent ones}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{disturb}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；di'stə:b}
  \wordfamily{Don't（disturb.（禁止出入）；imperturbable（不易激动的）；perturb（扰乱）}
  \wordsense{v. 打扰（正在休息、工作、思考的人）；扰乱，搅乱；使心神不安 *}
  \wordphrase{disturb the peace（扰乱治安）}
  \wordexample{I hope I'm not disturbing you?（我没有打扰你吧？）}
  \wordexample{disturb the peace（扰乱治安）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{disturbance}{di'stə:bəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB}
  \wordfamily{disturb；turbid；turbulent；turbine；imperturbable（不易激动的）}
  \wordsense{n. 打扰；混乱；不安；骚乱 *}
  \wordphrase{a disturbance（打扰）}
  \wordexample{a disturbance（打扰）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{turbid}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；'tə:bid}
  \wordfamily{disturbance；turbine；disturb；turbojet；imperturbable（不易激动的）}
  \wordsense{a. 紊乱的，混乱的；（液体）浑浊的，污浊的}
  \wordphrase{turbid thoughts（混乱的思想）}
  \wordphrase{turbid imagination（混乱的想像）}
  \wordphrase{turbid waters / rivers（浑浊的水 / 河水）}
  \wordexample{turbid thoughts（混乱的思想）}
  \wordexample{turbid imagination（混乱的想像）}
  \wordexample{turbid waters / rivers（浑浊的水 / 河水）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{turbine}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；'tə:bain}
  \wordfamily{imperturbable（不易激动的）；perturb（扰乱）；turbulent（狂暴的）}
  \wordsense{n. 涡轮机（由水等的流动推动轮子上的叶片旋转而产生动力的引擎）}
  \wordphrase{a turbine（涡轮机（由水等的流动推动轮子上的叶片旋转而产生动力的引擎））}
  \wordexample{a turbine（涡轮机（由水等的流动推动轮子上的叶片旋转而产生动力的引擎））}
  \wordexample{turbine（['tə:bain]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{turbojet}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TURB；'tə:bəudʒet}
  \wordfamily{imperturbable（不易激动的）；perturb（扰乱）；turbulent（狂暴的）}
  \wordsense{n. 涡轮喷气发动机；涡轮喷气飞机}
  \wordphrase{turbojet engine（涡轮喷气发动机）}
  \wordphrase{dic / dict，fa / fam / fess，locut / loqu，nounc / nunci，parl 和来自希腊语的}
  \wordphrase{phras，pha / phe / phu。}
  \wordexample{turbojet engine（涡轮喷气发动机）}
\end{word}



\chapter{OR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根OR 来自拉丁语的 or 意为 to say。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 dic / dict，fa / fam / fess，locut / loqu，nounc / nunci，parl 和来自希腊语的 phras，pha / phe / phu。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{inexorable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR；到最后都没说的 in（= not）+ ex（= out）+ or（= say）；in'eksərəbl}
  \wordfamily{inexorably（无情地，冷酷地）；oration（演讲）；adore（崇拜）}
  \wordsense{a. 无情的，冷酷的；不可阻挡的}
  \wordphrase{inexorable march}
  \wordexample{Nothing, not even an Einstein, can halt the inexorable march of time.（没有任何事物，甚至爱因斯坦，也无法阻止时间无情的流逝。）}
  \wordexample{inexorable march}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{oration}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR；ɔ:'reiʃn}
  \wordfamily{inexorable（无情的）；adore（崇拜）；adoration（崇拜）}
  \wordsense{n. 演讲，致词}
  \wordphrase{oration}
  \wordexample{A group of placard-carrying protestors repeatedly interrupted her oration.（一群举着标语牌的示威者不停地打断她的演讲。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{adore}{ə'dɔ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR}
  \wordfamily{oration；adoration；inexorable；exorcise}
  \wordsense{v. 崇拜，敬爱；爱慕 *}
  \wordphrase{to adore（崇拜，敬爱）}
  \wordexample{to adore（崇拜，敬爱）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{adoration}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR；,ædə'reiʃn}
  \wordfamily{inexorable（无情的）；oration（演讲）；adore（崇拜）}
  \wordsense{n. 崇拜，崇敬；爱慕 *}
  \wordphrase{an adoration（崇拜，崇敬）}
  \wordexample{an adoration（崇拜，崇敬）}
  \wordexample{adoration（[,ædə'reiʃn]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{exorcise}{'eksɔ:saiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR}
  \wordfamily{adoration；oracle；adore；oracular；inexorable（无情的）}
  \wordsense{v. （用祈祷、魔法等）驱走（恶魔） *}
  \wordphrase{to exorcise（驱走（恶魔））}
  \wordexample{to exorcise（驱走（恶魔））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{oracle}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR；'ɔrəkl}
  \wordfamily{exorcise；oracular；adoration；oral；inexorable（无情的）}
  \wordsense{n. 神谕，圣谕；哲人}
  \wordphrase{consult the oracle（请示神谕）}
  \wordexample{consult the oracle（请示神谕）}
  \wordexample{an oracle（神谕，圣谕）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{oracular}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR；ɔ'rækjulə(r)}
  \wordfamily{oracle；oral；exorcise；orate；inexorable（无情的）}
  \wordsense{a. 神谕的；晦涩的，玄妙的}
  \wordphrase{oracular utterances（玄妙费解的言辞）}
  \wordexample{oracular utterances（玄妙费解的言辞）}
  \wordexample{be oracular（神谕的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{oral}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR；'ɔ:rəl}
  \wordfamily{oracular；orate；oracle；orator；inexorable（无情的）}
  \wordsense{a. 口头的，口述的；口部的}
  \wordphrase{be oral（口头的，口述的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be oral".（常见搭配：口头的，口述的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 口试}
  \wordphrase{the oral cavity（口腔）}
  \wordexample{the oral cavity（口腔）}
  \wordexample{be oral（口头的，口述的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{orate}{ɔ:'reit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR}

  \wordfamily{oratorical}
  \wordfamily{peroration}
  \wordfamily{orator}
  \wordfamily{orate}
  \wordfamily{an oratory（雄辩（术））}
  \wordphrase{an oratory（雄辩（术））}
  \wordexample{an oratory（雄辩（术））}

\begin{word}[*]{peroration}{,perə'reiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OR}
  \wordfamily{oratory；oratorical；orator；orate；inexorable（无情的）}
  \wordsense{n. （演讲的）结束语，结论 *}
  \wordphrase{a peroration（结束语，结论）}

\chapter{NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV] 来自拉丁语的 nat，nasc 意为 to be born，变形为 naiss，naiv。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{innate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；从出生时起就在某人之内的 in（= in）+ nat（= to be born）；i'neit}
  \wordfamily{nascent；nation；national；nationalism}
  \wordsense{a. 天生的，天赋的，与生俱来的}
  \wordphrase{innate ability}
  \wordexample{Birds have a miraculous, innate ability to navigate across continents.（鸟类天生就具有飞越大陆的惊人的能力。）}
  \wordexample{innate ability}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{nascent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；出生的 nasc（= born, native）；'næsnt}
  \wordfamily{innate；nation；national；nationalism}
  \wordsense{a. 尚未形成的；初期的}
  \wordphrase{nascent age}
  \wordexample{The nascent age of Internet communication has had its pitfalls.（早期的互联网通讯有缺陷。）}
  \wordexample{nascent age}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{nation}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；'neiʃn}
  \wordfamily{nationhood（作为一个独立国家的地位）；nationwide（全国的）；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 国家；民族；国民}
  \wordphrase{a nation（国家）}
  \wordexample{a nation（国家）}
  \wordexample{nation（['neiʃn]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{national}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；'næʃnəl}
  \wordfamily{nation；nationalism；nascent；nationalist；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{a. 国家的；国民的；民族的；国有的，国营的，国立的；全国性的}
  \wordphrase{be national}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of national.（此处展示 national 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 国民，国人}
  \wordphrase{National Security Council（国家安全委员会）}
  \wordphrase{National Assembly（（韩国、法国等的）国民大会）}
  \wordphrase{National Convention（（政党的）全国代表大会）}
  \wordexample{national anthem / debt / flag / holiday / language / mourning（国歌 / 国债 / 国旗 / 国定假日 / 国语 / 国葬）}
  \wordexample{National Security Council（国家安全委员会）}
  \wordexample{National Assembly（（韩国、法国等的）国民大会）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{nationalism}{'næʃnəlizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]}
  \wordsense{n.民族主义；国家主义；（受他国控制国家在政治上、经济上的）民族独立运动}
  \wordfamily{national}
  \wordfamily{nationalist}
  \wordfamily{nation}
  \wordfamily{nationality}
  \wordfamily{a nationalism（民族主义）}
  \wordphrase{a nationalism（民族主义）}
  \wordexample{a nationalism（民族主义）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{nationalist}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]}
  \wordfamily{nationalistic（民族主义（者）的）；innate（天生的）；nascent（尚未形成的）}
  \wordsense{n. 民族主义者；国家主义者；民族独立运动拥护者；（N\textasciitilde{}）民族主义（或国家主义）政党成员}
  \wordphrase{a nationalist（民族主义者）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a nationalist".（常见搭配：民族主义者。）}
  \wordsense{a. 民族（或国家）主义的；独立运动的；（N\textasciitilde{}）民族主义（或国家主义）政党成员的}
  \wordphrase{nationalist movement in Zimbabwe（津巴布韦的民族独立运动）}
  \wordexample{nationalist movement in Zimbabwe（津巴布韦的民族独立运动）}
  \wordexample{a nationalist（民族主义者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{nationality}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；,næʃə'næləti}
  \wordfamily{nationalist；nationalize；nationalism；nationalization；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 国籍}
  \wordphrase{ship of unidentified nationality（国籍不明的船只）}
  \wordphrase{men of all nationalities（各国的人）}
  \wordexample{What is your nationality?（你是哪国人？）}
  \wordexample{ship of unidentified nationality（国籍不明的船只）}
  \wordexample{men of all nationalities（各国的人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{nationalize}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；'næʃnəlaiz}
  \wordfamily{nationality；nationalization；nationalist；native；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{v. 国有化；使成为国家}
  \wordphrase{to nationalize（国有化）}
  \wordexample{nationalize the railways / the coal mines / the steel industry（使铁路 / 煤矿 / 钢铁工业国有化）}
  \wordexample{to nationalize（国有化）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{nationalization}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；,næʃnəlai'zeiʃn}
  \wordfamily{nationalize；native；nationality；nativity；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 国有化}
  \wordphrase{nationalization of the railways（铁路的国有化）}
  \wordexample{nationalization of the railways（铁路的国有化）}
  \wordexample{a nationalization（国有化）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{native}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]}
  \wordfamily{nationalization；nativity；nationalize；nature；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 本地人；土著民；原产地的动、植物}
  \wordphrase{the native}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of native.（此处展示 native 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 出生的；出生地的；土著民的；与生俱来的，天生的，先天的；本土的；本国的；（\textasciitilde{}to）（动、植物等的）土生的；（金属）天然的}
  \wordphrase{native speaker of English（母语为英语的人）}
  \wordexample{native of New York / South Korea（土生土长的纽约人 / 韩国人）}
  \wordexample{native speaker of English（母语为英语的人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{nativity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；nə'tivəti}
  \wordfamily{native；nature；nationalization；natural；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 出生，诞生；（the Nativity）耶稣降生（图）}
  \wordphrase{Nativity Play（耶稣诞生剧）}
  \wordexample{Nativity Play（耶稣诞生剧）}
  \wordexample{a nativity（出生，诞生）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{nature}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；'neitʃə(r)}
  \wordfamily{naturism（裸体主义）；naturist（裸体主义者）；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 自然，自然界；自然力；自然状态，原始状态；天性，本性；性质；种类；生命力；人体的本能（或需要）}
  \wordphrase{the laws of nature（自然（界）法则）}
  \wordphrase{things of this nature（这种事）}
  \wordphrase{ease / relieve nature（大便 / 小便）}
  \wordexample{Nature failed at last.（最终耗尽了生命力。）}
  \wordexample{the laws of nature（自然（界）法则）}
  \wordexample{things of this nature（这种事）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{natural}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]}
  \wordfamily{naturalism（自然主义）；naturalistic（自然主义的）；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{a. 自然的；自然界的；自然发生的；天生的，天赋的；自然状态的；天然的，不做作的；正常的；合乎自然规律的；【音】本位音的}
  \wordphrase{be natural}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of natural.（此处展示 natural 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 天生有才能的人；白痴；本位音}
  \wordphrase{natural enemy（天敌）}
  \wordphrase{natural gas（天然气）}
  \wordphrase{natural resources（自然资源）}
  \wordexample{natural enemy（天敌）}
  \wordexample{natural gas（天然气）}
  \wordexample{natural resources（自然资源）}

  \wordfamily{natural；naturalize；nature；renascent；innate（天生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 博物学者（尤指直接观察动、植物者） *}
  \wordphrase{a naturalist（博物学者（尤指直接观察动、植物者））}
  \wordexample{a naturalist（博物学者（尤指直接观察动、植物者））}

\begin{word}[***]{naturalize}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；'nætʃrəlaiz}
  \wordfamily{innate（天生的）；nascent（尚未形成的）；nation（国家）}
  \wordsense{v. 使（外国出生的人）加入国籍，使归化；采纳（外语、外国的风俗习惯等），吸收；使动、植物适应异域生长环境}
  \wordphrase{She was naturalized in}
  \wordexample{She was naturalized in South Korea.（她加入了韩国国籍。）}
  \wordexample{She was naturalized in}
\end{word}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 NAT, NASC[NAISS, NAIV]；ri'neisnt}

  \wordsense{a. 新生的；再生的，复兴的 *}

  \wordexample{Renaissance art（文艺复兴时期的艺术）}

\chapter{MACUL}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MACUL 来自拉丁语的 macul 意为 stain, spot。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{immaculate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MACUL；没有瑕疵、污点的 im<in（= not）+ macul（= stain, spot）；i'mækjulət}
  \wordfamily{macula；renaissance（复活）；renascent（新生的）}
  \wordsense{a. 清白的；没有瑕疵的，完美的；没有污点的，洁净的}
  \wordphrase{immaculate you could serve}
  \wordexample{My mother's kitchen was so immaculate you could serve a meal on the floor.（我妈妈的厨房干净得可以让你在地上就餐。）}
  \wordexample{immaculate you could serve}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{macula}{'mækjulə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MACUL}
  \wordfamily{immaculate；renaissance（复活）；renascent（新生的）}
  \wordsense{n. 斑点}
  \wordphrase{a macula（斑点）}
  \wordexample{a macula（斑点）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MUR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MUR 来自拉丁语的 mur 意为 wall。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{immure}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUR；关在墙内 im<in（= in）+ mur（= wall）；i'mjuə(r)}
  \wordfamily{intramural；extramural；mural}
  \wordsense{vt. oneself + in + sth 使闭门不出；监禁，禁闭}
  \wordphrase{The old woman immured}
  \wordexample{The old woman immured herself in her cottage and died there years later.（那个老妇人在自己的小屋内闭门不出，几年后死在那里。）}
  \wordexample{The old woman immured}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{intramural}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUR；,intrə'mjuərəl}
  \wordfamily{immure；extramural；mural}
  \wordsense{a. 同一校内的；同一城市的 *}
  \wordphrase{be intramural（同一校内的）}
  \wordexample{take third place in the hundred-meter dash in the intramural track meet（在校内田径运动会的 100 米短跑中取得第三名）}
  \wordexample{be intramural（同一校内的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{extramural}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUR；,ekstrə'mjuərəl}
  \wordfamily{intramural；mural；immure}
  \wordsense{a. （大学等的）校园外的；（城邑等）边界外的 *}
  \wordphrase{be extramural（校园外的）}
  \wordexample{extramural lectures / studies / students（校外课程 / 学习 / 学生）}
  \wordexample{be extramural（校园外的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{mural}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MUR；'mjuərəl}
  \wordfamily{immure（oneself + in + sth 使闭门不出）；intramural（同一校内的）；extramural（（大学等的）校园外的）}
  \wordsense{a. 墙壁的；墙壁似的；墙壁上的}
  \wordphrase{be mural}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of mural.（此处展示 mural 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 壁画}
  \wordphrase{mural painting（壁画）}
  \wordexample{mural painting（壁画）}
\end{word}



\chapter{LUCT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根LUCT 来自拉丁语的 luct 意为 to struggle。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{ineluctable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUCT；想逃脱却无法挣扎的 in（= not）+ e<ex（= out）+ luct（= struggle）；,ini'lʌktəbl}
  \wordfamily{reluctant；reluctance；mural（墙壁的）}
  \wordsense{a. 不可避免的，不可抗拒的}
  \wordphrase{ineluctable frailty}
  \wordexample{She's a victim of the ineluctable frailty of old age.（她无法抗拒年老带来的衰弱。）}
  \wordexample{ineluctable frailty}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{reluctant}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUCT；ri'lʌktənt}
  \wordfamily{reluctantly（不情愿地，勉强地）；ineluctable（不可避免的）；reluctance（勉强）}
  \wordsense{a. 不情愿的，勉强的 *}
  \wordphrase{reluctant helpers（不情愿地帮人的人）}
  \wordphrase{reluctant recruit into the army（不得已参军的新兵）}
  \wordphrase{reluctant dragon（避战凶龙，指力图避免冲突的领导者）}
  \wordexample{reluctant helpers（不情愿地帮人的人）}
  \wordexample{reluctant recruit into the army（不得已参军的新兵）}
  \wordexample{reluctant dragon（避战凶龙，指力图避免冲突的领导者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{reluctance}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUCT；ri'lʌktəns}
  \wordfamily{fract（/ frag[fring]）；ineluctable（不可避免的）；reluctant（不情愿的）}
  \wordsense{n. 勉强，不情愿 *}
  \wordphrase{without / with reluctance（自愿，情愿 / 勉强）}
  \wordexample{without / with reluctance（自愿，情愿 / 勉强）}
\end{word}



\chapter{RUPT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根RUPT 来自拉丁语的 rupt 意为 to break。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 fract / frag[fring]。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{interrupt}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT；从其间打碎 inter（= between）+ rupt（= break）；,intə'rʌpt}
  \wordfamily{disrupt；abrupt；bankrupt；bankruptcy}
  \wordsense{vt. 中断，阻断；打断}
  \wordphrase{interrupted for an important}
  \wordexample{Regular programming was interrupted for an important news bulletin.（正常的节目被插播的重要新闻快报打断了。）}
  \wordexample{interrupted for an important}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{disrupt}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT；分开打破、粉碎 dis（= apart）+ rupt（= break）；dis'rʌpt}
  \wordfamily{disruption（分裂）；disruptive（分裂的）；interrupt（中断）}
  \wordsense{vt. 使（国家、制度、同盟等）分裂；使崩溃，粉碎；使（交通、通信等）暂时不通；使中断；使陷入混乱}
  \wordphrase{disrupted the class}
  \wordexample{A violent fight between two female students disrupted the class.（两个女生激烈的争吵扰乱了课堂。）}
  \wordexample{disrupted the class}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{abrupt}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT}
  \wordfamily{disrupt；bankrupt；interrupt；bankruptcy}
  \wordsense{a. 意外的，突然的；（语言、行动等）鲁莽的，生硬的；不连贯的；陡峭的 *}
  \wordphrase{abrupt turns（急转弯）}
  \wordphrase{man with an abrupt manner（举止鲁莽的人）}
  \wordexample{abrupt turns（急转弯）}
  \wordexample{man with an abrupt manner（举止鲁莽的人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{bankrupt}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT}
  \wordfamily{interrupt（中断）；disrupt（使（国家、制度、同盟等）分裂）；abrupt（意外的）}
  \wordsense{a. 破产的}
  \wordphrase{go bankrupt（破产）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "go bankrupt".（常见搭配：破产。）}
  \wordsense{n. 破产者；（在某方面）完全丧失的人}
  \wordphrase{go bankrupt（破产）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "go bankrupt".（常见搭配：破产。）}
  \wordsense{v. 使破产 *}
  \wordphrase{go bankrupt（破产）}
  \wordexample{be bankrupt（破产的 n.破产者）}
  \wordexample{to bankrupt（使破产）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{bankruptcy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT；'bæŋkrʌptsi}
  \wordfamily{bankrupt；corrupt；abrupt；corruptible；interrupt（中断）}
  \wordsense{n. 破产；彻底失败；（名誉等的）完全丧失 *}
  \wordphrase{go into bankruptcy（破产）}
  \wordphrase{trustee in bankruptcy（【律】破产管理人）}
  \wordexample{go into bankruptcy（破产）}
  \wordexample{trustee in bankruptcy（【律】破产管理人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{corrupt}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT}
  \wordfamily{corruption（腐败）；interrupt（中断）；disrupt（使（国家、制度、同盟等）分裂）}
  \wordsense{a. 腐败的，贪污的；堕落的，邪恶的；污浊的}
  \wordphrase{be corrupt}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of corrupt.（此处展示 corrupt 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 收买；（使）堕落；（使）腐败 *}
  \wordphrase{corrupt practices（腐败行为）}
  \wordphrase{corrupt air（污浊的空气）}
  \wordexample{young people whose morals have been corrupted（堕落的年轻人）}
  \wordexample{corrupt practices（腐败行为）}
  \wordexample{corrupt air（污浊的空气）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{corruptible}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT；kə'rʌptəbl}
  \wordfamily{corrupt；incorruptible；bankruptcy；bankrupt；interrupt（中断）}
  \wordsense{a. 易堕落、腐败的；易贿赂的 *}
  \wordphrase{corruptible government officials（容易堕落的政府官员）}
  \wordexample{corruptible government officials（容易堕落的政府官员）}
  \wordexample{be corruptible（易堕落、腐败的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{incorruptible}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RUPT；,inkə'rʌptəbl}
  \wordfamily{incorruptibility（廉洁，不腐败）；interrupt（中断）；disrupt（使（国家、制度、同盟等）分裂）}
  \wordsense{a. 不腐败的，清廉的；不能收买的 *}
  \wordphrase{be incorruptible（不腐败的，清廉的）}
  \wordexample{be incorruptible（不腐败的，清廉的）}
  \wordexample{incorruptible（[,inkə'rʌptəbl]）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MEDI}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MEDI 来自拉丁语的 medi 意为 middle。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{intermediary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEDI；在中间起中介作用 inter（= between）+ medi（= middle）；,intə'mi:diəri}
  \wordfamily{mediate（调停）；intermediate（（时间、空间、程度等）中间的）；immediate（（时间、空间）直接的）}
  \wordsense{n. 中间人；调解者；中介物，媒介物}
  \wordphrase{the intermediary}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of intermediary.（此处展示 intermediary 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 调解的；中间的}
  \wordphrase{intermediary like a publicist}
  \wordexample{Most stars use an intermediary like a publicist to help them deal with the public.（大部分明星都会雇用公关人员之类的中间人来帮助他们应付公众。）}
  \wordexample{intermediary like a publicist}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{mediate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEDI；'mi:dieit}
  \wordfamily{mediation（调停，调解）；mediator（调停者，调解人）；intermediary（中间人）}
  \wordsense{vt. 调停，调解}
  \wordphrase{mediate the communication between}
  \wordexample{I'm a marriage counselor. I'm here to mediate the communication between you two.（我是婚姻顾问。我来是为了通过调解来帮助你们两位沟通。）}
  \wordexample{mediate the communication between}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{intermediate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEDI；,intə'mi:diət}
  \wordfamily{mediate；immediate；intermediary；Mediterranean}
  \wordsense{a. （时间、空间、程度等）中间的}
  \wordphrase{be intermediate}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of intermediate.（此处展示 intermediate 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 中间人；媒介物 *}
  \wordphrase{at an intermediate stage（在中间阶段）}
  \wordphrase{intermediate courses（（初、高级之间的）中级课程）}
  \wordphrase{intermediate-range ballistic missile（中程弹道导弹，简称：IRBM）}
  \wordexample{at an intermediate stage（在中间阶段）}
  \wordexample{intermediate courses（（初、高级之间的）中级课程）}
  \wordexample{intermediate-range ballistic missile（中程弹道导弹，简称：IRBM）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{immediate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEDI；i'mi:diət}
  \wordfamily{intermediary（中间人）；mediate（调停）；intermediate（（时间、空间、程度等）中间的）}
  \wordsense{a. （时间、空间）直接的；紧接的；立即的，即刻的 *}
  \wordphrase{be immediate（直接的）}
  \wordexample{be immediate（直接的）}
  \wordexample{immediate（[i'mi:diət]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{Mediterranean}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEDI；,meditə'reiniən}
  \wordfamily{immediate；medial；intermediate；median；intermediary（中间人）}

  \wordphrase{be Mediterranean}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of Mediterranean.（此处展示 Mediterranean 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. （the \textasciitilde{}）地中海 *}
  \wordphrase{the Mediterranean Sea（地中海）}
  \wordphrase{Mediterranean climate（地中海气候）}
  \wordexample{the Mediterranean Sea（地中海）}
  \wordexample{Mediterranean climate（地中海气候）}
