\chapter{NUTRI}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根NUTRI 来自拉丁语的 nutri 意为 to nourish。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 al，troph。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{malnutrition}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NUTRI；不好的营养状态 mal（= bad）+ nutri（= nourishment）；,mælnju:'triʃn}
  \wordfamily{nutriment；nutrition；nutritive}
  \wordsense{n. 营养失调，营养不良}
  \wordphrase{Malnutrition is a grave}
  \wordexample{Malnutrition is a grave public health problem in many African nations.（营养不良是很多非洲国家共有的严重的健康问题。）}
  \wordexample{Malnutrition is a grave}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{nutriment}{'nju:trimənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NUTRI}
  \wordsense{n.营养，养分；滋养物}
  \wordfamily{malnutrition}
  \wordfamily{nutrition}
  \wordfamily{nutritive}
  \wordfamily{a nutriment（营养，养分）}
  \wordphrase{a nutriment（营养，养分）}
  \wordexample{a nutriment（营养，养分）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{nutrition}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NUTRI；nju'triʃn}
  \wordfamily{malnutrition（营养失调）；nutriment（营养）；nutritive（与营养有关的）}
  \wordsense{n. 营养（物）；滋养（物）；营养学}
  \wordphrase{nutrition value（营养价值）}
  \wordexample{the care and nutrition of children（儿童看护与营养）}
  \wordexample{nutrition value（营养价值）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{nutritive}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NUTRI；'nju:trətiv}
  \wordfamily{malnutrition（营养失调）；nutriment（营养）；nutrition（营养（物））}
  \wordsense{a. 与营养有关的；有营养的}
  \wordphrase{be nutritive（与营养有关的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be nutritive".（常见搭配：与营养有关的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 营养物}
  \wordphrase{will, to fly。}
  \wordexample{will, to fly。}
  \wordexample{be nutritive（与营养有关的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{VOL}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根VOL 来自拉丁语的 vol 意为 will, to fly。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{malevolent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL；带有不好的意图的 male<mal（= bad）+ vol（= will）；mə'levələnt}
  \wordfamily{malevolence（恶意，狠毒）；benevolent（仁慈的）；volition（意志）}
  \wordsense{a. 有恶意的，坏心肠的}
  \wordphrase{malevolent or otherwise}
  \wordexample{I don't believe in ghosts, malevolent or otherwise.（我不相信幽灵，不管它是善是恶。）}
  \wordexample{malevolent or otherwise}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{benevolent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL；带有善良的、和善的意图的 bene（= good）+ vol（= will）；bə'nevələnt}
  \wordfamily{benevolence（仁慈）；malevolent（有恶意的）；volition（意志）}
  \wordsense{a. 仁慈的；亲切的；慈善的}
  \wordphrase{benevolent acts}
  \wordexample{We often experience pleasure ourselves upon performing benevolent acts.（在慈善行动中我们自己也常常体会到快乐。）}
  \wordexample{benevolent acts}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{volition}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL；və'liʃn}
  \wordfamily{volitional（意志的）；malevolent（有恶意的）；benevolent（仁慈的）}
  \wordsense{n. 意志，决断力；决定}
  \wordphrase{volition}
  \wordexample{We want our children to choose their careers of their own volition.（我们希望孩子们能够根据自己的意愿选择职业。）}
  \wordexample{volition}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{voluptuous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL；və'lʌptʃuəs}
  \wordfamily{volition；voluptuary；benevolent；volunteer；malevolent（有恶意的）}
  \wordsense{a. 性感的，激起情欲的；沉溺酒色的；满足感官的}
  \wordphrase{lead a voluptuous life（过荒淫无度的生活）}
  \wordexample{voluptuous music / beauty / thoughts / sensations（给人以快感的音乐 / 肉感美 / 淫念 / 性感）}
  \wordexample{lead a voluptuous life（过荒淫无度的生活）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{voluptuary}{və'lʌptʃuəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL}
  \wordsense{a. / n.沉迷于酒色的（人）}
  \wordfamily{voluptuous}
  \wordfamily{volunteer}
  \wordfamily{volition}
  \wordfamily{voluntary}
  \wordfamily{be voluptuary（/ n.沉迷于酒色的（人））}
  \wordphrase{be voluptuary（/ n.沉迷于酒色的（人））}
  \wordexample{be voluptuary（/ n.沉迷于酒色的（人））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{volunteer}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL}
  \wordfamily{voluptuary；voluntary；voluptuous；involuntary；malevolent（有恶意的）}
  \wordsense{n. （做令人不愉快的或危险事情的）志愿者；志愿兵 [,vɔlən'tiə(r)]}
  \wordphrase{the volunteer}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of volunteer.（此处展示 volunteer 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 自愿提供；自愿做}
  \wordphrase{volunteer corps（义勇军）}
  \wordphrase{volunteer police（志愿警察）}
  \wordphrase{volunteer to help others（自愿帮助别人）}
  \wordexample{volunteer corps（义勇军）}
  \wordexample{volunteer police（志愿警察）}
  \wordexample{volunteer to help others（自愿帮助别人）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{voluntary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL；'vɔləntri}
  \wordfamily{malevolent（有恶意的）；benevolent（仁慈的）；volition（意志）}
  \wordsense{a. 自发的；自愿的；靠自由捐助维持的；有意的}
  \wordphrase{voluntary contribution（自发的捐助）}
  \wordphrase{voluntary workers（义工）}
  \wordphrase{voluntary appearance / confession（主动出庭 / 主动坦白）}
  \wordexample{voluntary contribution（自发的捐助）}
  \wordexample{voluntary workers（义工）}
  \wordexample{voluntary appearance / confession（主动出庭 / 主动坦白）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{involuntary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL；in'vɔləntri}
  \wordfamily{malevolent（有恶意的）；benevolent（仁慈的）；volition（意志）}
  \wordsense{a. 非自愿的，非本意的；无意的；不由自主的 *}
  \wordphrase{involuntary slaughter（过失杀人（罪））}
  \wordphrase{involuntary servitude（强制劳役）}
  \wordexample{involuntary slaughter（过失杀人（罪））}
  \wordexample{involuntary servitude（强制劳役）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{volatile}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VOL}
  \wordfamily{malevolent（有恶意的）；benevolent（仁慈的）；volition（意志）}
  \wordsense{a. （液体等）易挥发的；（性格）活泼的；反复无常的；轻浮的；（政局等）紧张的 *}
  \wordphrase{volatile oil（挥发性汽油）}
  \wordphrase{volatile salt（碳酸铵）}
  \wordexample{volatile oil（挥发性汽油）}
  \wordexample{volatile salt（碳酸铵）}
\end{word}



\chapter{RECT, RIG}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根RECT, RIG 来自拉丁语的 rect，rig 意为 straight, right。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{maladroit}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；不能直着拉向某物的 mal（= bad）+ a（= to）+ droit<rect（= straight, right）；,mælə'drɔit}
  \wordfamily{incorrigible（（坏习惯等）不能被纠正的）；rectify（改正）；corrigible（可改正的）}
  \wordsense{a. 不灵巧的，不熟练的，笨拙的}
  \wordphrase{maladroit in physical education}
  \wordexample{She is so maladroit in physical education that she resembles a clown!（她在体育课上笨拙得像个小丑！）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{incorrigible}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；无法一起直着拉走的 in（= not）+ cor<com（= together）+ rig（= straight）；,inkə'ridʒəbl}
  \wordfamily{maladroit；rectify；corrigible；dirigible}
  \wordsense{a. （坏习惯等）不能被纠正的；无可救药的；根深蒂固的，积习难改的}
  \wordphrase{incorrigible}
  \wordexample{The prison guards describe the prisoner as incorrigible.（监狱的看守们说罪犯无可救药。）}
  \wordexample{incorrigible}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{rectify}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；使正确 rect（= right）；'rektifai}
  \wordfamily{rectification（改正）；rectifier（矫正者）；maladroit（不灵巧的）}
  \wordsense{vt. 改正；纠正（恶习等），矫正；精馏}
  \wordphrase{rectifies flight path errors}
  \wordexample{The onboard computer continually rectifies flight path errors.（机载电脑不断地纠正航道错误。）}
  \wordexample{rectifies flight path errors}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{corrigible}{kə'ridʒəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG}
  \wordfamily{rectify；dirigible；incorrigible；corrigendum；maladroit（不灵巧的）}
  \wordsense{a. 可改正的；有待改正的 *}
  \wordphrase{be corrigible（可改正的）}
  \wordexample{be corrigible（可改正的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{dirigible}{'diridʒəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG}
  \wordfamily{corrigible；corrigendum；rectify；rigid；maladroit（不灵巧的）}
  \wordsense{n. 飞船 *}
  \wordphrase{a dirigible（飞船）}
  \wordexample{a dirigible（飞船）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{corrigendum}{,kɔri'dʒendəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG}
  \wordfamily{dirigible；rigid；corrigible；rigor；maladroit（不灵巧的）}
  \wordsense{n. （书籍）应更正的错误；勘误表 *}
  \wordphrase{a corrigendum（应更正的错误）}
  \wordexample{a corrigendum（应更正的错误）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{rigid}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；'ridʒid}
  \wordfamily{maladroit（不灵巧的）；incorrigible（（坏习惯等）不能被纠正的）；rectify（改正）}
  \wordsense{a. 坚硬的；坚固的；不易折断的；严格的；刻板的；严密的}
  \wordphrase{rigid piece of metal（坚硬的金属片）}
  \wordphrase{rigid disciplinarian（严格的纪律执行者）}
  \wordphrase{rigid rules（严格的规则）}
  \wordexample{rigid piece of metal（坚硬的金属片）}
  \wordexample{rigid disciplinarian（严格的纪律执行者）}
  \wordexample{rigid rules（严格的规则）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{rigor}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；'rigə(r)}
  \wordfamily{maladroit（不灵巧的）；incorrigible（（坏习惯等）不能被纠正的）；rectify（改正）}
  \wordsense{n. 严厉，苛刻；严格；苛刻的行为；艰苦；严酷}
  \wordphrase{rigor mortis（死后僵硬）}
  \wordphrase{rigors of prison life（监狱生活的艰苦）}
  \wordphrase{of the winter in Canada（加拿大冬天的严酷）}
  \wordexample{rigor mortis（死后僵硬）}
  \wordexample{rigors of prison life（监狱生活的艰苦）}
  \wordexample{of the winter in Canada（加拿大冬天的严酷）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{rigorous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；'rigərəs}
  \wordfamily{rigor；righteous；rigid；rightful；maladroit（不灵巧的）}
  \wordsense{a. 严酷的；苛刻的；严格的，严厉的}
  \wordphrase{rigorous discipline（严格的纪律）}
  \wordphrase{rigorous search for dutiable goods（对关税货物的严格检查）}
  \wordphrase{rigorous climate（严酷的气候）}
  \wordexample{rigorous discipline（严格的纪律）}
  \wordexample{rigorous search for dutiable goods（对关税货物的严格检查）}
  \wordexample{rigorous climate（严酷的气候）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{righteous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；'raitʃəs}
  \wordfamily{maladroit（不灵巧的）；incorrigible（（坏习惯等）不能被纠正的）；rectify（改正）}
  \wordsense{a. 正当的；正义的，正直的；公正的}
  \wordphrase{the righteous and the wicked（正直的人和邪恶的人）}
  \wordphrase{righteous anger（义愤）}
  \wordexample{the righteous and the wicked（正直的人和邪恶的人）}
  \wordexample{righteous anger（义愤）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{rightful}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 RECT, RIG；'raitful}
  \wordfamily{maladroit（不灵巧的）；incorrigible（（坏习惯等）不能被纠正的）；rectify（改正）}
  \wordsense{a. 正义的；公正的；正当的；合法的；依法享有权利的}
  \wordphrase{rightful owner of the land（土地的合法拥有者）}
  \wordphrase{the rightful king（法定的国王）}
  \wordexample{rightful owner of the land（土地的合法拥有者）}
  \wordexample{the rightful king（法定的国王）}
\end{word}



\chapter{LITER}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根LITER 来自拉丁语的 liter 意为 letter。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{obliterate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；逆着文字走 ob（= against）+ liter（= letter）；ə'blitəreit}
  \wordfamily{obliteration（删除）；literate（能读写的）；alliteration（语】头韵（法） *）}
  \wordsense{vt. 擦掉；消除痕迹；消灭}
  \wordphrase{The crows completely obliterated}
  \wordexample{The crows completely obliterated his corn crop this year.（乌鸦把他今年收获的玉米消灭得一干二净。）}
  \wordexample{The crows completely obliterated}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{literate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；'litərət}
  \wordfamily{literacy（读写能力）；obliterate（擦掉）；alliteration（语】头韵（法） *）}
  \wordsense{a. 能读写的；有文化的}
  \wordphrase{be literate}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of literate.（此处展示 literate 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 能读写的人；有文化的人}
  \wordphrase{literacy 读写能力；知识}
  \wordexample{Sadly, many adults in developing nations are not literate.（可悲的是，发展中国家中很多成人还不会读写。）}
  \wordexample{literacy 读写能力；知识}
  \wordexample{literate（a.能读写的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{alliteration}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；ə,litə'reiʃn}
  \wordfamily{alliterative（头韵（法）的）；obliterate（擦掉）；literate（能读写的）}
  \wordsense{n. 【语】头韵（法） *}
  \wordphrase{an alliteration（头韵（法））}
  \wordexample{an alliteration（头韵（法））}
  \wordexample{alliteration（[ə,litə'reiʃn]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{transliterate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；trænz'litəreit}
  \wordfamily{obliterate（擦掉）；literate（能读写的）；alliteration（语】头韵（法） *）}
  \wordsense{v. 把……译成另一语言体系中相应的字母；翻译 *}
  \wordphrase{transliterate Greek into Roman letters（把希腊语翻译成罗马字母）}
  \wordexample{transliterate English words into phonetic symbols（用音标来译写英语单词）}
  \wordexample{transliterate Greek into Roman letters（把希腊语翻译成罗马字母）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{illiterate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；i'litərət}
  \wordfamily{transliterate；literacy；alliteration；illiteracy；obliterate（擦掉）}
  \wordsense{a. 无知的；文盲的；语言错误的}
  \wordphrase{be illiterate（无知的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be illiterate".（常见搭配：无知的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 无知的人；文盲 *}
  \wordphrase{illiterate letter（语言错误连篇的信）}
  \wordexample{illiterate letter（语言错误连篇的信）}
  \wordexample{be illiterate（无知的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{literacy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；'litərəsi}
  \wordfamily{illiterate；illiteracy；transliterate；literal；obliterate（擦掉）}
  \wordsense{n. 读写能力；知识}
  \wordphrase{literacy test（读写能力测试）}
  \wordexample{literacy test（读写能力测试）}
  \wordexample{a literacy（读写能力）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{illiteracy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；i'litərəsi}
  \wordfamily{literacy；literal；illiterate；literary；obliterate（擦掉）}
  \wordsense{n. 文盲 *}
  \wordphrase{illiteracy rate（文盲率）}
  \wordexample{illiteracy rate（文盲率）}
  \wordexample{an illiteracy（文盲）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{literal}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；'litərəli}
  \wordfamily{literally（ad.逐字地）；obliterate（擦掉）；literate（能读写的）}
  \wordsense{a. 文字的；照字面的，逐字的；（人）刻板的；缺乏想象力的}
  \wordphrase{translate literally（直译）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "translate literally".（常见搭配：直译。）}
  \wordsense{n. 文字错误；印刷错误}
  \wordphrase{translate literally（直译）}
  \wordexample{in the literal sense of the word（照字面意思地）}
  \wordexample{be literal（文字的）}
  \wordexample{literal（['litərəli]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{literary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；'litərəri}
  \wordfamily{literal；literati；illiteracy；literature；obliterate（擦掉）}
  \wordsense{a. 文学的；通晓文学的；从事写作的；（相对口语来说）书面的}
  \wordphrase{literary works（文学作品）}
  \wordphrase{literary man（文人）}
  \wordphrase{literary style（书面体）}
  \wordexample{literary works（文学作品）}
  \wordexample{literary man（文人）}
  \wordexample{literary style（书面体）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{literati}{ˌlitə'rɑ:ti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER}
  \wordfamily{literary；literature；literal；litany；obliterate（擦掉）}
  \wordsense{n. <拉>[总称]文人学士；知识分子，知识界}
  \wordphrase{a literati（<拉>[总称]文人学士）}
  \wordexample{a literati（<拉>[总称]文人学士）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{literature}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER；'litrətʃə(r)}
  \wordfamily{obliterate（擦掉）；literate（能读写的）；alliteration（语】头韵（法） *）}
  \wordsense{n. 文学；文学作品；文献；印刷品}
  \wordphrase{literature on sports（有关体育的文献）}
  \wordexample{send her some literature about package holidays（寄给她一些关于一揽子旅行的印刷品）}
  \wordexample{literature on sports（有关体育的文献）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{litany}{'litəni}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LITER}
  \wordsense{n.连祷；应答祈祷（唱赞美歌的歌唱团先唱，信徒们跟着应答歌唱的形式）；（the L\textasciitilde{}）祈祷文 *lit<liter（= letter）}
  \wordfamily{literature}
  \wordfamily{literati}
  \wordfamily{literary}
  \wordfamily{literal}
  \wordfamily{a litany（连祷）}
  \wordphrase{a litany（连祷）}
  \wordexample{a litany（连祷）}
\end{word}



\chapter{ED[ES]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根ED[ES] 来自拉丁语的 ed 意为 to eat，变形为 es。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 vor 和来自希腊语的 phag。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{obese}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ED[ES]；多吃的 ob（= intensive）+ es<ed（= eat）；əu'bi:s}
  \wordfamily{obesity（肥胖）；edible（可以食用的）；inedible（不适于食用的）}
  \wordsense{a. 臃肿的，肥胖的}
  \wordphrase{obese}
  \wordexample{Nearly 20\% of all Americans are now classified as obese.（现在美国人中有近 20\% 可被列为肥胖。）}
  \wordexample{obese}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{edible}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ED[ES]；'edəbl}
  \wordfamily{edibility（适于食用）；n（pl.）适合食用的东西）；obese（臃肿的）}
  \wordsense{a. 可以食用的}
  \wordphrase{be edible}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of edible.（此处展示 edible 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. （pl.）适合食用的东西；食品}
  \wordphrase{the edible}
  \wordexample{be edible（可以食用的 n.（pl.）适合食用的东西）}
  \wordexample{edible（['edəbl]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{inedible}{in'edəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ED[ES]}
  \wordfamily{edible；obese；litany（连祷）}
  \wordsense{a. 不适于食用的，不能吃的 *}
  \wordphrase{be inedible（不适于食用的，不能吃的）}
  \wordexample{be inedible（不适于食用的，不能吃的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{DUR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根DUR 来自拉丁语的 dur 意为 to last。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{obdurate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DUR；继续拉的 ob（= intensive）+ dur（= last）；'ɔbdjurət}
  \wordfamily{obduracy（倔强，执拗，固执）；durable（持久的）；endure（忍受（痛苦、艰难等））}
  \wordsense{a. 顽固的，执拗的}
  \wordphrase{obdurate - offending people}
  \wordexample{He's extremely obdurate - offending people and never apologizing afterward.（他极其固执，冒犯了别人却从不道歉。）}
  \wordexample{obdurate - offending people}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{durable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DUR；'djuərəbl}
  \wordfamily{durability（持久，耐久性）；durance（监禁）；obdurate（顽固的）}
  \wordsense{a. 持久的；耐用的}
  \wordphrase{be durable}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of durable.（此处展示 durable 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 耐用品}
  \wordphrase{durable}
  \wordexample{Indoor-outdoor carpeting is extremely durable.（室内、室外两用地毯非常耐用。）}
  \wordexample{durable}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{endure}{in'djuə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DUR}
  \wordfamily{durable；enduring；obdurate；endurance}
  \wordsense{v. 忍受（痛苦、艰难等）；【主要用在否定句中】容忍；持续；持久 *}
  \wordphrase{to endure（忍受（痛苦、艰难等））}
  \wordexample{to endure（忍受（痛苦、艰难等））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{enduring}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DUR；in'djuəriŋ}
  \wordfamily{obdurate（顽固的）；durable（持久的）；endure（忍受（痛苦、艰难等））}
  \wordsense{a. 持续的；持久的 *}
  \wordphrase{enduring fame（经久不衰的名望）}
  \wordphrase{enduring peace（持久的和平）}
  \wordexample{enduring fame（经久不衰的名望）}
  \wordexample{enduring peace（持久的和平）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{endurance}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DUR；in'djuərəns}
  \wordfamily{obdurate（顽固的）；durable（持久的）；endure（忍受（痛苦、艰难等））}
  \wordsense{n. 忍耐（力）；持久（力） *}
  \wordphrase{remarkable powers of endurance（非凡的忍耐力）}
  \wordphrase{past / beyond endurance（无法忍受地，难以忍耐地）}
  \wordphrase{endurance test（耐力测试）}
  \wordexample{remarkable powers of endurance（非凡的忍耐力）}
  \wordexample{past / beyond endurance（无法忍受地，难以忍耐地）}
  \wordexample{endurance test（耐力测试）}
\end{word}



\chapter{CEL[CUL, CEAL]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根CEL[CUL, CEAL] 来自拉丁语的 cel 意为 to hide，变形为 cul, ceal。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 cond，cover / cur，tect / teg 和来自希腊语的 crypt。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{occult}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEL[CUL, CEAL]；严严实实地藏着的 oc<ob（= intensive）+ cul<cel（= hide）；ə'kʌlt}
  \wordfamily{cell；cellar；conceal；concealment}
  \wordsense{a. 掩藏的；神秘的，超自然的}
  \wordphrase{occult arts}
  \wordexample{I've long been a student of occult arts.（我学秘术很久了。）}
  \wordexample{occult arts}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{cell}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEL[CUL, CEAL]；sel}
  \wordfamily{occult；cellar；conceal；concealment}
  \wordsense{n. （通常指革命的）政党团体的基层组织；（修道院的）单人小房间；监狱的单人牢房；细胞}
  \wordphrase{a cell（政党团体的基层组织）}
  \wordexample{communist cells in an industrial town（工业城市的共产党基层组织）}
  \wordexample{a cell（政党团体的基层组织）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{cellar}{'selə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEL[CUL, CEAL]}
  \wordsense{n.地下室}
  \wordfamily{cell}
  \wordfamily{conceal}
  \wordfamily{occult}
  \wordfamily{concealment}
  \wordfamily{a cellar（地下室）}
  \wordphrase{a cellar（地下室）}
  \wordexample{a cellar（地下室）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{conceal}{kən'si:l}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEL[CUL, CEAL]}
  \wordfamily{cellar；concealment；cell；occult}
  \wordsense{v. 掩藏；隐瞒 *con<com（= completely）,}
  \wordphrase{to conceal（掩藏）}
  \wordexample{to conceal（掩藏）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{concealment}{kən'si:lmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CEL[CUL, CEAL]}
  \wordfamily{conceal；cellar；cell；occult}
  \wordsense{n. 隐藏；隐瞒 *con<com（= completely）,}
  \wordphrase{a concealment（隐藏）}
  \wordexample{a concealment（隐藏）}
\end{word}



\chapter{SCEN}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根SCEN 来自拉丁语的 scen 意为 to set。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{obscene}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCEN；逆着某物、超越某种程度放置的 ob（= against, over）+ scen（= set）；əb'si:n}
  \wordfamily{obscenity（猥亵，淫秽）；猥亵的言语（或行为）；proscenium（（在剧场的大幕和管弦乐队席之间的）舞台前部 *）}
  \wordsense{a. （语言、想法、书籍、绘画等）伤风败俗的；猥亵的，淫秽的；可憎的}
  \wordphrase{obscene}
  \wordexample{Different people have different opinions about what is obscene.（对于什么是淫秽，不同的人有不同的看法。）}
  \wordexample{obscene}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{proscenium}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCEN；prə'si:niəm}
  \wordfamily{obscene；scenario；scene；scenery}
  \wordsense{n. （在剧场的大幕和管弦乐队席之间的）舞台前部 *}
  \wordphrase{proscenium arch（位于舞台前部的拱形结构）}
  \wordexample{proscenium arch（位于舞台前部的拱形结构）}
  \wordexample{a proscenium（舞台前部）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{scenario}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCEN；sə'nɑ:riəu}
  \wordfamily{scenarist（剧作家）；obscene（（语言、想法、书籍、绘画等）伤风败俗的）；proscenium（（在剧场的大幕和管弦乐队席之间的）舞台前部 *）}
  \wordsense{n. （话剧、歌剧、电影等的）提纲，脚本}
  \wordphrase{a scenario（提纲，脚本）}
  \wordexample{a scenario（提纲，脚本）}
  \wordexample{scenario（[sə'nɑ:riəu]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{scene}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCEN；si:n}
  \wordfamily{scenario；scenery；proscenium；scenic；obscene（（语言、想法、书籍、绘画等）伤风败俗的）}
  \wordsense{n. （舞台）布景；（戏剧等的）背景；（戏剧的）一场；（舞台、电影表现的）场面，场景；景色；（事件发生的）现场；〈口〉活动领域；〈贬〉当众吵闹}
  \wordphrase{scene of the novel（小说的背景）}
  \wordphrase{duel scene in Hamlet（《哈姆雷特》的决斗场面）}
  \wordphrase{behind the scenes（在舞台（或幕）后；秘密地，不公开地）}
  \wordexample{Macbeth: Act II, Scene 1（《麦克白》第二幕第一场）}
  \wordexample{scene of the novel（小说的背景）}
  \wordexample{duel scene in Hamlet（《哈姆雷特》的决斗场面）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{scenery}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCEN；'si:nəri}
  \wordfamily{obscene（（语言、想法、书籍、绘画等）伤风败俗的）；proscenium（（在剧场的大幕和管弦乐队席之间的）舞台前部 *）；scenario（（话剧、歌剧、电影等的）提纲）}
  \wordsense{n. （某个地域的）风景，景色（如山、田野、溪谷、树林等）；（剧场舞台的）布景}
  \wordphrase{a scenery（风景，景色（如山、田野、溪谷、树林等））}
  \wordexample{a scenery（风景，景色（如山、田野、溪谷、树林等））}
  \wordexample{scenery（['si:nəri]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{scenic}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SCEN；'si:nik}
  \wordfamily{obscene（（语言、想法、书籍、绘画等）伤风败俗的）；proscenium（（在剧场的大幕和管弦乐队席之间的）舞台前部 *）；scenario（（话剧、歌剧、电影等的）提纲）}
  \wordsense{a. 风景的；景色秀丽的；戏剧性的}
  \wordphrase{scenic zone（景色优美的地带）}
  \wordphrase{scenic railway（游览观光铁道）}
  \wordphrase{dic/dict，fa/fam/fess，nounc/nunci，or，parl 和来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{scenic splendors of the Rocky Mountains（落基山脉的壮丽景色）}
  \wordexample{scenic zone（景色优美的地带）}
  \wordexample{scenic railway（游览观光铁道）}
\end{word}



\chapter{LOQU, LOCUT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根LOQU, LOCUT 来自拉丁语的 loqu, locut 意为 to say, to speak。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 dic/dict，fa/fam/fess，nounc/nunci，or，parl 和来自希腊语的 phras，pha/phe/phu 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{obloquy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT；和某人敌对着说 ob（= against）+ loqu（= say）；'ɔbləkwi}
  \wordfamily{loquacious；circumlocution；colloquial；colloquialism}
  \wordsense{n. 谩骂；强烈指责；耻辱}
  \wordphrase{obloquy heaped upon him}
  \wordexample{His reputation was damaged by the obloquy heaped upon him in the press.（舆论对他的大肆指责有损他的名声。）}
  \wordexample{obloquy heaped upon him}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{loquacious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT；多说的 loqu（= say）；lə'kweiʃəs}
  \wordfamily{loquacity（多话，饶舌）；obloquy（谩骂）；circumlocution（婉转）}
  \wordsense{a. 话多的；健谈的}
  \wordphrase{loquacious old biddy}
  \wordexample{She's a loquacious old biddy, as old maids often are.（如同一般的老处女那样，她也是个饶舌的老太婆。）}
  \wordexample{loquacious old biddy}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{circumlocution}{ˌsə:kəmlə'kju:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordfamily{loquacious；colloquial；obloquy；colloquialism}
  \wordsense{n. 婉转；委婉的表达 *}
  \wordphrase{a circumlocution（婉转）}
  \wordexample{a circumlocution（婉转）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{colloquial}{kə'ləukwiəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordfamily{circumlocution；colloquialism；loquacious；colloquy；obloquy（谩骂）}
  \wordsense{a. 会话体的，口语体的 *}
  \wordphrase{be colloquial（会话体的，口语体的）}
  \wordexample{be colloquial（会话体的，口语体的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{colloquialism}{kə'ləukwiəlizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordfamily{colloquial；colloquy；circumlocution；grandiloquent；obloquy（谩骂）}
  \wordsense{n. 口语体，会话体 *col<com（= together）,}
  \wordphrase{a colloquialism（口语体，会话体）}
  \wordexample{a colloquialism（口语体，会话体）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{colloquy}{'kɔləkwi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordfamily{colloquialism；grandiloquent；colloquial；interlocutor；obloquy（谩骂）}
  \wordsense{n. 谈话；讨论 *}
  \wordphrase{a colloquy（谈话）}
  \wordexample{a colloquy（谈话）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{grandiloquent}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT；græn'diləkwənt}
  \wordfamily{colloquy；interlocutor；colloquialism；locution；obloquy（谩骂）}
  \wordsense{a. 夸张的；大言不惭的 *}
  \wordphrase{grandiloquent speaker（说话夸张的人）}
  \wordphrase{written in a grandiloquent style（用夸张的文笔写成）}
  \wordexample{grandiloquent speaker（说话夸张的人）}
  \wordexample{written in a grandiloquent style（用夸张的文笔写成）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{interlocutor}{ˌintə'lɔkjutə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordfamily{grandiloquent；locution；colloquy；ventriloquism；obloquy（谩骂）}
  \wordsense{n. 对话者 *}
  \wordphrase{an interlocutor（对话者）}
  \wordexample{an interlocutor（对话者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{locution}{lə'kju:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordsense{n.语言风格；惯用语}
  \wordfamily{interlocutor}
  \wordfamily{ventriloquism}
  \wordfamily{grandiloquent}
  \wordfamily{colloquy}
  \wordfamily{a locution（语言风格）}
  \wordphrase{a locution（语言风格）}
  \wordexample{a locution（语言风格）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{ventriloquism}{ven'triləkwizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOQU, LOCUT}
  \wordfamily{locution；interlocutor；grandiloquent；colloquy；obloquy（谩骂）}
  \wordsense{n. 腹语（术）；口技 *}
  \wordphrase{a ventriloquism（腹语（术））}
  \wordexample{a ventriloquism（腹语（术））}
\end{word}



\chapter{OD}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根OD 来自希腊语的 od 意为 song。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{parody}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OD；向旁边歌唱 par<para（= beside）+ od（= song）；'pærədi}
  \wordfamily{parodist（模仿诗文作者）；ode（颂诗）；melody（美妙的音乐）}
  \wordsense{n. 讽刺模仿诗文、戏文；拙劣的模仿}
  \wordphrase{the parody}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of parody.（此处展示 parody 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 拙劣地模仿；讽刺性地改编}
  \wordphrase{parody of his work}
  \wordexample{At Jim's retirement dinner, his colleagues presented a parody of his work life.（在吉姆的退休庆祝宴会上，他的同事们上演了一场根据他职场生涯改编的模仿剧。）}
  \wordexample{parody of his work}
  \wordexample{parody（n.讽刺模仿诗文、戏文）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{ode}{əud}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OD}
  \wordsense{n.颂诗；颂歌}
  \wordfamily{parody}
  \wordfamily{melody}
  \wordfamily{melodious}
  \wordfamily{prosody}
  \wordfamily{an ode（颂诗）}
  \wordphrase{an ode（颂诗）}
  \wordexample{an ode（颂诗）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{melody}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OD；'melədi}
  \wordfamily{ode；melodious；parody；prosody}
  \wordsense{n. 美妙的音乐；歌曲；旋律 *}
  \wordphrase{old Irish melodies（古老的爱尔兰歌曲）}
  \wordexample{old Irish melodies（古老的爱尔兰歌曲）}
  \wordexample{a melody（美妙的音乐）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{melodious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OD；mə'ləudiəs}
  \wordfamily{parody（讽刺模仿诗文、戏文）；ode（颂诗）；melody（美妙的音乐）}
  \wordsense{a. 旋律优美的；有旋律的 *}
  \wordphrase{be melodious（旋律优美的）}
  \wordexample{the melodious notes of a thrush（画眉的优美歌声）}
  \wordexample{be melodious（旋律优美的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{prosody}{'prɔsədi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OD}
  \wordfamily{melodious；melody；ode；parody}
  \wordsense{n. 诗体论；作诗法；韵律学；（特定语言的）重音和语调模式；韵律结构 *}
  \wordphrase{a prosody（诗体论）}
  \wordexample{a prosody（诗体论）}
\end{word}



\chapter{DOX}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根DOX 来自希腊语的 dox 意为 opinion。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{paradox}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOX；脱离某事物的意见 para（= beside, apart from）+ dox（= opinion）；'pærədɔks}
  \wordfamily{paradoxical（悖论的）；orthodox（通常的）；heterodox（非正统的）}
  \wordsense{n. 看似矛盾而实际（或可能）正确的说法；悖论}
  \wordphrase{paradox when lighting is}
  \wordexample{Although an apparent paradox, when lighting is reduced in factories, productivity increases.（虽然看起来很矛盾，不过在工厂减少照明时，生产率却提高了。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{orthodox}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOX；'ɔ:θədɔks}
  \wordfamily{orthodoxy（正统的信仰）；paradox（看似矛盾而实际（或可能）正确的说法）；heterodox（非正统的）}
  \wordsense{a. 通常的；公认的；（意见、信仰等）正统的 *}
  \wordphrase{orthodox beliefs（正统的信仰）}
  \wordphrase{orthodox behavior（正统的行为）}
  \wordphrase{the Orthodox Church（正教会）}
  \wordexample{orthodox beliefs（正统的信仰）}
  \wordexample{orthodox behavior（正统的行为）}
  \wordexample{the Orthodox Church（正教会）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{heterodox}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOX；'hetərədɔks}
  \wordfamily{heterodoxy（非正统（学说）；paradox（看似矛盾而实际（或可能）正确的说法）；orthodox（通常的）}
  \wordsense{a. 非正统的；异端的 *}
  \wordphrase{be heterodox（非正统的）}
  \wordexample{be heterodox（非正统的）}
  \wordexample{heterodox（['hetərədɔks]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{doxology}{dɔk'sɔlədʒi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOX}
  \wordfamily{heterodox；orthodox；paradox}
  \wordsense{n. （做礼拜时的）颂词（如“荣耀归于真神”） *}
  \wordphrase{a doxology（颂词（如“荣耀归于真神”））}
  \wordexample{a doxology（颂词（如“荣耀归于真神”））}
\end{word}



\chapter{SIT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根SIT 来自希腊语的 sit 意为 food, grain, to sit。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{parasite}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIT；是坐在旁边只吃食物的人 para（= beside）+ sit（= food, grain）；'pærəsait}
  \wordfamily{parasitic（/ parasitical 寄生的，寄食的）；site（场所）；doxology（（做礼拜时的）颂词（如“荣耀归于真神”） *）}
  \wordsense{n. 寄生生物；（喻）寄生虫；食客}
  \wordphrase{parasite}
  \wordexample{He lives like a parasite.（他像寄生虫一样活着。）}
  \wordexample{parasite}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{site}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIT；sait}
  \wordfamily{parasite（寄生生物）；doxology（（做礼拜时的）颂词（如“荣耀归于真神”） *）；heterodox（非正统的）}
  \wordsense{n. 场所，地点；遗址}
  \wordphrase{the site}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of site.（此处展示 site 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 决定……的场所，为……选址}
  \wordphrase{site for a new school（新学校的位置）}
  \wordexample{built on the site of an old fort（在过去的要塞位置上建立的）}
  \wordexample{deliver materials to a building site（把材料运到建筑工地）}
  \wordexample{site for a new school（新学校的位置）}
\end{word}



\chapter{ALL}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根ALL 来自希腊语的 all 意为 other。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 alter[ulter]，ali。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{parallelism}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALL；两个相互不同的东西并列放置 par<para（= beside, side by side）+ all（= other）；'pærəlelizəm}
  \wordfamily{parallelogram（平行四边形）；parallel（平行的）；相似（物）}
  \wordsense{n. 平行；对应，类似；比拟}
  \wordphrase{parallelism in the personal}
  \wordexample{There's distinct parallelism in the personal histories of my best friend and myself.（我和最好的朋友过去明显很相像。）}
  \wordexample{parallelism in the personal}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{allegory}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALL；'æləgəri}
  \wordfamily{allegoric（/ allegorical（寓言的）；parallelism（平行）；allergy（医】过敏）}
  \wordsense{n. 寓言；讽喻 *}
  \wordphrase{an allegory（寓言）}
  \wordexample{an allegory（寓言）}
  \wordexample{allegory（['æləgəri]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{allergy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALL；'ælədʒi}
  \wordfamily{allergen（过敏原（引起过敏反应的物质））；parallelism（平行）；allegory（寓言）}
  \wordsense{n. 【医】过敏；〈口〉反感 *}
  \wordphrase{an allergy（过敏）}
  \wordexample{an allergy（过敏）}
  \wordexample{allergy（['ælədʒi]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{allergic}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALL；ə'lə:dʒik}
  \wordfamily{allergy；alloy；allegory；unalloyed；parallelism（平行）}
  \wordsense{a. 过敏的；对……非常反感的 *}
  \wordphrase{allergic to criticism（非常讨厌批评的）}
  \wordexample{allergic to criticism（非常讨厌批评的）}
  \wordexample{be allergic（过敏的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{alloy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALL}
  \wordfamily{allergic；unalloyed；allergy；allegory；parallelism（平行）}
  \wordsense{v. 使成合金；影响；使损伤}
  \wordphrase{to alloy（使成合金）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to alloy".（常见搭配：使成合金。）}
  \wordsense{n. 合金}
  \wordphrase{to alloy（使成合金）}
  \wordexample{to alloy（使成合金）}
  \wordexample{an alloy（合金 [ə'lɔi]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{unalloyed}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALL；ˌʌnə'lɔid}
  \wordfamily{parallelism（平行）；allegory（寓言）；allergy（医】过敏）}
  \wordsense{a. 非合金的；纯粹的，真正的 *}
  \wordphrase{unalloyed joy（真正的喜悦）}
  \wordexample{unalloyed joy（真正的喜悦）}
  \wordexample{to compare, to test, angle。}
\end{word}



\chapter{GON}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根GON 来自希腊语的 gon 意为 to compare, to test, angle。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{paragon}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON；来到旁边成为比较的对象 para（= beside）+ gon（= compare, test, angle）；'pærəgən}
  \wordfamily{diagonal；trigonometry；pentagon；hexagon}
  \wordsense{n. 模范，榜样，典范}
  \wordphrase{paragons of virtue though}
  \wordexample{Priests are supposed to be paragons of virtue, though that's not always so.（牧师被认为是美德的典范，尽管实际上并非总是如此。）}
  \wordexample{paragons of virtue though}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{diagonal}{dai'ægənl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON}
  \wordfamily{paragon；trigonometry；pentagon；hexagon}
  \wordsense{n. /}
  \wordphrase{the diagonal}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of diagonal.（此处展示 diagonal 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 对角线（的）；斜线（的） *}
  \wordphrase{be diagonal}
  \wordexample{a diagonal（/ a.对角线（的））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{trigonometry}{ˌtrigə'nɔmitri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON}
  \wordfamily{diagonal；pentagon；paragon；hexagon}
  \wordsense{n. 【数】三角 *tri（= three）,}
  \wordphrase{a trigonometry（三角）}
  \wordexample{a trigonometry（三角）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{pentagon}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON；'pentəgən}
  \wordfamily{pentagonal（五边形的）；paragon（模范）；diagonal（/）}
  \wordsense{n. 五边形；（the P\textasciitilde{}）美国五角大楼 *}
  \wordphrase{Pentagon officials（五角大楼官员）}
  \wordexample{Pentagon officials（五角大楼官员）}
  \wordexample{a pentagon（五边形）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{hexagon}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON；'heksəgən}
  \wordfamily{hexagonal（六边形的）；paragon（模范）；diagonal（/）}
  \wordsense{n. 六边形；（the H\textasciitilde{}）法国（从地图上看，法国近似六边形） *}
  \wordphrase{Hexagon there are 96}
  \wordexample{Within the Hexagon there are 96 departments.（法国有 96 个省。）}
  \wordexample{Hexagon there are 96}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{octagon}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON；'ɔktəgən}
  \wordfamily{octagonal（八边形的）；paragon（模范）；diagonal（/）}
  \wordsense{n. 八边形 *}
  \wordphrase{an octagon（八边形）}
  \wordexample{an octagon（八边形）}
  \wordexample{octagon（['ɔktəgən]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{polygon}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GON；'pɔligən}
  \wordfamily{paragon（模范）；diagonal（/）；trigonometry（数】三角 *tri（= three）,）}
  \wordsense{n. 多边形 *}
  \wordphrase{to say, to speak，具有相同含义的还有来自希腊语的}
  \wordexample{dic/dict，fa/fam/fess，locut/loqu，nounc/nunci，or，parl 等。}
\end{word}



\chapter{PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU 来自希腊语的 phras 意为 to say, to speak，具有相同含义的还有来自希腊语的 pha, phe, phu。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 dic/dict，fa/fam/fess，locut/loqu，nounc/nunci，or，parl 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{paraphrase}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU；向旁边说 para（= beside）+ phras（= say）；'pærəfreiz}
  \wordfamily{phrase；phrasing；aphasia；blaspheme}
  \wordsense{n. 解释；意译}
  \wordphrase{the paraphrase}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of paraphrase.（此处展示 paraphrase 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{vt. 解释；意译}
  \wordphrase{paraphrase a passage}
  \wordexample{You should footnote the original source even when you paraphrase a passage.（即便是解释某一段文章，也应该加上脚注，标明出处。）}
  \wordexample{paraphrase a passage}
  \wordexample{paraphrase（n.解释）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{phrase}{freiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordsense{n.短语；惯用语；措词}
  \wordfamily{paraphrase}
  \wordfamily{phrasing}
  \wordfamily{aphasia}
  \wordfamily{blaspheme}
  \wordfamily{a phrase（短语）}
  \wordphrase{a phrase（短语）}
  \wordexample{a phrase（短语）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{phrasing}{'freiziŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordsense{n.说法，措词}
  \wordfamily{phrase}
  \wordfamily{aphasia}
  \wordfamily{paraphrase}
  \wordfamily{blaspheme}
  \wordfamily{a phrasing（说法，措词）}
  \wordphrase{a phrasing（说法，措词）}
  \wordexample{a phrasing（说法，措词）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{aphasia}{ə'feiziə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{phrasing；blaspheme；phrase；blasphemous；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{n. 失语症 *}
  \wordphrase{an aphasia（失语症）}
  \wordexample{an aphasia（失语症）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{blaspheme}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU；blæs'fi:m}
  \wordfamily{aphasia；blasphemous；phrasing；blasphemy；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{v. 口出恶言，亵渎 *}
  \wordphrase{blaspheme the name of God（亵渎上帝之名）}
  \wordexample{blaspheme the name of God（亵渎上帝之名）}
  \wordexample{to blaspheme（口出恶言，亵渎）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{blasphemous}{'blæsfəməs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{blaspheme；blasphemy；aphasia；emphatic；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{a. 不敬的，亵渎的 *}
  \wordphrase{be blasphemous（不敬的，亵渎的）}
  \wordexample{be blasphemous（不敬的，亵渎的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{blasphemy}{'blæsfəmi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{blasphemous；emphatic；blaspheme；euphemism；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{n. 对神的不敬，亵渎；侮慢的言行 *}
  \wordphrase{a blasphemy（对神的不敬，亵渎）}
  \wordexample{a blasphemy（对神的不敬，亵渎）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{emphatic}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU；im'fætik}
  \wordfamily{emphasis（强调）；paraphrase（解释）；phrase（短语）}
  \wordsense{a. 加强语气的；强调的；明确的；肯定的 *}
  \wordphrase{emphatic gesture / opinion（坚决的姿态 / 意见）}
  \wordphrase{emphatic person（语气强烈的人）}
  \wordphrase{emphatic denial（断然的否定）}
  \wordexample{emphatic gesture / opinion（坚决的姿态 / 意见）}
  \wordexample{emphatic person（语气强烈的人）}
  \wordexample{emphatic denial（断然的否定）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{euphemism}{'ju:fəmizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{emphatic；euphuism；blasphemy；prophecy；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{n. 委婉语；委婉的表达 *}
  \wordphrase{an euphemism（委婉语）}
  \wordexample{an euphemism（委婉语）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{euphuism}{'ju:fju:izəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{euphemism；prophecy；emphatic；prophesy；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{n. 华丽的措辞（或文章） *}
  \wordphrase{an euphuism（华丽的措辞（或文章））}
  \wordexample{an euphuism（华丽的措辞（或文章））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{prophecy}{'prɔfəsi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{euphuism；prophesy；euphemism；prophet；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{n. 预言（能力） *}
  \wordphrase{a prophecy（预言（能力））}
  \wordexample{a prophecy（预言（能力））}

\begin{word}[***]{prophesy}{'prɔfəsai}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU}
  \wordfamily{prophecy；prophet；euphuism；euphemism；paraphrase（解释）}
  \wordsense{v. 预言 *}
  \wordphrase{to prophesy（预言）}
  \wordexample{to prophesy（预言）}

\begin{word}[***]{prophet}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PHRAS, PHA, PHE, PHU；'prɔfit}
  \wordfamily{y（脱落，变成）；paraphrase（解释）；phrase（短语）}
  \wordsense{n. 先知，预言家；主张人，提倡者 *}
  \wordphrase{sharp, acid。在元音前，oxy 中的}
  \wordexample{sharp, acid。在元音前，oxy 中的}
  \wordexample{a prophet（先知，预言家）}
\end{word}



\chapter{OXY[OX]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根OXY[OX] 来自希腊语的 oxy 意为 sharp, acid。在元音前，oxy 中的 y 脱落，变成 ox。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{paroxysm}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OXY[OX]；变得非常尖锐 par<para（= intensive）+ oxy（= sharp, acid）；'pærəksizəm}
  \wordfamily{oxygen；oxymoron；oxide；oxidize}
  \wordsense{n. （愤怒、笑声等的）突然爆发；（周期性疾病的）发作}
  \wordphrase{paroxysm of rage overtook}
  \wordexample{A paroxysm of rage overtook her and she began shouting at the students.（她突然大发脾气，向学生们大声喊叫。）}
  \wordexample{paroxysm of rage overtook}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{oxygen}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OXY[OX]；'ɔksidʒən}
  \wordfamily{oxygenize（使氧化）；paroxysm（（愤怒、笑声等的）突然爆发）；oxymoron（语】矛盾形容法（例如：sweet sorrow,）}
  \wordsense{n. 氧气 *}
  \wordphrase{oxygen mask / tent（氧气罩 / 氧气帐）}
  \wordphrase{oxygen walker（（肺病、心脏病患者用的）小型携带用吸氧器）}
  \wordphrase{oxygen cycle（氧循环（大气中的氧气通过动物的呼吸变成二氧化碳，然后二氧化碳依靠植物的光合作用重新成为氧气的循环））}
  \wordexample{oxygen mask / tent（氧气罩 / 氧气帐）}
  \wordexample{oxygen walker（（肺病、心脏病患者用的）小型携带用吸氧器）}
  \wordexample{oxygen cycle（氧循环（大气中的氧气通过动物的呼吸变成二氧化碳，然后二氧化碳依靠植物的光合作用重新成为氧气的循环））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{oxymoron}{ˌɔksi'mɔ:rɔn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OXY[OX]}
  \wordfamily{oxygen；oxide；paroxysm；oxidize}
  \wordsense{n. 【语】矛盾形容法（例如：sweet sorrow, cruel kindness） *}
  \wordphrase{an oxymoron（矛盾形容法（例如：sweet sorrow, cruel kindness））}
  \wordexample{an oxymoron（矛盾形容法（例如：sweet sorrow, cruel kindness））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{oxide}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OXY[OX]；'ɔksaid}
  \wordfamily{oxidization（氧化（作用））；paroxysm（（愤怒、笑声等的）突然爆发）；oxygen（氧气 *）}
  \wordsense{n. 氧化物 *}
  \wordphrase{an oxide（氧化物）}
  \wordexample{an oxide（氧化物）}
  \wordexample{oxide（['ɔksaid]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{oxidize}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OXY[OX]；'ɔksidaiz}
  \wordfamily{paroxysm（（愤怒、笑声等的）突然爆发）；oxygen（氧气 *）；oxymoron（语】矛盾形容法（例如：sweet sorrow,）}
  \wordsense{v. （使）氧化；（使）生锈 *}
  \wordphrase{oxidizing agent / flame（氧化剂 / 氧化焰）}
  \wordexample{oxidizing agent / flame（氧化剂 / 氧化焰）}
  \wordexample{to oxidize（氧化）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{dioxide}{dai'ɔksaid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 OXY[OX]}
  \wordfamily{oxidize；oxide；oxymoron；oxygen；paroxysm（（愤怒、笑声等的）突然爆发）}
  \wordsense{n. 二氧化物 *di（= two）,}
  \wordphrase{a dioxide（二氧化物）}
  \wordexample{a dioxide（二氧化物）}
\end{word}



\chapter{METER[METR]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根METER[METR] 来自希腊语的 meter 意为 measure，metr 为其变形。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 mens。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{parameter}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]；向旁边量 para（= beside）+ meter（= measure）；pə'ræmitə(r)}
  \wordfamily{asymmetry；symmetry；barometer；chronometer}
  \wordsense{n. 参数}
  \wordphrase{parameters of its product}
  \wordexample{The company is always expanding the parameters of its product offerings.（那家公司常常扩大商品供给的参数。）}
  \wordexample{parameters of its product}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{asymmetry}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]}
  \wordfamily{parameter；symmetry；barometer；chronometer}
  \wordsense{n. 不均衡，不对称 *a<an（= not, without）, sym<syn（= together）,}
  \wordphrase{an asymmetry（不均衡，不对称 [ei'simitri]）}
  \wordexample{an asymmetry（不均衡，不对称 [ei'simitri]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{symmetry}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]；'simitri}
  \wordfamily{symmetric（/ symmetrical（均衡的）；symmetrically（对称地）；parameter（参数）}
  \wordsense{n. 对称；匀称 *sym<syn（= together）,}
  \wordphrase{symmetry of her face}
  \wordexample{The bump on the left side of her forehead spoilt the symmetry of her face.（她额头左侧的肿块破坏了她脸部的对称。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{barometer}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]；bə'rɔmitə(r)}
  \wordfamily{barometric（气压（计）的）；parameter（参数）；asymmetry（不均衡）}
  \wordsense{n. 气压计；晴雨表；〈喻〉显示（舆论、物价等）变化的事物 *}
  \wordphrase{barometer stock（标准股）}
  \wordexample{barometer stock（标准股）}
  \wordexample{a barometer（气压计）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{chronometer}{krə'nɔmitə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]}
  \wordfamily{barometer；diameter；symmetry；diametrically；parameter（参数）}
  \wordsense{n. （特别指航海中使用的）精密计时表 *}
  \wordphrase{a chronometer（精密计时表）}
  \wordexample{a chronometer（精密计时表）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{diameter}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]；dai'æmitə(r)}
  \wordfamily{parameter（参数）；asymmetry（不均衡）；symmetry（对称）}
  \wordsense{n. 直径；（透镜的）倍 *}
  \wordphrase{diameter of a tree-trunk（树干的直径）}
  \wordexample{a lens that magnifies 20 diameters（放大 20 倍的透镜）}
  \wordexample{diameter of a tree-trunk（树干的直径）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{diametrically}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]；ˌdaiə'metrikli}
  \wordfamily{diameter；geometry；chronometer；perimeter；parameter（参数）}
  \wordsense{ad. 完全相反地；直径地 *}
  \wordphrase{diametrically opposed view（完全相反的观点）}
  \wordexample{diametrically opposed view（完全相反的观点）}
  \wordexample{diametrically（完全相反地）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{geometry}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]；dʒi'ɔmitri}
  \wordfamily{geometric（/ geometrical（几何学（上）的）；parameter（参数）；asymmetry（不均衡）}
  \wordsense{n. 几何学 *}
  \wordphrase{a geometry（几何学）}
  \wordexample{a geometry（几何学）}
  \wordexample{geometry（[dʒi'ɔmitri]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{perimeter}{pə'rimitə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 METER[METR]}
  \wordfamily{geometry；diametrically；diameter；chronometer；parameter（参数）}
  \wordsense{n. 【数】周；周边 *}
  \wordphrase{a perimeter（周）}
  \wordexample{a perimeter（周）}
\end{word}



\chapter{JUR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根JUR 来自拉丁语的 jur 意为 to swear, law。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{perjury}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；虚假地宣誓 per（= falsely）+ jur（= swear, law）；'pə:dʒəri}
  \wordfamily{perjure（使作伪证）；perjurer（作伪证者）；abjure（发誓放弃）}
  \wordsense{n. 【律】伪证（罪）；背信弃义}
  \wordphrase{perjury and fined 2,000}
  \wordexample{The witness was convicted of perjury and fined 2,000 dollars.（那个证人被判犯有伪证罪，并被处以 2000 美元的罚金。）}
  \wordexample{perjury and fined 2,000}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{abjure}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；əb'dʒuə(r)}
  \wordfamily{perjury；abjuration；adjure；conjure}
  \wordsense{v. 发誓放弃；公开放弃（权利、信仰等） *ab（= away）,}
  \wordphrase{abjure one's religion（抛弃信仰）}
  \wordphrase{abjure the realm（放弃领土）}
  \wordexample{abjure one's religion（抛弃信仰）}
  \wordexample{abjure the realm（放弃领土）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{abjuration}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；ˌæbdʒuə'reiʃn}
  \wordfamily{abjure；adjure；perjury；conjure}
  \wordsense{n. 发誓放弃；公开放弃 *ab（= away）,}
  \wordphrase{abjuration of faith（信仰的抛弃）}
  \wordexample{abjuration of faith（信仰的抛弃）}
  \wordexample{an abjuration（发誓放弃）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{adjure}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；ə'dʒuə(r)}
  \wordfamily{perjury（律】伪证（罪））；abjure（发誓放弃）；abjuration（发誓放弃）}
  \wordsense{v. 恳求；严令 *ad（= to）,}
  \wordphrase{adjure you}
  \wordexample{I adjure you to tell the truth.（我命令你说实话。）}
  \wordexample{adjure you}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{conjure}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；'kʌndʒə(r)}
  \wordfamily{conjurer（/ conjuror（魔术师，变戏法的人）；perjury（律】伪证（罪））；abjure（发誓放弃）}
  \wordsense{v. 念咒语召唤；魔法变出；使人想起 *con<com（= together）,}
  \wordphrase{conjuring trick（魔术）}
  \wordexample{conjure a rabbit out of a hat（从帽子里变出一只兔子）}
  \wordexample{to conjure（念咒语召唤）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{injure}{'indʒə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR}
  \wordfamily{conjure；injured；adjure；injurious；perjury（律】伪证（罪））}
  \wordsense{v. 使受伤，损害；伤害（感情、名誉等） *in（= not）,}
  \wordphrase{to injure（使受伤，损害）}
  \wordexample{to injure（使受伤，损害）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{injured}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；'indʒəd}
  \wordfamily{perjury（律】伪证（罪））；abjure（发誓放弃）；abjuration（发誓放弃）}
  \wordsense{a. （感情）受伤的；（名誉）被损害的 *in（= not）,}
  \wordphrase{the dead and the injured（（事故等的）死伤者）}
  \wordphrase{in an injured voice（用受伤的声音）}
  \wordphrase{injured look（受伤的表情）}
  \wordexample{the dead and the injured（（事故等的）死伤者）}
  \wordexample{in an injured voice（用受伤的声音）}
  \wordexample{injured look（受伤的表情）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{injurious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR}
  \wordfamily{injured；injury；injure；jurisprudence；perjury（律】伪证（罪））}
  \wordsense{a. 有害的；致伤的；诽谤的，中伤的 *in（= not）,}
  \wordphrase{injurious to health（有损健康的）}
  \wordexample{behavior that is injurious to social order（对社会秩序有害的行为）}
  \wordexample{injurious to health（有损健康的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{injury}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；'indʒəri}
  \wordfamily{perjury（律】伪证（罪））；abjure（发誓放弃）；abjuration（发誓放弃）}
  \wordsense{n. （对人、动物、精神等的）伤害；（对物的）损伤；（对健康的）损害；伤口 *in（= not）,}
  \wordphrase{injury to the head（头上的伤）}
  \wordphrase{do a person an injury（让人蒙受损害）}
  \wordphrase{injury to my pride（对我自尊心的伤害）}
  \wordexample{injury to the head（头上的伤）}
  \wordexample{do a person an injury（让人蒙受损害）}
  \wordexample{injury to my pride（对我自尊心的伤害）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{jurisprudence}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；ˌdʒuəris'pru:dəns}
  \wordfamily{injury；juridical；injurious；jurist；perjury（律】伪证（罪））}
  \wordsense{n. 法学 *pr<pro（= before）, ud<vid（= look）,}
  \wordphrase{Jurisprudence}
  \wordexample{Doctor of Jurisprudence（法学博士，缩写：J.D.）}
  \wordexample{Jurisprudence}

\begin{word}[***]{juridical}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR；dʒuə'ridikl}

  \wordphrase{juridical days（开庭日期）}
  \wordexample{juridical days（开庭日期）}
  \wordexample{be juridical（司法（上）的）}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 JUR}

\chapter{VAD, VAS[WAD]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根VAD, VAS[WAD] 来自拉丁语的 vad, vas 意为 to go。变形为 wad。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 ced/cess[ceed, ceas]，grad/gred/gress，it 和来自希腊语的 bat[bet, bit]，以及来自盎格鲁-撒克逊语的 fare。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{pervade}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAD, VAS[WAD]；这儿、那儿，一一走遍 per（= through, throughout）+ vad（= go）；pə'veid}
  \wordfamily{pervasion（弥漫，渗透）；pervasive（遍及的，普遍深入的）；invade（入侵）}
  \wordsense{vt. 遍及；弥漫于，渗透于}
  \wordphrase{pervades a lot}
  \wordexample{According to conservatives, harmful violence pervades a lot of television programming.（保守主义者认为，有害的暴力行为渗透到了很多电视节目中。）}
  \wordexample{pervades a lot}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{invade}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAD, VAS[WAD]；in'veid}
  \wordfamily{invasion（入侵，侵略）；invader（侵略者，入侵者）；pervade（遍及）}
  \wordsense{v. 入侵，侵略；侵害；大批进入 *}
  \wordphrase{city invaded by tourists（游客大批涌入的城市）}
  \wordexample{city invaded by tourists（游客大批涌入的城市）}
  \wordexample{to invade（入侵，侵略）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{vade-mecum}{ˌveidi'mi:kəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAD, VAS[WAD]}
  \wordfamily{invade；wade；pervade；waddle}
  \wordsense{n. 随身携带品；袖珍指南手册 *}
  \wordphrase{a vade-mecum（随身携带品）}
  \wordexample{a vade-mecum（随身携带品）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{wade}{weid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAD, VAS[WAD]}
  \wordfamily{vade-mecum；waddle；invade；pervade}
  \wordsense{v. 涉水而过（江、河等） *}
  \wordphrase{to wade（涉水而过（江、河等））}
  \wordexample{to wade（涉水而过（江、河等））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{waddle}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAD, VAS[WAD]}
  \wordfamily{wade；vade-mecum；invade；pervade}
  \wordsense{v. 蹒跚而行}
  \wordphrase{to waddle（蹒跚而行）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to waddle".（常见搭配：蹒跚而行。）}
  \wordsense{n. 蹒跚，摇摆的步子 *}
  \wordphrase{to waddle（蹒跚而行）}
  \wordexample{to waddle（蹒跚而行）}
  \wordexample{a waddle（蹒跚，摇摆的步子）}
\end{word}



\chapter{ANN[ENN]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根ANN[ENN] 来自拉丁语的 ann 意为 year，其元音弱化后变成 enn。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{perennial}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；持续整整一年 per（= through, throughout）+ enn<ann（= year）；pə'reniəl}
  \wordfamily{annals；anniversary；Anno（Domini）；annual}
  \wordsense{a. 终年不断的；长期的；（植物）多年生的}
  \wordphrase{be perennial}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of perennial.（此处展示 perennial 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 多年生植物}
  \wordphrase{perennial star Julie Andrews}
  \wordexample{The perennial star Julie Andrews no longer sings, but still acts.（老牌歌星朱莉·安德鲁斯不再演唱，但还继续演戏。）}
  \wordexample{perennial star Julie Andrews}
  \wordexample{perennial（a.终年不断的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{annals}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；'ænəlz}
  \wordfamily{perennial（终年不断的）；anniversary（周年纪念日）；Anno Domini（纪元）}
  \wordsense{n. 编年史；历史记载；学会的年报}
  \wordphrase{an annals（编年史）}
  \wordexample{an annals（编年史）}
  \wordexample{annals（['ænəlz]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{anniversary}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；ˌæni'və:səri}
  \wordfamily{annals；Anno（Domini）；perennial；annual}
  \wordsense{n. 周年纪念日；结婚周年 *}
  \wordphrase{my wedding anniversary（我的结婚纪念日）}
  \wordphrase{anniversary of Shakespeare's birth（莎士比亚的诞辰纪念日）}
  \wordphrase{anniversary dinner（周年纪念宴会）}
  \wordexample{my wedding anniversary（我的结婚纪念日）}
  \wordexample{anniversary of Shakespeare's birth（莎士比亚的诞辰纪念日）}
  \wordexample{anniversary dinner（周年纪念宴会）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{Anno Domini}{'ænəu'dɔminai}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]}
  \wordfamily{anniversary；annual；annals；annuity；perennial（终年不断的）}
  \wordsense{n. 纪元；公元（简称 AD） *}
  \wordphrase{an Anno Domini（纪元）}
  \wordexample{an Anno Domini（纪元）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{annual}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；'ænjuəl}
  \wordfamily{annually（每年）；perennial（终年不断的）；annals（编年史）}
  \wordsense{a. 每年的；一年一次的；一年生的}
  \wordphrase{hardy annual（耐寒一年生植物）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "hardy annual".（常见搭配：耐寒一年生植物。）}
  \wordsense{n. 一年生植物；年鉴，年报}
  \wordphrase{his annual income（他的年收入）}
  \wordphrase{annual production（年产量）}
  \wordphrase{annual message（年度咨文）}
  \wordexample{his annual income（他的年收入）}
  \wordexample{annual production（年产量）}
  \wordexample{annual message（年度咨文）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{annuity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；ə'nju:əti}
  \wordfamily{annuitant（年金受领人）；perennial（终年不断的）；annals（编年史）}
  \wordsense{n. 年金}
  \wordphrase{annuity bond（年金债券）}
  \wordexample{annuity bond（年金债券）}
  \wordexample{an annuity（年金）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{biennial}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]}
  \wordfamily{annuity；millennium；annual；centennial；perennial（终年不断的）}
  \wordsense{a. 两年一次的，每两年的}
  \wordphrase{be biennial（两年一次的，每两年的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be biennial".（常见搭配：两年一次的，每两年的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 两年生植物 *bi（= two）,}
  \wordphrase{be biennial（两年一次的，每两年的）}
  \wordexample{be biennial（两年一次的，每两年的）}
  \wordexample{a biennial（两年生植物）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{millennium}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；mi'leniəm}
  \wordfamily{millenarian（相信千禧年的人）；perennial（终年不断的）；annals（编年史）}
  \wordsense{n. 一千年；千年王国，千禧年；未来的黄金时代 *mil（= thousand）,}
  \wordphrase{a millennium（一千年）}
  \wordexample{a millennium（一千年）}
  \wordexample{millennium（[mi'leniəm]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{centennial}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；sen'teniəl}
  \wordfamily{perennial（终年不断的）；annals（编年史）；anniversary（周年纪念日）}
  \wordsense{n. 一百周年；一百周年纪念日}
  \wordphrase{a centennial（一百周年）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a centennial".（常见搭配：一百周年。）}
  \wordsense{a. 一百年一次的；一百周年的；一百岁的 *cent（= hundred）,}
  \wordphrase{a centennial（一百周年）}
  \wordexample{a centennial（一百周年）}
  \wordexample{be centennial（一百年一次的）}
  \wordexample{centennial（[sen'teniəl]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{bicentennial}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；ˌbaisen'teniəl}
  \wordfamily{perennial（终年不断的）；annals（编年史）；anniversary（周年纪念日）}
  \wordsense{n. 两百周年；两百周年纪念日}
  \wordphrase{a bicentennial（两百周年）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a bicentennial".（常见搭配：两百周年。）}
  \wordsense{a. 两百年一次的；两百周年的；两百岁的 *bi（= two）, cent（= hundred）,}
  \wordphrase{a bicentennial（两百周年）}
  \wordexample{a bicentennial（两百周年）}
  \wordexample{be bicentennial（两百年一次的）}
  \wordexample{bicentennial（[ˌbaisen'teniəl]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{quincentennial}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ANN[ENN]；ˌkwinsen'teniəl}
  \wordfamily{perennial（终年不断的）；annals（编年史）；anniversary（周年纪念日）}
  \wordsense{n. 五百周年；五百周年纪念日}
  \wordphrase{a quincentennial（五百周年）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a quincentennial".（常见搭配：五百周年。）}
  \wordsense{a. 五百年一次的；五百周年的；五百岁的 *quin（= five）, cent（= hundred）,}
  \wordphrase{a quincentennial（五百周年）}
  \wordexample{a quincentennial（五百周年）}
  \wordexample{be quincentennial（五百年一次的）}
  \wordexample{quincentennial（[ˌkwinsen'teniəl]）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MEA[ME]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MEA[ME] 来自拉丁语的 mea 意为 to pass，其变形为 me。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{permeate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEA[ME]；这里、那里，一一经过、流过 per（= through）+ me<mea（= pass, flow）；'pə:mieit}
  \wordfamily{permeation（渗透，漫透）；permeability（浸透性，渗透性）；permeable（可以渗透的）}
  \wordsense{vt. 渗透，浸透；弥漫}
  \wordphrase{The smell of fish}
  \wordexample{The smell of fish permeated the kitchen for days.（连续几天厨房里一直弥漫着鱼腥味。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{impermeable}{im'pə:miəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MEA[ME]}
  \wordfamily{permeate；quincentennial（五百周年）；bicentennial（两百周年）}
  \wordsense{a. 不透水的 *im<in（= not）, per（= through）,}
  \wordphrase{be impermeable（不透水的）}
  \wordexample{be impermeable（不透水的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{FUNCT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根FUNCT 来自拉丁语的 funct 意为 to perform。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{perfunctory}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FUNCT；假装做事的 per（= falsely）+ funct（= perform）；pə'fʌŋktəri}
  \wordfamily{perfunctorily（敷衍地，马马虎虎地）；defunct（死的）；function（功能）}
  \wordsense{a. 敷衍的，马马虎虎的}
  \wordphrase{perfunctory glance}
  \wordexample{The acquisitions editor only gave a perfunctory glance at the volume of poetry.（组稿编辑只是马马虎虎地看了一眼那本诗集。）}
  \wordexample{perfunctory glance}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{defunct}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FUNCT；停止、中断做事的 de（= off, from）+ funct（= perform）；di'fʌŋkt}
  \wordfamily{perfunctory；function；functional；functionary}
  \wordsense{a. 死的；（法律等）废止的}
  \wordphrase{defunct for a decade}
  \wordexample{The movie theater in my small town has been defunct for a decade.（我们小城镇的剧场关门已有十年了。）}
  \wordexample{defunct for a decade}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{function}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FUNCT；'fʌŋkʃn}
  \wordfamily{functionalism（功能主义）；functionalist（功能主义者）；perfunctory（敷衍的）}
  \wordsense{n. 功能，作用；职务，职能；宗教仪式，庆典活动；【数】函数}
  \wordphrase{the function}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of function.（此处展示 function 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 起作用；运转}
  \wordphrase{function of the heart（心脏的功能）}
  \wordexample{the numerous functions that the Queen must attend（女王不得不参加的各种仪式）}
  \wordexample{He functioned as boss.（他起到了首领的作用。）}
  \wordexample{function of the heart（心脏的功能）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{functional}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FUNCT；'fʌŋkʃənl}
  \wordfamily{function；functionary；defunct；perfunctory}
  \wordsense{a. 机能的；作用的；职务（上）的；（建筑等）从使用的观点设计（或构成）的}
  \wordphrase{functional disorder（机能紊乱）}
  \wordphrase{functional representation（【医】功能表达法）}
  \wordphrase{functional furniture（实用的家具）}
  \wordexample{functional disorder（机能紊乱）}
  \wordexample{functional representation（【医】功能表达法）}
  \wordexample{functional furniture（实用的家具）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{functionary}{'fʌŋkʃənəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FUNCT}
  \wordsense{n.（尤指政府机关、政党的）官员；公务员}
  \wordfamily{functional}
  \wordfamily{function}
  \wordfamily{defunct}
  \wordfamily{perfunctory}
  \wordfamily{a functionary（官员）}
  \wordphrase{a functionary（官员）}
  \wordexample{a functionary（官员）}
\end{word}



\chapter{CAU}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根CAU 来自拉丁语的 cau 意为 to take care。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{precaution}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CAU；事先小心或注意 pre（= before）+ cau（= take care）；pri'kɔ:ʃn}
  \wordfamily{caution（小心）；cautious（谨慎的）；functionary（（尤指政府机关、政党的）官员）}
  \wordsense{n. 谨慎；警惕；预防}
  \wordphrase{precaution please fasten your}
  \wordexample{As a precaution, please fasten your seat belt before starting the car.（作为一种预防措施，请在发动车之前系好安全带。）}
  \wordexample{precaution please fasten your}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{caution}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CAU；'kɔ:ʃn}
  \wordfamily{cautioned（not）；precaution（谨慎）；cautious（谨慎的）}
  \wordsense{n. 小心，慎重；警告；（外貌、行动或言语等）令人发笑的人}
  \wordphrase{cautionary tales（警世故事）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "cautionary tales".（常见搭配：警世故事。）}
  \wordsense{v. 使某人小心；警告}
  \wordphrase{cautioned not}
  \wordexample{We were cautioned not to drive fast.（我们被警告不能开快车。）}
  \wordexample{cautioned not}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{cautious}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CAU；'kɔ:ʃəs}
  \wordfamily{cautiously（谨慎地，小心地）；precaution（谨慎）；caution（小心）}
  \wordsense{a. 谨慎的，小心的}
  \wordphrase{cautious about giving offense（唯恐让对方生气而小心翼翼的）}
  \wordexample{cautious about giving offense（唯恐让对方生气而小心翼翼的）}
\end{word}



\chapter{MAT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MAT 来自拉丁语的 mat 意为 ripe。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{premature}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MAT；在成熟之前的 pre（= before）+ mat（= ripe）；'premətʃə(r)}
  \wordfamily{immature；mature；maturity；maturate}
  \wordsense{a. （做法等）不成熟的；太早的，不到期的；早产的}
  \wordphrase{premature to fire her}
  \wordexample{It would be premature to fire her; she's still learning her job.（解雇她时机尚早，她还在熟悉工作。）}
  \wordexample{premature to fire her}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{immature}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MAT；ˌimə'tjuə(r)}
  \wordfamily{immaturity（未成熟（状态）；premature（（做法等）不成熟的）；mature（成熟的）}
  \wordsense{a. 未成熟的，发育未全的 *}
  \wordphrase{immature girl（尚年幼的少女）}
  \wordphrase{immature minds of young children（儿童未成熟的心智）}
  \wordexample{immature girl（尚年幼的少女）}
  \wordexample{immature minds of young children（儿童未成熟的心智）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{mature}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MAT；mə'tʃuə(r)}
  \wordfamily{immature；maturity；premature；maturate}
  \wordsense{a. 成熟的；酿熟的；慎重的；周到的；（票据）到支付日期的}
  \wordphrase{be mature}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of mature.（此处展示 mature 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 使成熟；使长成；（票据）到期；酿成}
  \wordphrase{mature woman（成熟的女人）}
  \wordphrase{mature plans（慎重的计划）}
  \wordexample{mature woman（成熟的女人）}
  \wordexample{mature plans（慎重的计划）}
  \wordexample{This wine has not matured properly.（葡萄酒还没有酿好。）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{maturity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MAT；mə'tʃuərəti}
  \wordfamily{mature；maturate；immature；premature}
  \wordsense{n. 成熟；（票据的）到期}
  \wordphrase{come to / reach maturity（成熟）}
  \wordexample{come to / reach maturity（成熟）}
  \wordexample{a maturity（成熟）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{maturate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MAT；'mætʃureit}
  \wordfamily{premature（（做法等）不成熟的）；immature（未成熟的）；mature（成熟的）}
  \wordsense{v. 成熟；化脓}
  \wordphrase{maturate the issue}
  \wordexample{maturation（成熟；化脓）}
  \wordexample{prehend/prehens，pris，cap/capt/cept/ceiv[cip, cup, ceit]，empt/em，rap/rav，lab/lep 等。}
\end{word}



\chapter{SUMPT, SUM}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根SUMPT, SUM 来自拉丁语的 sum, sumpt 意为 to take, to use, to waste。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 prehend/prehens，pris，cap/capt/cept/ceiv[cip, cup, ceit]，empt/em，rap/rav，lab/lep 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{presume}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM；事先抓住、思考 pre（= before）+ sum（= take）；pri'zju:m}
  \wordfamily{presumption（推断）；presumptuous（放肆的）；presumable（可以推断的）；presuming（放肆的）；presumptive（推断的）；presumably（据推测）}
  \wordsense{v. 推断；擅自（做），冒昧（做）}
  \wordphrase{presume you'll be flying}
  \wordexample{I presume you'll be flying, not driving, right?（我猜你会坐飞机，而不是自己开车，对吧？）}
  \wordexample{presume you'll be flying}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{sumptuous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM；用得太多或者浪费的 sumpt（= take, use, waste）；'sʌmptʃuəs}
  \wordfamily{presume；assume；assumption；consume}
  \wordsense{a. 昂贵的，奢侈的；豪华的，华丽的}
  \wordphrase{sumptuous meal You're a}
  \wordexample{Thank you for the sumptuous meal. You're a wonderful host.（感谢您的盛宴，您真是一位盛情的主人。）}
  \wordexample{sumptuous meal You're a}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{assume}{ə'sju:m}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM}
  \wordfamily{sumptuous；assumption；presume；consume}
  \wordsense{v. 假定；采取；承担；就任；假装 *}
  \wordphrase{to assume（假定）}
  \wordexample{to assume（假定）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{assumption}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM；ə'sʌmpʃn}
  \wordfamily{presume（推断）；sumptuous（昂贵的）；assume（假定）}
  \wordsense{n. 假定，假说；担任；伪装 *}
  \wordphrase{with an assumption of indifference（装作漠不关心）}
  \wordexample{his assumption of power / the presidency（他掌权 / 任职总统）}
  \wordexample{with an assumption of indifference（装作漠不关心）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{consume}{kən'sju:m}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM}
  \wordfamily{assumption；consuming；assume；consumer；presume（推断）}
  \wordsense{v. 消费；浪费；吃光，喝光；耗尽；使全神贯注 *}
  \wordphrase{to consume（消费）}
  \wordexample{to consume（消费）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{consuming}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM；kən'sju:miŋ}
  \wordfamily{consume；consumer；assumption；consumption；presume（推断）}
  \wordsense{a. 强烈的；消费的 *}
  \wordphrase{consuming ambition（强烈的野心）}
  \wordexample{consuming ambition（强烈的野心）}
  \wordexample{be consuming（强烈的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{consumer}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM；kən'sju:mə(r)}
  \wordfamily{consuming；consumption；consume；consumptive；presume（推断）}
  \wordsense{n. 消费者 *}
  \wordphrase{consumer goods（消费品；生活资料）}
  \wordphrase{consumer price index（消费者物价指数，缩写：CPI）}
  \wordphrase{consumer research（消费者调查）}
  \wordexample{consumer goods（消费品；生活资料）}
  \wordexample{consumer price index（消费者物价指数，缩写：CPI）}
  \wordexample{consumer research（消费者调查）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{consumption}{kən'sʌmpʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM}
  \wordfamily{consumer；consumptive；consuming；resume；presume（推断）}
  \wordsense{n. 消费；消耗；消费量；肺痨 *}
  \wordphrase{a consumption（消费）}
  \wordexample{a consumption（消费）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{consumptive}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM}
  \wordfamily{consumption；resume；consumer；resumption；presume（推断）}
  \wordsense{a. 消费的；消耗性的；肺痨的}
  \wordphrase{be consumptive（消费的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be consumptive".（常见搭配：消费的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 肺痨患者 *}
  \wordphrase{be consumptive（消费的）}
  \wordexample{be consumptive（消费的）}
  \wordexample{a consumptive（肺痨患者）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{resume}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM；ri'zju:m}
  \wordfamily{presume（推断）；sumptuous（昂贵的）；assume（假定）}
  \wordsense{v. 重新开始；继续；重新占用；重返；收回 *}
  \wordphrase{to resume（重新开始）}
  \wordexample{to resume（重新开始）}
  \wordexample{resume（[ri'zju:m]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{resumption}{ri'zʌmpʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM}
  \wordfamily{resume；subsume；consumptive；sumpter；presume（推断）}
  \wordsense{n. 重新开始 *}
  \wordphrase{a resumption（重新开始）}
  \wordexample{a resumption（重新开始）}
\end{word}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUMPT, SUM}

  \wordsense{v. 使包含；把……纳入 *}
  \wordphrase{to subsume（使包含）}
  \wordexample{to subsume（使包含）}

\chapter{DOMIN}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根DOMIN 来自拉丁语的 domin 意为 master, lord。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{predominant}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOMIN；提前征服、熟练、精通的 pre（= before）+ domin（= master）；pri'dɔminənt}
  \wordfamily{predominate（支配）；predominance（支配）；predominantly（占优势地）}
  \wordsense{a. 突出的；主要的，支配的；占优势的；显著的}
  \wordphrase{predominant color}
  \wordexample{The predominant color in her decorating scheme is taupe.（她的装饰方案的主色是褐灰色。）}
  \wordexample{predominant color}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{dominant}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOMIN；'dɔminənt}
  \wordfamily{dominate（支配）；domination（支配）；dominance（优势）；predominant（突出的）}
  \wordsense{a. 支配的，统治的；居高临下的；高耸的}
  \wordphrase{dominant male}
  \wordexample{The dominant male in a group of dogs is called the "alpha male".（统治狗群的公狗被称做“阿尔法公狗”。）}
  \wordexample{dominant male}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{domineer}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOMIN；ˌdɔmi'niə(r)}
  \wordfamily{dominant；domineering；predominant；dominion}
  \wordsense{v. （\textasciitilde{} over）跋扈，作威作福}
  \wordphrase{Big boys sometimes domineer (over)}
  \wordexample{their small sisters.（大男孩们有时候会对小妹妹横行霸道。）}
  \wordexample{Big boys sometimes domineer (over)}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{domineering}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOMIN；ˌdɔmi'niəriŋ}
  \wordfamily{domineer；dominion；dominant；domino；predominant（突出的）}
  \wordsense{a. 跋扈的，盛气凌人的}
  \wordphrase{domineering sort}
  \wordexample{He's a very domineering sort of fellow.（他是个盛气凌人的家伙。）}
  \wordexample{domineering sort}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{dominion}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOMIN；də'minjən}
  \wordfamily{predominant（突出的）；dominant（支配的）；domineer（（\textasciitilde{} over））}
  \wordsense{n. 支配，统治；领土；（英联邦的）自治领}
  \wordphrase{exercise dominion over（对……行使统治权）}
  \wordexample{exercise dominion over（对……行使统治权）}
  \wordexample{the Dominion (of Canada)（加拿大自治领）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{domino}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 DOMIN；'dɔminəu}
  \wordfamily{predominant（突出的）；dominant（支配的）；domineer（（\textasciitilde{} over））}
  \wordsense{n. 假面服（在聚会或化装舞会上穿的带假面的衣服）；多米诺游戏；多米诺游戏中使用的骨牌（用木头或骨头做的扁小的长方形牌，上面有点数）}
  \wordphrase{domino effect（多米诺效应（因为一个事件引发一连串事件的连锁效应））}
  \wordphrase{domino theory（多米诺理论）}
  \wordexample{domino effect（多米诺效应（因为一个事件引发一连串事件的连锁效应））}
  \wordexample{domino theory（多米诺理论）}
\end{word}



\chapter{AMBUL[AMBL]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根AMBUL[AMBL] 来自拉丁语的 ambul 意为 to walk，变形为 ambl。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 pat。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{preamble}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AMBUL[AMBL]；提前走出来 pre（= before）+ ambl<ambul（= walk, go）；pri'æmbl}
  \wordfamily{perambulate；perambulator；ramble；rambling}
  \wordsense{n. （法律、条约等的）序言，前言}
  \wordphrase{preamble to my latest}
  \wordexample{My editor asked me to write a short preamble to my latest book.（负责我书稿的编辑让我为自己的新书写一篇简短的序言。）}
  \wordexample{preamble to my latest}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{perambulate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AMBUL[AMBL]；pə'ræmbjuleit}
  \wordfamily{preamble（（法律、条约等的）序言）；perambulator（四轮婴儿车（简称：pram）（在美国一般用 ba）；ramble（漫步）}
  \wordsense{v. 走过；徘徊；巡视 *}
  \wordphrase{to perambulate（走过）}
  \wordexample{to perambulate（走过）}
  \wordexample{perambulate（[pə'ræmbjuleit]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{perambulator}{pə'ræmbjuleitə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AMBUL[AMBL]}
  \wordfamily{perambulate；ramble；preamble；rambling}
  \wordsense{n. 四轮婴儿车（简称：pram）（在美国一般用 baby-carriage） *}
  \wordphrase{a perambulator（四轮婴儿车（简称：pram）（在美国一般用 baby-carriage））}
  \wordexample{a perambulator（四轮婴儿车（简称：pram）（在美国一般用 baby-carriage））}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{ramble}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AMBUL[AMBL]；'ræmbl}
  \wordfamily{preamble（（法律、条约等的）序言）；perambulate（走过）；perambulator（四轮婴儿车（简称：pram）（在美国一般用 ba）}
  \wordsense{v. 漫步；漫谈；像蔓草一样横生}
  \wordphrase{rambler roses（蔓生蔷薇）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "rambler roses".（常见搭配：蔓生蔷薇。）}
  \wordsense{n. 闲逛；漫步 *}
  \wordphrase{to ramble（漫步）}
  \wordexample{to ramble（漫步）}
  \wordexample{a ramble（闲逛）}
  \wordexample{ramble（['ræmbl]）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{rambling}{'ræmbliŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 AMBUL[AMBL]}
  \wordfamily{ramble；noctambulist；perambulator；somnambulism；preamble（（法律、条约等的）序言）}
  \wordsense{a. （街道、建筑等）布局零乱的；（演说、随笔等）散漫的 *}
  \wordphrase{be rambling（布局零乱的）}
  \wordexample{be rambling（布局零乱的）}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 AMBUL[AMBL]；nɔk'tæmbjulist}

  \wordexample{A common collocation is "to amble".（常见搭配：缓行。）}

  \wordphrase{to amble（缓行）}
  \wordexample{to amble（缓行）}

\chapter{POSTER}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根POSTER 来自拉丁语的 poster 意为 coming after。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{preposterous}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POSTER；本来应该在后面的东西跑到前面的 pre（= before）+ poster（= coming after）；pri'pɔstərəs}
  \wordfamily{preposterously（荒谬地，不合理地）；posterior（（时间、顺序）较晚的）；posterity（子孙）}
  \wordsense{a. 前后颠倒的；反常的；不合理的，荒谬的}
  \wordphrase{preposterous claim that he}
  \wordexample{He makes the preposterous claim that he is the best tennis player in the city.（他很荒唐地说自己是本市最出色的网球选手。）}
  \wordexample{preposterous claim that he}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{posterior}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POSTER；pɔ'stiəriə(r)}
  \wordfamily{preposterous（前后颠倒的）；posterity（子孙）；postern（暗道）}
  \wordsense{a. （时间、顺序）较晚的，以后的}
  \wordphrase{be posterior（较晚的，以后的）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "be posterior".（常见搭配：较晚的，以后的。）}
  \wordsense{n. 臀部（= buttocks）}
  \wordphrase{kick his posterior（踢他的屁股）}
  \wordexample{kick his posterior（踢他的屁股）}
  \wordexample{be posterior（较晚的，以后的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{posterity}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POSTER；pɔ'sterəti}
  \wordfamily{posterior；postern；preposterous}
  \wordsense{n. 子孙，后裔，后代}
  \wordphrase{a posterity（子孙，后裔，后代）}
  \wordexample{plant trees for the benefit of posterity（为了造福后代而植树）}
  \wordexample{a posterity（子孙，后裔，后代）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{postern}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 POSTER；'pɔstən}
  \wordfamily{preposterous（前后颠倒的）；posterior（（时间、顺序）较晚的）；posterity（子孙）}
  \wordsense{n. 暗道；后门；边门；私人出入口}
  \wordphrase{postern door / gate（后门）}
  \wordexample{postern door / gate（后门）}
  \wordexample{to heal, to attend to。}
\end{word}



\chapter{MED}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MED 来自拉丁语的 med 意为 to heal, to attend to。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{premeditated}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MED；事先注意的 pre（= before）+ med（= attend to, heal）；pri:'mediteitid}
  \wordfamily{premeditate（预先考虑）；premeditation（预先的设想）；meditate（（\textasciitilde{} on）深思）}
  \wordsense{a. 事先想好的，有计划的}
  \wordphrase{premeditated act She was}
  \wordexample{Her slapping you wasn't a premeditated act. She was just very angry.（她不是有意要打你，只是当时太生气了。）}
  \wordexample{premeditated act She was}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{meditate}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MED；'mediteit}
  \wordfamily{premeditated；meditation；remedy；remedial}
  \wordsense{v. （\textasciitilde{} on）深思，沉思；打算，企图 *}
  \wordphrase{meditate mischief / revenge（企图搞恶作剧 / 策划报复）}
  \wordphrase{meditate on his misfortune（深思自己的不幸）}
  \wordexample{meditate mischief / revenge（企图搞恶作剧 / 策划报复）}
  \wordexample{meditate on his misfortune（深思自己的不幸）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{meditation}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MED；ˌmedi'teiʃn}
  \wordfamily{meditative（冥想的，乐于冥想的）；premeditated（事先想好的）；meditate（（\textasciitilde{} on）深思）}
  \wordsense{n. 冥想，沉思，深思；（pl.）沉思录 *}
  \wordphrase{deep in meditation（陷入沉思的）}
  \wordexample{meditation on the causes of aggression in man（关于人类侵略原因的思考）}
  \wordexample{deep in meditation（陷入沉思的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{remedy}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MED；'remədi}
  \wordfamily{meditation；remedial；meditate；irremediable；premeditated（事先想好的）}
  \wordsense{n. 治疗；药物；补救（措施），矫正（法）}
  \wordphrase{the remedy}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of remedy.（此处展示 remedy 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{v. 治疗；矫正；除去（弊端等） *re（= again）,}
  \wordphrase{good remedy for colds（好的感冒药）}
  \wordphrase{past / beyond remedy（没有补救方法的）}
  \wordexample{the only remedy for the situation（这种情况的唯一补救措施）}
  \wordexample{good remedy for colds（好的感冒药）}
  \wordexample{past / beyond remedy（没有补救方法的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{remedial}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MED；ri'mi:diəl}
  \wordfamily{premeditated（事先想好的）；meditate（（\textasciitilde{} on）深思）；meditation（冥想）}
  \wordsense{a. 治疗的；矫正的；补救的 *re（= again）,}
  \wordphrase{remedial measures（补救措施）}
  \wordphrase{remedial education / classes（矫正教育 / 学习）}
  \wordexample{remedial measures（补救措施）}
  \wordexample{remedial education / classes（矫正教育 / 学习）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{irremediable}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MED；i'remi:diəbl}
  \wordfamily{remedial；medical；remedy；medicament；premeditated（事先想好的）}
  \wordsense{a. 无法治疗的；无法挽回的 *ir<in（= not）, re（= again）,}
  \wordphrase{irremediable acts / faults（不能挽回的行为 / 过失）}
  \wordexample{irremediable acts / faults（不能挽回的行为 / 过失）}
  \wordexample{be irremediable（无法治疗的）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{medical}{[]}

  \wordphrase{be medical}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of medical.（此处展示 medical 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{n. 体检 *}

\chapter{TEXT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根TEXT 来自拉丁语的 text 意为 to weave。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{pretext}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEXT；事先编织、编造 pre（= before）+ text（= weave）；'pri:tekst}
  \wordfamily{context；textile；texture；text}
  \wordsense{n. 借口；托词}
  \wordphrase{pretext for missing work}
  \wordexample{She used her mild cold as a pretext for missing work today.（今天她以不怎么严重的感冒为借口没去上班。）}
  \wordexample{pretext for missing work}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{context}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEXT；'kɔntekst}
  \wordfamily{contextual（上下文的）；pretext（借口）；textile（纺织品）}
  \wordsense{n. （文章的）上下文；（事件等的）来龙去脉，背景 *}
  \wordphrase{in this context（在这种背景下）}
  \wordexample{in this context（在这种背景下）}
  \wordexample{a context（上下文）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{textile}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEXT；'tekstail}
  \wordfamily{context；texture；pretext；text}
  \wordsense{n. 纺织品；编织原料}
  \wordphrase{the textile}
  \wordexample{This entry shows a common use of textile.（此处展示 textile 的常见用法。）}
  \wordsense{a. 纺织的 *}
  \wordphrase{textile process（纺织过程）}

  \wordphrase{textile art / fabrics（编织工艺 / 纺织品）}
  \wordexample{textile process（纺织过程）}
  \wordexample{the textile industry（纺织业）}
  \wordexample{textile art / fabrics（编织工艺 / 纺织品）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{texture}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 TEXT；'tekstʃə(r)}
  \wordfamily{textile；text；context；textual；pretext（借口）}
  \wordsense{n. （织物等的）质地，做工；（文艺作品等的）组织；结构}
  \wordphrase{texture of a mineral（矿物的构造）}
  \wordexample{cloth with a loose / close texture（质地稀松的 / 紧密的布）}
  \wordexample{skin of fine / coarse texture（细腻 / 粗糙的皮肤）}
  \wordexample{texture of a mineral（矿物的构造）}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{text}{[]}

  \wordphrase{stick to one's text（（故事等）没有脱离主题）}
  \wordexample{too much text and not enough pictures（文字太多，图片太少）}
  \wordexample{stick to one's text（（故事等）没有脱离主题）}
\end{word}

  \wordphrase{a subtlety（微妙）}

\chapter{MON[MIN]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根MON[MIN] 来自拉丁语的 mon 意为 to warn, to advise, to remind。变形为 min。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{admonish}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MON[MIN]；向某人提出忠告 ad（= to）+ mon（= warn, advise, remind）；əd'mɔniʃ}
  \wordfamily{admonition（训诫）；admonitory（告诫的）；premonition（预感）}
  \wordsense{vt. 训诫，告诫；警告；劝告}
  \wordphrase{admonished the children not}
  \wordexample{The teacher admonished the children not to ridicule the crippled girl.（老师告诫孩子们不要嘲笑那个跛脚的女孩儿。）}
  \wordexample{admonished the children not}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[**]{premonition}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MON[MIN]；事先警告、使想起 pre（= before）+ mon（= warn, advise, remind）；ˌpri:mə'niʃn}
  \wordfamily{premonitory（预告的）；admonish（训诫）；reminisce（追忆）}
  \wordsense{n. 预感，前兆；预告}
  \wordphrase{premonition that we were}
  \wordexample{I had a premonition that we were going to have an earthquake.（我预感到了我们会遭遇地震。）}
  \wordexample{premonition that we were}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[*]{reminisce}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MON[MIN]；返回记忆 re（= back）+ min<mon（= remind, remember, warn）；ˌremi'nis}
  \wordfamily{reminiscence（追忆，回想）；reminiscent（追忆的，回想的）；admonish（训诫）}
  \wordsense{vi. 追忆，回想}
  \wordphrase{reminiscing about the old}
  \wordexample{We had such fun at the 20th high school reunion, reminiscing about the old days.（在高中同学毕业 20 周年聚会上，我们沉浸在对往昔的回忆中，过得非常愉快。）}
  \wordexample{reminiscing about the old}
\end{word}



\begin{word}[***]{monitor}{[]}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 MON[MIN]}
  \wordfamily{reminisce；monument；premonition；monumental；admonish（训诫）}

  \wordphrase{a monitor（班长）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a monitor".（常见搭配：班长。）}
  \wordsense{v. 监控；监测；监听；监视 *mon（= warn, advise） ['mɔnitə(r)]}
  \wordphrase{a monitor（班长）}
  \wordexample{A common collocation is "a monitor".（常见搭配：班长。）}
  \wordsense{v. 监控；监测；监听；监视 *}
  \wordphrase{a monitor（班长）}
  \wordexample{a monitor（班长）}
  \wordexample{to monitor（监控）}
\end{word}

  \wordbreakdown{词根 MON[MIN]；'mɔnjumənt}

  \wordexample{a monument（纪念碑）}

  \wordexample{monumental ignorance（极度的无知）}
